descriptionByLocale.en: Description Employee/administrative - Ausschreibung LβÄôEOC the multisite Ticino hospital is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1βÄô000 beds. The organization allows to effectively combine local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to the human relationship, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41, 000 patients who are deceased a year and providing over 600,000 outpatients. ## Mansions To complete our team at the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) at the Rehabilitation Center based at the Lugano Italian Hospital, we look for a(a): AFIT/administrative experience (50%) # Profile People we wish to meet have: - excellent organizational and communication skills - are able to respond to the numerous demands with flexibility and courtesy - they are able to interact positively with people of different fields both professional and hierarchical, creating the right atmosphere to collaboration - Reliability and ability to concentrate their efforts on the basis of priorities, combined with a global view of the situation and to a Applications, complete with curriculum vitae, letter of motivation, copies of certificates of study and work, will have to be sent by 30 April 2026 only in electronic format via www.eoc.ch - work in eoc - job offers - administrative staff. Paper or e-mail applications, as well as those which do not comply with the requirements, will not be considered. Additional information can be requested by Mrs Sabrina May, Head of Office Administrative Services, at number 091 811 26 18

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Catering Assistant - Job Advertisement The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the entire canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring the population a comprehensive and accessible hospital offering, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC provides high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients per year and delivering more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) in Novaggio. If there are employment opportunities, candidates whose profiles match the required qualifications will be contacted for an initial interview. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Catering Assistant. ## Profile - The future employee feels comfortable in a multicultural environment, manages interpersonal relationships with patients, ensures quality while respecting established times and procedures, and enjoys collaborative and teamwork. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of proficiency as a hotel or catering employee - Proficiency in Italian (spoken and written) and good knowledge of a second national language - Good computer skills - Availability for shift work (including Saturdays, Sundays, and holidays) with flexible hours - Adaptability to change and development - Professional experience in hospital or hotel facilities is considered an asset ## Notes - Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be deleted from our database. - Applications will only be evaluated if there is a service need. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. ## Contact EOC - Our Hospital Interested? If you identify with the profile and values sought, submit your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino, present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Profile The future collaborator has functional and technical knowledge and skills to perform their tasks, achieving high-quality results, is able to cope with important workloads and knows how to dedicate themselves to satisfying the expectations and requests of internal and external clients with a great spirit of collaboration, knowing how to maintain good relationships with people from different realities. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of capacity of domestic economy employee - Familiarity with corporate cleaning and use of cleaning machines - Professional experience preferably in the socio-sanitary field (hospital, clinic, elderly home) - Orientation to change and development - Mastery of the Italian language - Computer skills - Availability to work shifts (Saturday, Sunday and holidays included) with flexibility of hours ## What we offer - A dynamic and collaborative work environment - The opportunity to work in a multi-site hospital with a wide range of services - The possibility of developing your skills and growing professionally ## Contact - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - The evaluation of applications will be made only in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be released. - EOC - together to care better. descriptionByLocale.en: Description Nursing service internship - Ausschreibung The EOC, the multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows us to effectively combine a local approach and an overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and local hospital offer, regardless of the place where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Duties The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application for a nursing service internship. Profile The Nursing Service of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli offers the possibility of carrying out different types of internships to those who wish to undertake basic training as a nurse: - a) trainee: orientation internship to evaluate a possible enrollment in one of the courses to obtain the nursing diploma - b) pre-Supsi stagiaire: internship required by Supsi for students who wish to undertake the bachelor in nursing care - c) stagiaire SSSCI: internship required by the SSSCI (Specialized Higher School in Nursing) for students who wish to undertake training as SSS nurses - d) medical student: internship required by some Swiss medical faculties to be carried out either before the start of studies or by the end of the 1st year of university training ## Requirements Necessary requirements: - a) practitioner: - intention to undertake professional training in nursing - minimum age 16 years old - b) pre-Supsi stagiaire: - enrollment in SUPSI - c) SSSCI stagiaire: - enrollment in the SSSCI - d) medical student: - enrollment in the medical faculty of a Swiss university ## Observations Observations --> The applications of those who do not possess the above requirements will in no case be taken into consideration and will consequently be eliminated from our database. ## Contact For information on training possibilities, contact the schools (SUPSI or SSSCI). Studienjahres durchgefΟΦhrt werden muss ## Anforderungen Erforderliche Voraussetzungen: - a) Praktiker: - Absicht, eine Berufsausbildung in der Krankenpflege zu absolvieren - Mindestalter 16 Jahre - b) pre-Supsi stagiaire: - Einschreibung in SUPSI - c) SSSCI stagiaire: - Immatrikulation am SSSCI - d) Medizinstudent: - Immatrikulation an der medizinischen FakultΟΛt einer Schweizer UniversitΟΛt ## Bemerkungen Bemerkungen --> Bewerbungen von Personen, die die oben genannten Voraussetzungen nicht erfΟΦllen, werden in keinem Fall berΟΦcksichtigt und daher aus unserer Datenbank gelΟΕscht. ## Kontakt FΟΦr Informationen zu AusbildungsmΟΕglichkeiten wenden Sie sich bitte an die Schulen (SUPSI oder SSSCI). The following position is addressed to candidates wishing to apply spontaneously as Operating Room Technician (TSO) and/or Infirmary/Instructive Profile The person suitable for this position is a nurse/a with specialization of operating room technician or technical/operative room diploma and with capacity to instrument multiple surgical specialties. descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutions throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare assistance to 380,000 patients per year. ## Profile The future collaborator/operator has the knowledge and functional and technical skills to do their job and achieve high-quality results; has the ability to learn new techniques and is interested in innovations; knows how to work independently and uses their time efficiently and effectively. They are a person who can ask for feedback and learn from the advice received in order to improve their performance and services. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of capacity of socio-sanitary operator - Availability to work on all shifts (including nights) - Good stress management - Attitude to quality service and multidisciplinary collaboration - Balanced character, flexibility, and positive attitude - Essential knowledge of main computer tools (office package) ## Observations - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - Candidate evaluation will be made only in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be released. ## Contact Interested?

The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to apply spontaneously as a Caregiver. ## Profile The Nursing Service at the Regional Hospital in Mendrisio employs about 320 employees in different departments, in a context of report-based care. ## Requirements - cantonal diploma of care assistant (SSMT or SCOS) or equivalent qualification recognized. - Prepared for a patient-oriented quality service, for interdisciplinary collaboration within the team and for transparent communication. - Excellent knowledge of the Italian language spoken and written and possibly of a second national language. - Indispensable knowledge of the main computer means (Office package). ## Comments - Applications of those who do not have the above requirements will not be taken into account in any case and consequently will be deleted from our database. - Application evaluation will only be done in case of service requirements. - As a position for spontaneous applications, telephone information is not released. ## Contact EOC - our hospital. descriptionByLocale.en: Description The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care to 380,000 patients per year. ## Tasks The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) for the Novaggio site. In case of job availability, candidates with profiles that match the required requirements will be contacted for a first interview. ## Requirements - Recognized occupational therapist diploma from CRS - Initiative spirit; outstanding relational and communication skills - Organizational skills and predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration in a perspective of continuous improvement of department development and achievement of given objectives - Flexibility and positive attitude, pleasure in working in a team and collaborating transversely - Knowledge of other national languages and English - Excellent knowledge of main computer applications ## Profile - Has obtained a recognized occupational therapist diploma from CRS - Preferably boasts experience matured in the areas of: - neurology - pediatric medicine - traumatology - hand surgery - Is an action-oriented person and is able to establish effective and constructive relationships with internal and external customers - Has good listening skills and knows how to carefully evaluate every situation before acting - Believes like us in the importance of putting the patient and his family at the center of all our attention and dedicates himself with commitment to his personal development ## What we offer - ## Contact If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ ## Observations - The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database - The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released - EOC - our hospital Interested?
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die EOC, das Mehrstandortkrankenhaus von Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten Kantonalsgebiet fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Betten prΟΛsent. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht eine effektive Kombination von lokalem Ansatz und Gesamtvision, um der BevΟΕlkerung ein globales und ein nahes Krankenhausangebot zu gewΟΛhrleisten, unabhΟΛngig davon, wo die Dienste angefordert werden. Dank des Engagements und der Kompetenz von ΟΦber 5.000 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr menschliche Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet die EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung fΟΦr 380.000 Patienten pro Jahr. ## Aufgaben Die folgende Position richtet sich an Kandidaten, die eine spontane Bewerbung bei der Rehabilitationsklinik EOC (CREOC) fΟΦr den Standort Novaggio einreichen mΟΕchten. descriptionByLocale.en: Description The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care to 380,000 patients per year. ## Tasks The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) for the Novaggio site. In case of job availability, candidates with profiles that match the required requirements will be contacted for a first interview. ## Requirements - Recognized occupational therapist diploma from CRS - Initiative spirit; outstanding relational and communication skills - Organizational skills and predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration in a perspective of continuous improvement of department development and achievement of given objectives - Flexibility and positive attitude, pleasure in working in a team and collaborating transversely - Knowledge of other national languages and English - Excellent knowledge of main computer applications ## Profile - Has obtained a recognized occupational therapist diploma from CRS - Preferably boasts experience matured in the areas of: - neurology - pediatric medicine - traumatology - hand surgery - Is an action-oriented person and is able to establish effective and constructive relationships with internal and external customers - Has good listening skills and knows how to carefully evaluate every situation before acting - Believes like us in the importance of putting the patient and his family at the center of all our attention and dedicates himself with commitment to his personal development ## What we offer - ## Contact If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ ## Observations - The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database - The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released - EOC - our hospital Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Infermiere/a in general care - Ausschreibung LβÄôEOC the multisite Ticino hospital is present with its institutes on the whole cantonal territory for a total of 1βÄô000 beds. The organization allows to effectively combine local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of more than 6,500 employees and their attention to the human relationship, EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41, 000 patients who are deceased a year and providing over 600,000 outpatients. The following position is addressed to candidates wishing to apply spontaneously as Infermiere/a in general care ## Profile The Nursing Service of the Regional Hospital of Lugano employs about 800 employees, divided into different departments located in the 2 offices (Civico and Italian) in a context of Cure based on the report. ## Requirements ##### Required Requirements - Diploma of nurses (Bachelor SUPSI) or - Diploma of nurses (SSSCI) or - Diploma of nurses obtained in other Swiss cantons or - Degree in nursing care (Italy or other European countries) recognized by the Swiss Red Cross - Knowledge of the Italian language, spoken and written ## - Applications will be assessed only in case of service requirements. - As a position for spontaneous applications, telephone information is not released. ## Contact EOC - our hospital. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Catering Assistant - Job Advertisement The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the entire canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring the population a comprehensive and accessible hospital offering, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC provides high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients per year and delivering more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) in Novaggio. If there are employment opportunities, candidates whose profiles match the required qualifications will be contacted for an initial interview. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Catering Assistant. ## Profile - The future employee feels comfortable in a multicultural environment, manages interpersonal relationships with patients, ensures quality while respecting established times and procedures, and enjoys collaborative and teamwork. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of proficiency as a hotel or catering employee - Proficiency in Italian (spoken and written) and good knowledge of a second national language - Good computer skills - Availability for shift work (including Saturdays, Sundays, and holidays) with flexible hours - Adaptability to change and development - Professional experience in hospital or hotel facilities is considered an asset ## Notes - Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be deleted from our database. - Applications will only be evaluated if there is a service need. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. ## Contact EOC - Our Hospital Interested? If you identify with the profile and values sought, submit your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino, present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Profile The future collaborator has functional and technical knowledge and skills to perform their tasks, achieving high-quality results, is able to cope with important workloads and knows how to dedicate themselves to satisfying the expectations and requests of internal and external clients with a great spirit of collaboration, knowing how to maintain good relationships with people from different realities. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of capacity of domestic economy employee - Familiarity with corporate cleaning and use of cleaning machines - Professional experience preferably in the socio-sanitary field (hospital, clinic, elderly home) - Orientation to change and development - Mastery of the Italian language - Computer skills - Availability to work shifts (Saturday, Sunday and holidays included) with flexibility of hours ## What we offer - A dynamic and collaborative work environment - The opportunity to work in a multi-site hospital with a wide range of services - The possibility of developing your skills and growing professionally ## Contact - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - The evaluation of applications will be made only in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be released. - EOC - together to care better. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Nursing service internship - Ausschreibung The EOC, the multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows us to effectively combine a local approach and an overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and local hospital offer, regardless of the place where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Duties The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application for a nursing service internship. Profile The Nursing Service of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli offers the possibility of carrying out different types of internships to those who wish to undertake basic training as a nurse: - a) trainee: orientation internship to evaluate a possible enrollment in one of the courses to obtain the nursing diploma - b) pre-Supsi stagiaire: internship required by Supsi for students who wish to undertake the bachelor in nursing care - c) stagiaire SSSCI: internship required by the SSSCI (Specialized Higher School in Nursing) for students who wish to undertake training as SSS nurses - d) medical student: internship required by some Swiss medical faculties to be carried out either before the start of studies or by the end of the 1st year of university training ## Requirements Necessary requirements: - a) practitioner: - intention to undertake professional training in nursing - minimum age 16 years old - b) pre-Supsi stagiaire: - enrollment in SUPSI - c) SSSCI stagiaire: - enrollment in the SSSCI - d) medical student: - enrollment in the medical faculty of a Swiss university ## Observations Observations --> The applications of those who do not possess the above requirements will in no case be taken into consideration and will consequently be eliminated from our database. ## Contact For information on training possibilities, contact the schools (SUPSI or SSSCI). EOC - together to cure better. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Job Description EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare to 380,000 patients per year. ## Profile The future collaborator possesses excellent education, professional experience, and autonomy, as well as motivation, initiative, and a spirit of collaboration. He/she believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient at the center of all our attention. ## Requirements - Bachelor's/Master's degree in medicine - In the case of a foreign title, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO is required - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level: at least B2) - Good knowledge of other national languages - Registration of professional titles and language knowledge in the Medical Professions Register (https://www.medregom.admin.ch) - At the latest within 3 months of starting activity - High proficiency in IT tools ## Observations - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - Candidate evaluation will only be made in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be provided. ## Contact Interested?

The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare assistance to 380,000 patients per year. ## Profile The future collaborator/operator has the knowledge and functional and technical skills to do their job and achieve high-quality results; has the ability to learn new techniques and is interested in innovations; knows how to work independently and uses their time efficiently and effectively. They are a person who can ask for feedback and learn from the advice received in order to improve their performance and services. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of capacity of socio-sanitary operator - Availability to work on all shifts (including nights) - Good stress management - Attitude to quality service and multidisciplinary collaboration - Balanced character, flexibility, and positive attitude - Essential knowledge of main computer tools (office package) ## Observations - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - Candidate evaluation will be made only in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be released. ## Contact Interested?

jobs.description: Mediatore/trice interculturale - Ausschreibung LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. Per completare il nostro team del Servizio ammissione e dimissione pazienti dell' Ospedale Regionale di Mendrisio cerchiamo un(a) Mediatore/trice interculturale (60%) Profilo: La figura in ricerca, che collabora con il Servizio Sociale presente in Ospedale, lavora in modo interdisciplinare con lβÄôobiettivo di implementare e innovare continuamente le attivitΟ† ed i progetti giΟ† avviati dal 2017, sia internamente sia sul territorio. La posizione contribuisce al consolidamento di un approccio integrato, in collaborazione con Swiss Health Network for Equity , gli Uffici Cantonali preposti, le organizzazioni attive sul territorio e la SEM. LβÄôOspedale funge da riferimento per i Centri federali dβÄôasilo del Ticino e della Svizzera centrale. Il/la mediatore/trice interculturale sarΟ† assunto/a con un contratto al 60% a tempo indeterminato. Tra i suoi compiti figurano la creazione di percorsi personalizzati per pazienti con background migratorio o in situazioni di vulnerabilitΟ† socio-economiche e sanitarie, la formazione e il sostegno al personale curante, il coordinamento degli interventi di interpretariato, la mediazione volta a garantire il rispetto dei diritti di ogni paziente, lβÄôofferta di una consulenza mirata agli altri ospedali dellβÄôEOC, la partecipazione a progetti di ricerca e lβÄôimplementazione degli standard di qualitΟ† per garantire lβÄôequitΟ† nellβÄôaccesso alle cure. La funzione prevede lo svolgimento di attivitΟ† amministrative in back-office. Requisiti necessari: Laurea o diploma superiore considerato equivalente, preferibilmente in scienze sociali. Una formazione in mediazione interculturale o di specialista della migrazione Possiede una significativa esperienza lavorativa con i migranti e i richiedenti dβÄôasilo e una solida conoscenza della realtΟ† sanitaria cantonale e dei servizi sociali. Ottime conoscenze della lingua italiana e buona padronanza di unβÄôaltra lingua nazionale e dellβÄôinglese. Οà in grado di stabilire e mantenere relazioni efficaci, gestisce in modo professionale le situazioni complesse, sia nei confronti di interlocutori esterni sia interni. CapacitΟ† di affrontare le diverse problematiche con metodologia e con un approccio aperto e costruttivo. Ottima capacitΟ† di ascolto e buona predisposizione al lavoro in team. Data d'entrata: da convenire Inoltro candidat

LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie allβÄôimpegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti allβÄôanno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali. Per completare il nostro team del Servizio ammissione e dimissione pazienti dell' Ospedale Regionale di Mendrisio cerchiamo un(a) Mediatore/trice interculturale (60%)

## Profilo
La figura in ricerca, che collabora con il Servizio Sociale presente in Ospedale, lavora in modo interdisciplinare con lβÄôobiettivo di implementare e innovare continuamente le attivitΟ† ed i progetti giΟ† avviati dal 2017, sia internamente sia sul territorio. La posizione contribuisce al consolidamento di un approccio integrato, in collaborazione con Swiss Health Network for Equity , gli Uffici Cantonali preposti, le organizzazioni attive sul territorio e la SEM. LβÄôOspedale funge da riferimento per i Centri federali dβÄôasilo del Ticino e della Svizzera centrale. Il/la mediatore/trice interculturale sarΟ† assunto/a con un contratto al 60% a tempo indeterminato.

## Compiti
- Creazione di percorsi personalizzati per pazienti con background migratorio o in situazioni di vulnerabilitΟ† socio-economiche e sanitarie
- Formazione e sostegno al personale curante
- Coordinamento degli interventi di interpretariato
- Mediazione volta a garantire il rispetto dei diritti di ogni paziente
- Offerta di una consulenza mirata agli altri ospedali dellβÄôEOC
- Partecipazione a progetti di ricerca
- Implementazione degli standard di qualitΟ† per garantire lβÄôequitΟ† nellβÄôaccesso alle cure
- Svolgimento di attivitΟ† amministrative in back-office

## Requisiti
- Laurea o diploma superiore considerato equivalente, preferibilmente in scienze sociali
- Formazione in mediazione interculturale o di specialista della migrazione
- Significativa esperienza lavorativa con i migranti e i richiedenti dβÄôasilo
- Solida conoscenza della realtΟ† sanitaria cantonale e dei servizi sociali
- Ottime conoscenze della lingua italiana e buona padronanza di unβÄôaltra lingua nazionale e dellβÄôinglese
- CapacitΟ† di stabilire e mantenere relazioni efficaci
- Gestione professionale delle situazioni complesse, sia nei confronti di interlocutori esterni sia interni
- CapacitΟ† di affrontare le diverse problematiche con metodologia e con un approccio aperto e costruttivo
- Ottima capacitΟ† di ascolto
- Buona predisposizione al lavoro in team

## Contatto
- Data d'entrata: da convenire
- Inoltro candidat

descriptionByLocale.en: Job Description The EOC is the multi-site hospital organization in Ticino, with facilities across the entire canton offering a total of 1,000 beds. The organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring the population has access to comprehensive and proximity-based hospital services, regardless of where they are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC provides high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients annually and delivering more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our Platform Services team within the EDT Area of the General Management, we are looking for a Systems Engineer Linux & Kubernetes Platform Services (100%). ## Profile In a multi-site hospital context characterized by high reliability and operational continuity requirements, the selected candidate will contribute to the management and evolution of the Linux platform and containerized Kubernetes services, active across multiple environments (dev/test/pre-production/production). The role involves direct technical responsibility for the stability, security, and automation of the platform, with particular attention to the resilience of systems supporting critical clinical and administrative applications. The person will work in collaboration with infrastructure, application, and security teams, actively contributing to the modernization and consolidation of the platform. ## Responsibilities - Kubernetes Platform Management - Design, implementation, and maintenance of Kubernetes clusters in on-premise and/or hybrid environments. - Management of the cluster lifecycle (installation, updates, patching, scaling). - Configuration and management of core components (Ingress, StorageClass, RBAC, NetworkPolicy). - Linux System Administration - Management and hardening of enterprise Linux servers (RHEL/Ubuntu). - Performance monitoring and capacity planning. - Analysis and resolution of complex system issues. - Automation and Infrastructure as Code - Application deployment using GitOps. - Implementation and maintenance of CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI). - Use of Infrastructure as Code tools (Terraform/OpenTofu). - Development and management of configurations with Puppet and/or Ansible. - Secure management of secrets (OpenBao or equivalents). - Security and Operational Continuity - Implementation of security policies on Kubernetes clusters. - Hardening of Linux nodes. - Design and verification of backup and disaster recovery strategies. - Analysis of second- and third-level incidents and drafting of Root Cause Analysis. - Monitoring and Continuous Improvement - Configuration and management of monitoring and logging systems (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK). - Updating technical documentation. - Contribution to standardization efforts.

Die Person arbeitet eng mit den Infrastruktur-, Anwendungs- und Sicherheitsteams zusammen und trΟΛgt aktiv zur Modernisierung und Konsolidierung der Plattform bei. ## Aufgaben - Verwaltung der Kubernetes-Plattform - Planung, Implementierung und Wartung von Kubernetes-Clustern in On-Premise- und/oder Hybridumgebungen. - Verwaltung des Cluster-Lebenszyklus (Installation, Updates, Patching, Skalierung). - Konfiguration und Verwaltung von Kernkomponenten (Ingress, StorageClass, RBAC, NetworkPolicy). - Administration von Linux-Systemen - Verwaltung und HΟΛrtung von Enterprise-Linux-Servern (RHEL/Ubuntu). - LeistungsΟΦberwachung und KapazitΟΛtsplanung. - Analyse und Behebung komplexer Systemprobleme. - Automatisierung und Infrastructure as Code - Bereitstellung von Anwendungen mit GitOps-Ansatz. - Implementierung und Wartung von CI/CD-Pipelines (GitLab CI). - Nutzung von Infrastructure-as-Code-Tools (Terraform/OpenTofu). - Entwicklung und Verwaltung von Konfigurationen mit Puppet und/oder Ansible. - Sichere Verwaltung von Geheimnissen (OpenBao oder Ο³quivalente). - Sicherheit und BetriebskontinuitΟΛt - Implementierung von Sicherheitsrichtlinien in Kubernetes-Clustern. - HΟΛrtung von Linux-Knoten. - Planung und Ο€berprΟΦfung von Backup- und Disaster-Recovery-Strategien. - Analyse von VorfΟΛllen der zweiten und dritten Ebene sowie Erstellung von Root-Cause-Analysen. - Ο€berwachung und kontinuierliche Verbesserung - Konfiguration und Verwaltung von Ο€berwachungs- und Protokollierungssystemen (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK). - Aktualisierung der technischen Dokumentation. - Beitrag zur Standardisierung.

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Medical Practice Assistants - Job Advertisement The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity-based hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete the teams of the Pediatric Institute of Italian Switzerland at the Beata Vergine Hospital in Mendrisio and the Civic Hospital in Lugano, we are looking for a: Medical Practice Assistant (50%-70%) ## Profile - The candidate we are looking for will work closely with the doctor and, together with the team of medical practice assistants, will handle the practical and administrative management of the pediatric outpatient clinic - The person we are seeking holds a federal certificate of capacity as a medical practice assistant and has at least two years of experience in the healthcare sector. Additionally, they must possess: - Technical skills for performing cardiological examinations (ECG, Cycle Ergometry, Holter, and blood pressure monitoring) - Technical skills in small dressing procedures and vital parameter collection - Technical skills in performing blood draws and injections - The candidate has a natural aptitude for working in interprofessional teams and demonstrates particular sensitivity in understanding the needs of users - They also possess excellent relational skills, empathy, listening ability, stress management, as well as organizational and administrative skills in managing the activities of the pediatric outpatient clinic - The person we are looking for is willing to work flexibly between the Mendrisio and Lugano locations, and experience in pediatric contexts will be considered a preferential qualification - Believes, as we do, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention ## Start Date - To be agreed upon ## Contact - For further information, Ms. Maria Gnata, Head of the IPSI Secretariats, is available at +41 91 811 96 07 - Applications must be submitted no later than April 30, 2026 - Paper and email applications will not be accepted ## Notes - EOC - our hospital

jobs.description:
## Descrizione

LβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino, con i suoi istituti presenti sull'intero territorio cantonale, offre un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente un approccio locale e una visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie allβÄôimpegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti all'anno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali.

LβÄôIstituto di Diagnostica Integrata della Svizzera Italiana (IDISI) riunisce le Cliniche di radiologia, medicina nucleare, patologia e medicina di laboratorio e, con i suoi circa 600 collaboratori e quasi 4 milioni di esami e analisi eseguite ogni anno, offre un servizio diagnostico completo e di alta qualitΟ†, rispondendo alle esigenze dei pazienti residenti in tutto il territorio cantonale. Superando le tradizionali barriere specialistiche, lβÄôIDISI adotta un approccio multidisciplinare per favorire percorsi diagnostico-terapeutici piΟΙ efficienti e personalizzati, capaci di rispondere in modo mirato alle specifiche necessitΟ† di ciascun paziente. Inoltre lβÄôIstituto Ο® orientato allβÄôinsegnamento universitario e alla promozione della ricerca biomedica.

La Clinica di Medicina Nucleare esegue ogni anno circa 8βÄô000 esami diagnostici e terapeutici, coprendo quasi tutte le prestazioni disponibili nellβÄôambito della medicina nucleare. Tra i vari riconoscimenti conseguiti, la Clinica Ο® accreditata presso lβÄôente europeo UEMS/EBNM per lβÄôattivitΟ† clinica e di formazione.

Per completare il nostro team della Clinica di Medicina Nucleare a Bellinzona e Lugano cerchiamo un/a Tecnico/a di radiologia (100%).

## Profilo

La persona che cerchiamo Ο® propositiva, flessibile, dinamica e orientata allβÄôazione. Mantiene la calma e la padronanza di sΟ© anche in caso di forte carico di lavoro ed Ο® in grado di gestire adeguatamente i momenti di pressione. Sa prendere decisioni complesse tramite unβÄôattenta analisi dei problemi alfine di ricercare le migliori soluzioni. Utilizza il proprio tempo in maniera efficiente, concentrando i propri sforzi sulle prioritΟ† piΟΙ importanti ed Ο® in grado di gestire piΟΙ attivitΟ† alla volta. Stabilisce relazioni efficaci e costruttive con i clienti interni ed esterni, ottenendo la fiducia dei propri interlocutori e riuscendo a soddisfare le loro aspettative. Οà una persona aperta in grado di fare tesoro dei consigli di chi ha piΟΙ esperienza. Abile tecnicamente, Ο® a proprio agio con le nuove tecnologie e le innovazioni in generale che sa apprendere con facilitΟ†. Come noi, crede nellβÄôimportanza di mettere il paziente al centro di tutte le nostre attenzioni e condivide i valori e la missione dellβÄôEnte Ospedaliero Cantonale, identificandosi appieno in essi.

## Requisiti necessari

- diploma di tecnico/a di radiologia

descriptionByLocale.en: Description The multisite Ticino hospital, with its institutes on the whole cantonal territory, offers a total of 1βÄô000 beds. The organization allows to effectively combine a local approach and an overview, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of more than 6,500 employees and their attention to the human relationship, EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41, 000 patients who are deceased a year and providing over 600,000 outpatients. The Institute of Integrated Diagnostics of Italian Switzerland (IDISI) brings together the Clinics of radiology, nuclear medicine, pathology and laboratory medicine and, with its approximately 600 collaborators and almost 4 million examinations and analysis carried out each year, offers a comprehensive and high quality diagnostic service, responding to the needs of patients resident throughout the cantonal territory. Overcoming traditional specialist barriers, IDISI adopts a multidisciplinary approach to favor more efficient and personalized diagnostic-therapeutic paths, capable of responding to the specific needs of each patient. The Institute is also oriented to university education and to promoting biomedical research. The Nuclear Medicine Clinic performs approximately 8,000 diagnostic and therapeutic examinations each year, covering almost all available performance in nuclear medicine. Among the various awards, the Clinic is accredited to the EUMS/EBNM European Agency for Clinical and Training. To complete our team at the Nuclear Medicine Clinic in Bellinzona and Lugano we look for a Radiology Technician (100%). ## Profile The person we are looking for is positive, flexible, dynamic and action-oriented. It maintains calm and mastery of itself even in case of strong workload and is able to properly manage pressure moments. He can make complex decisions through careful analysis of problems in order to search for the best solutions. Use your time efficiently, focusing your efforts on the most important priorities and is able to manage multiple tasks at a time. It establishes effective and constructive relationships with internal and external customers, obtaining the confidence of their interlocutors and succeeding in fulfilling their expectations. He is an open person able to treasure the advice of those who have more experience. Technically skilled, it is comfortable with the new technologies and innovations in general that can learn easily. Like us, he believes in the importance of putting the patient at the center of all our attentions and shares the values and mission of the Cantonal Hospitaller, fully identifying in them. ## Required Requirements - Radiology Technical Diploma
descriptionByLocale.de: Warenbezeichnung Das Multisite Ticino Krankenhaus mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten Kantongebiet bietet insgesamt 1βÄô000 Betten. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht es, einen lokalen Ansatz und eine Ο€bersicht effektiv zu kombinieren, um die BevΟΕlkerung ein globales und NΟΛhe Krankenhaus Angebot zu gewΟΛhrleisten, unabhΟΛngig davon, wo die Dienstleistungen erforderlich sind. Dank des Engagements und der Expertise von mehr als 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit auf die menschliche Beziehung sorgt das EOC fΟΦr eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem es mehr als 41.000 Patienten betreut, die ein Jahr verstorben sind und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Patienten versorgen. Das Institut fΟΦr Integrierte Diagnostik der italienischen Schweiz (IDISI) vereint die Kliniken fΟΦr Radiologie, Nuklearmedizin, Pathologie und Labormedizin und bietet mit seinen rund 600 Mitarbeitern und fast 4 Millionen Untersuchungen und Analysen, die jedes Jahr durchgefΟΦhrt werden, einen umfassenden und qualitativ hochwertigen diagnostischen Dienst, der auf die BedΟΦrfnisse von Patienten reagiert, die im gesamten Kantongebiet ansΟΛssig sind. Ο€berwindung traditioneller spezialisierter Barrieren nimmt IDISI einen multidisziplinΟΛren Ansatz an, um effizientere und personalisierte diagnostische Wege zu bevorzugen, die auf die spezifischen BedΟΦrfnisse jedes Patienten reagieren kΟΕnnen. Das Institut orientiert sich auch an der Hochschulbildung und an der FΟΕrderung biomedizinischer Forschung. Die Klinik Nuklearmedizin fΟΦhrt jΟΛhrlich rund 8.000 diagnostische und therapeutische Untersuchungen durch, die nahezu alle verfΟΦgbaren Leistungen in der Nuklearmedizin abdecken. Unter den verschiedenen Auszeichnungen wird die Klinik an die EUMS/EBNM European Agency for Clinical and Training akkreditiert. Um unser Team an der Nuklearmedizin Klinik in Bellinzona und Lugano abzuschlieΟüen, suchen wir einen Radiologietechniker (100%). Ihr Profil Die gesuchte Person ist positiv, flexibel, dynamisch und handlungsorientiert. Es hΟΛlt Ruhe und Beherrschung von sich selbst auch bei starker Arbeitsbelastung und ist in der Lage, Druckmomente richtig zu verwalten. Er kann komplexe Entscheidungen durch sorgfΟΛltige Analyse von Problemen treffen, um nach den besten LΟΕsungen zu suchen. Nutzen Sie Ihre Zeit effizient, konzentrieren Sie sich auf die wichtigsten PrioritΟΛten und kΟΕnnen mehrere Aufgaben gleichzeitig verwalten. Es stellt effektive und konstruktive Beziehungen zu internen und externen Kunden her, das Vertrauen ihrer GesprΟΛchspartner zu erhalten und ihre Erwartungen zu erfΟΦllen. Er ist ein offener Mensch in der Lage, den Rat derer zu schΟΛtzen, die mehr Erfahrung haben. Technisch geschult, ist es mit den neuen Technologien und Innovationen im Allgemeinen, die leicht lernen kΟΕnnen. Wie wir, glaubt er an die Bedeutung, den Patienten in den Mittelpunkt all unserer Aufmerksamkeit zu stellen und teilt die Werte und Mission des Kantons Hospitaller, vollstΟΛndig in ihnen zu identifizieren. Erforderliche Anforderungen - Radiologie Technisches Diplom

Crede, come noi, nell'importanza di mettere il paziente e la sua famiglia al centro di tutte le nostre attenzioni. ## Requisiti - possedere il titolo di medico ed un titolo di specializzazione in Medicina interna ( per i titoli esteri necessario riconoscimento MEBEKO giΟ† ottenuto prima dellβÄôinizio dellβÄôattivitΟ† ) - aver giΟ† iscritto in Medreg, prima del suo inizio, le sue conoscenze linguistiche in Italiano (minimo livello B2) secondo le nuove disposizioni LPMed in vigore dal 1¬Α gennaio 2018 - auspicate buone conoscenze di unβÄôaltra lingua nazionale oltre allβÄôitaliano (francese, tedesco) ed eventualmente dellβÄôinglese - attestato di libero esercizio nel Canton Ticino ottenuto prima dellβÄôinizio presso il nostro Istituto - solida esperienza clinica in medicina interna - formazione in ultrasuoni (criterio preferenziale) ed eventualmente anche titolo quale tutor della SGUM - esperienza clinica maturata in Svizzera (criterio preferenziale) - capacitΟ† didattiche ## Cosa offriamo Offriamo un ambiente di lavoro moderno ## Contatto Data d'entrata: 1. luglio 2026 o data da concordare Informazioni e inoltro candidature:
descriptionByLocale.en: Description The EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multisite hospital in Ticino with a total of 1,000 beds, present throughout the canton. Our organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, providing the population with a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures quality health care, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Duties The Internal Medicine department of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli (sites in Bellinzona, Faido and Acquarossa) is an integral part of the Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (www.eoc.ch). It is recognized as a professional training center, category A, with a wide multidisciplinary casuistry and involves collaborators in the areas of care, research and training. The peripheral hospitals located in Leventina (Faido) and Valle di Blenio (Acquarossa) complete the profile of the casuistry in a dynamic of greater autonomy. The medical team consists of 35 assistant doctors, 12 clinic heads and numerous senior executives belonging to different disciplines of internal medicine. ## Profile The doctor we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy, as well as motivation, initiative and a spirit of collaboration. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. ## Requirements - possess a medical degree and a specialization title in Internal Medicine (for foreign titles, MEBEKO recognition must be obtained before starting work) - have already registered their linguistic knowledge in Italian (minimum level B2) with Medreg before starting work, according to the new LPMed provisions in force from January 1, 2018 - good knowledge of another national language besides Italian (French, German) and possibly English - certificate of free exercise in the Canton of Ticino obtained before starting work at our Institute - solid clinical experience in internal medicine - ultrasound training (preferential criterion) and possibly also a title as SGUM tutor - clinical experience gained in Switzerland (preferential criterion) - teaching skills ## What we offer We offer a modern work environment ## Contact Entry date: July 1, 2026 or date to be agreed. descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the cantonal territory with its institutes for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the efficient combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. We are looking for a registered nurse with a diploma in general care from SUPSI / SSSCI or an equivalent recognized by CRS. The future collaborator exercises daily professional leadership, assuming responsibility for assistance, promoting respect-based relationships and actively contributing to achieving shared goals. Responsibilities: - Works independently in their area of expertise - Collaborates effectively with other healthcare professionals to ensure personalized and need-oriented care plans - Fosters a positive and constructive work climate - Participates in team development and promotes an environment that supports quality, safety, and organizational well-being - Acts according to scientific evidence - Contributes to continuous improvement, evaluation of assistance outcomes, and professional growth of themselves and the group - Believes in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention Requirements: - Flexibility related to changing service conditions - Availability to work in a dynamic and constantly evolving environment What we offer: - The opportunity to work in a dynamic and motivated team - The possibility of contributing to the continuous improvement of healthcare assistance - A work environment that supports professional and personal growth Contact: - Start date: to be agreed - For further information, Mrs. Sally Imhof, head of the nursing service ORBV, is available at 091 811 92 86 - Applications must be submitted by no later than April 30, 2026 - No paper or email applications will be accepted

descriptionByLocale.en: Allergology Clinic Head Physician - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our EOC Medicine team, and more specifically at the Allergology service of the Regional Hospital of Locarno "La CaritΟ†" (main site), we are looking for an Allergology Clinic Head Physician (60-100%). Profile: The person we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy, as well as motivation, initiative, and collaboration spirit. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. Requirements: - Master's degree in Medicine and specialization in Allergology and Clinical Immunology already completed. - For foreign title holders, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting work is required. - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with registration with MedReg before starting work. - Desirable knowledge of another national language and English. - Obtaining the Free Exercise authorization issued by the DSS Canton Ticino. - Experience in Allergology and Immunology. - Experience in training young colleagues (medical assistants). - Excellent relational and teamwork skills. - Interest in research and teaching. Entry date: immediately or to be agreed upon. We offer a modern and dynamic work environment and the possibility of working with highly motivated and prepared collaborators. The complete applications, including CV, motivation letter, copies of study and work titles, must be submitted electronically through the EOC web portal in the "Job Offers - Medical Personnel" section. Applications sent by ordinary mail or email will not be considered. Further information can be requested from Dr. Igor SalvadΟ©, Head of the Allergology service, via the secretariat's phone number: +41 (0)91 811 44 80. Locarno, February 20, 2026 EOC - our hospital. Interested?
descriptionByLocale.de: Ausschreibung Das EOC, das multisite-Krankenhaus von Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Betten prΟΛsent. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht eine effektive Kombination von lokaler Herangehensweise und Gesamtvision, indem sie der BevΟΕlkerung ein globales und ein nahes Krankenhausangebot bietet, unabhΟΛngig davon, wo die Dienstleistungen angefordert werden. Dank des Engagements und der Kompetenz von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr menschliche Beziehungen bietet das EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem es sich um ΟΦber 41.000 stationΟΛre Patienten pro Jahr kΟΦmmert und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen durchfΟΦhrt. Um unser Team der EOC-Medizin zu vervollstΟΛndigen, und zwar insbesondere im Dienst der Allergologie des Regionalkrankenhauses von Locarno "La CaritΟ†" (Hauptstandort), suchen wir eine ChefΟΛrztin/Chefarzt Allergologie-Klinik (60-100%). Profil: Die Person, die wir suchen, verfΟΦgt ΟΦber Berufserfahrung und Autonomie sowie Motivation, Initiative und Kooperationsgeist. Sie glaubt, wie wir, an die Bedeutung, den Patienten und seine Familie in den Mittelpunkt all unserer Aufmerksamkeit zu stellen. Anforderungen: - Masterabschluss in Medizin und Spezialisierung in Allergologie und klinischer Immunologie bereits abgeschlossen. - FΟΦr Inhaber eines auslΟΛndischen Titels ist die Anerkennung durch die Bundeskommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und die Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit erforderlich. - Nachweisliche Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (erforderliches Niveau mindestens B2) mit Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit. - GewΟΦnschte Kenntnisse einer anderen nationalen Sprache und Englisch. - Erhalt der Genehmigung fΟΦr freie AusΟΦbung, herausgegeben vom DSS Kanton Tessin. - Erfahrung in Allergologie und Immunologie. - Erfahrung in der Ausbildung von jungen Kollegen (medizinische Assistenten). - Hervorragende Kommunikations- und TeamfΟΛhigkeiten. - Interesse an Forschung und Lehre. Eintrittsdatum: sofort oder zu vereinbaren. Wir bieten eine moderne und dynamische Arbeitsumgebung und die MΟΕglichkeit, mit hochmotivierten und qualifizierten Mitarbeitern zusammenzuarbeiten. descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, Ticino's multisite hospital, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with a global vision, ensuring a comprehensive and accessible hospital offer for the population, regardless of where services are required. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team at the Regional Hospital of Locarno "La CaritΟ†", we are looking for a Specialist in Reproductive Medicine (80-100%). Profile: The person we are looking for will join the Cantonal Fertility Center of the Cantonal Hospital (CCF) which has its main headquarters at the Regional Hospital of Locarno. Required qualifications: Specialization title in Gynecology and Obstetrics already completed. In-depth training in Reproductive Medicine and gynecological endocrinology, completed or in progress. For doctors with foreign titles, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg is mandatory before starting the activity. Obtaining the authorization for Independent Practice issued by the Ticino Cantonal Health Department (DSS). Proven knowledge of the Italian language (level B2 required) with registration with MedReg before starting the activity. Desirable knowledge of German or French at least at a basic level. Autonomy in patient care. Flexibility, strong availability and teamwork orientation. Start date: to be agreed. Complete applications with CV, motivation letter, copies of study and work titles must be submitted electronically via the EOC job portal in the "Job Offers - Medical Staff" section by March 15, 2026. Applications sent by regular mail or email will not be considered. For further information, please contact Dr. Alessandro Santi, CCF director, at the secretariat's phone number: +41 (0)91 811 45 40. Locarno, February 4, 2026 EOC - Our Hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ
descriptionByLocale.de: Das EOC, das Mehrspital des Kantons Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten Kantonsgebiet vertreten und verfΟΦgt ΟΦber insgesamt 1000 Betten. Um unser Team im Regionalspital Locarno "La CaritΟ†" zu vervollstΟΛndigen, suchen wir einen Facharzt fΟΦr Reproduktionsmedizin (80-100%). Vertiefte Ausbildung in Reproduktionsmedizin und gynΟΛkologischer Endokrinologie, abgeschlossen oder in Fortschritt. Erhalt der Bewilligung fΟΦr die selbstΟΛndige AusΟΦbung, ausgestellt vom Kantonalen Gesundheitsdepartement des Kantons Tessin (DSS). Nachweis der Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (mindestens Niveau B2) mit Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit. MΟΛrz 2026 elektronisch ΟΦber das EOC-Job-Portal in der Sektion "Stellenangebote - medizinisches Personal" eingereicht werden. Bewerbungen per Post oder E-Mail werden nicht berΟΦcksichtigt. FΟΦr weitere Informationen wenden Sie sich bitte an Dr. Alessandro Santi, Direktor des CCF, unter der Telefonnummer des Sekretariats: +41 (0)91 811 45 40. Locarno, 4. Februar 2026 EOC - Unser Spital. Le candidature complete di curriculum vitae, lettera di motivazione, copie dei titoli di studio e di lavoro, dovranno pervenire in formato elettronico tramite il portale web EOC nella sezione βÄ€Offerte di lavoro - Personale medicoβÄù. descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines local and global approaches to ensure a comprehensive and accessible healthcare offer, regardless of where services are required. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients annually and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team at the Regional Hospital of Locarno "La CaritΟ†", we are looking for a Specialist Urologist (80-100%). The person we are looking for will join the Urology department of the Regional Hospital of Locarno. We aim to expand our team in anticipation of the imminent acquisition of new laser equipment for the treatment of calculi, urinary tract neoplasms, and prostatic hyperplasia. Our unit is part of the EOC's cross-service Urology department and collaborates with the Bellinzona and Lugano sites for the treatment of oncological pathologies and robotic techniques. Required qualifications: Medical degree and specialization in urology already completed. For foreign-trained physicians, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg is mandatory before starting work. Obtaining the authorization for independent practice issued by the Canton Ticino DSS is required. Proven knowledge of Italian (level B2 or higher) with registration with MedReg before starting work is required. Knowledge of German or French at least at a basic level is desirable. Start date: to be agreed. Complete applications with CV, motivation letter, copies of study and work certificates must be submitted electronically via the EOC job portal in the "Job Offers - Medical Staff" section. Applications sent by regular mail or email will not be considered. For further information, please contact Dr. Giovanni Porcu, Vice-Chief of Urology, at the secretariat's phone number: +41 (0)91 811 49 20. Locarno, 2 February 2026 EOC - Our Hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, please submit your application.

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Profile The internship is aimed at students enrolled in a Swiss or foreign medical faculty. ## Required Requirements - Enrollment in the 5th or 6th year of study during the internship period - An official university enrollment certificate is required; self-certifications will not be considered - Knowledge of a second Swiss national language (German and/or French) is desirable - EU citizenship ## Observations - Internships always start on the first working day of the month. - Minimum duration of 1 month, maximum of 3 months. - Applications must be complete with curriculum vitae, identity document, university certificate. - Candidate evaluation will only be made in case of need by the service. - As this is a spontaneous application, no negative responses are expected. - Candidates will be contacted directly by the medical secretariat within 3-6 months in case of a positive response to a vacant position. ## What We Offer EOC - our hospital. ## Contact Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: L'EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are needed. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as an Assistant Physician in Training - Internal Medicine at the Regional Hospital of Locarno. The person we are looking for must possess motivation, initiative, and a collaborative spirit. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. Required qualifications include a diploma in human medicine (for foreign titles, recognition of the degree by the Federal Commission of Medical Professions Mebeko is mandatory and must be obtained before the start of the activity); registration in the medical professions register MedReg; knowledge of the Italian language, according to the provisions of the LPMed in force from January 1, 2018; desirable knowledge of a second national Swiss language (German and/or French). Observations --> The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs (vacant positions); candidates who meet the requirements will be contacted eventually within three to six months after the application. No negative response communications are foreseen.

descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a global and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. With the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to the human relationship, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Institute of Integrated Diagnostics of the Italian Switzerland (IDISI) brings together the Clinics of radiology, nuclear medicine, pathology and laboratory medicine, and with its approximately 600 collaborators and almost 4 million examinations and analyses performed annually, offers a complete and high-quality diagnostic service, responding to the needs of patients residing throughout the canton. The Clinic of Radiology performs over 260,000 examinations a year, thanks to the effective integration of the skills of its 45 doctors and 150 radiology technicians and an advanced technological infrastructure. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Medical Radiology Technician. Profile: We are looking for proactive, flexible and dynamic people. They are oriented towards the centrality and respect of the dignity of individuals, and constantly strive to guarantee quality and adequacy of care to patients. Their good conduct, transparency and honesty are the founding bases for building an effective and trusting relationship with patients, companions and colleagues. They are prepared to integrate into a high-tech environment, aware of the absolute importance of the added value given by good relationships, welcome, listening and knowing how to grasp the expectations of others. Requirements: medical radiology technician diploma (or recognized equivalent title) availability to work on multiple sites, on shifts and with on-call services (picquets) in addition to Italian, knowledge of another national language is desirable. Observations: --> Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will therefore be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information is provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ

Die folgende Stelle richtet sich an Bewerber, die eine spontane Bewerbung als Medizinischer RΟΕntgen-Techniker/in einreichen mΟΕchten. Profil: Wir suchen proaktive, flexible und dynamische Menschen. descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring a global and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. With the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Chef. Profile: The ideal candidate has gained experience as a Chef in medium or large public or private institutions. They are reliable, flexible, and proactive, capable of working in multicultural contexts and effectively managing interpersonal relationships. They demonstrate solid technical-professional skills, autonomy in managing their own tasks, and the ability to organize work while respecting times, procedures, and directives. They actively collaborate with the team, contributing to the achievement of common objectives. They are oriented towards quality service and customer satisfaction, ready to respond promptly and seriously to different operational needs, establishing positive relationships with interlocutors at all levels. Requirements: Federal Certificate of Competence as a Chef, the Dietetics Chef diploma is a plus, Several years of experience in catering and banqueting, Operational autonomy in various kitchen tasks and mise-en-place management, Care in food preparation and presentation, Thorough knowledge of food techniques, hygiene and health regulations (HACCP, LEAR), and food management, Order, cleanliness, and sanitization of the workstation, Control of materials and food, Flexibility, availability, and adaptability, Teamwork attitude in interdisciplinary contexts, Innovation, concentration, and orientation towards quality and patient/user satisfaction. The activity takes place in shifts (afternoon, evening, weekends, and holidays). Observations: Applications that do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. Since this is not a competition announcement, but an information for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. Paper applications or sent by email will not be accepted. Candidate evaluation will only be done in case of service needs. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ
