descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with its institutes, totaling 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. With the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to the human relationship, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients annually and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team at the Medical Assessment Service (SAM) in Bellinzona, we are looking for a Psychiatrist and Psychotherapist Expert SAM. Profile: The person we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy, and is motivated to work in a team and follow a training path in the peritial field. Requirements: The doctor we are looking for must have: a medical degree and a specialization in psychiatry and psychotherapy (for foreign titles, MEBEKO recognition must be obtained before starting the activity). They must also have registered their linguistic knowledge in Italian (minimum level B2) in Medreg before starting, according to the new LPMed regulations in force since January 1, 2018; a certificate of free exercise in the Canton of Ticino obtained before starting at our Institute; excellent relational skills and teamwork; a sense of organization. Experience in the peritial field and excellent mastery of German and other national languages will be considered preferential. The main tasks the doctor will have to perform are: drafting psychiatric peritial evaluations in Italian; dictating medical records; extensive anamnesis collection; thorough clinical examination; multidisciplinary discussion of the case with the specialists involved; discussion of previous evaluations and controversial points in the records; drafting of the medical expertise with clear and precise answers to all peritial questions; respect for the delivery deadlines of the expertise and the quality criteria of the expertise. Entry date: to be agreed. Job applications and information: If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, please submit your application (complete with a cover letter, curriculum vitae, copies of study and work certificates and a photograph) through the website www.eoc.ch in the 'Job offers' section or through the appropriate link. We inform you that only applications that meet the requirements will be considered.
descriptionByLocale.de: Das EOC, das Mehrstandort-Krankenhaus des Kantons Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten flΟΛchendeckend im Kanton vertreten und verfΟΦgt ΟΦber insgesamt 1.000 Betten. Die Organisation verbindet einen lokalen Ansatz mit einem Ο€berblick und garantiert so ein umfassendes und nahes Krankenhausangebot, unabhΟΛngig davon, wo die Dienstleistungen in Anspruch genommen werden. Mit dem Engagement und der Kompetenz von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit gegenΟΦber der menschlichen Beziehung garantiert das EOC eine hochwertige medizinische Versorgung und betreut jΟΛhrlich ΟΦber 41.000 stationΟΛre Patienten und fΟΦhrt ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen durch. Um unser Team im Medical Assessment Service (SAM) in Bellinzona zu vervollstΟΛndigen, suchen wir einen Psychiater und Psychotherapeuten als Gutachter SAM. Profil: Die von uns gesuchte Person hat Berufserfahrung und Autonomie und ist motiviert, in einem Team zu arbeiten und einen Ausbildungsweg im peritialen Bereich zu verfolgen. Anforderungen: Der von uns gesuchte Arzt muss Folgendes besitzen: einen medizinischen Abschluss und eine Spezialisierung in Psychiatrie und Psychotherapie (fΟΦr auslΟΛndische Titel muss die MEBEKO-Anerkennung vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit erworben werden). Er muss auch seine Sprachkenntnisse in Italienisch (mindestens Niveau B2) vor Beginn in Medreg registriert haben, gemΟΛΟü den neuen LPMed-Bestimmungen, die seit dem 1. Januar 2018 in Kraft sind; ein Zeugnis der freien AusΟΦbung im Kanton Tessin, das vor Beginn bei unserem Institut erworben wurde; ausgezeichnete relationale FΟΛhigkeiten und Teamarbeit; ein Organisationstalent. Erfahrung im peritialen Bereich und eine ausgezeichnete Beherrschung des Deutschen und anderer nationaler Sprachen werden als bevorzugt angesehen. Die Hauptaufgaben, die der Arzt ausfΟΦhren muss, sind: die Erstellung von psychiatrischen Gutachten in italienischer Sprache; die Diktierung von medizinischen Berichten; die umfassende Sammlung von Anamnesen; eine grΟΦndliche klinische Untersuchung; die multidisziplinΟΛre Diskussion des Falls mit den beteiligten Fachleuten; die Diskussion von vorherigen Gutachten und umstrittenen Punkten in den Akten; die Erstellung der medizinischen Gutachten mit klaren und prΟΛzisen Antworten auf alle Gutachterfragen; die Einhaltung der Liefertermine des Gutachtens und der QualitΟΛtskriterien des Gutachtens. Eintrittsdatum: nach Vereinbarung. descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare by caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application. Assistant Physician in Training Profile: The person we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy, as well as motivation, initiative, and a collaborative spirit. Like us, they believe in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. Requirements: Degree in Medicine and Surgery (or equivalent); for foreign-trained doctors, recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg is mandatory before starting work. Proven knowledge of Italian (level B2 or higher) with registration with MedReg before starting work. Good knowledge of another national language (French, German) and/or English is desirable but not essential. Candidates with experience in Switzerland will be preferred. Observations: Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. Candidate evaluation will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, please send your application.

descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. With the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to the human relationship, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Surgery Services of the Hospitals of Lugano, Mendrisio, Locarno, and Bellinzona collaborate in the clinical training of medical assistants in training and consequently in the recruitment of new candidates. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as an Assistant Surgeon at the regional hospitals of Lugano, Mendrisio, Locarno, Bellinzona. The person we are looking for must have motivation, initiative, and a collaborative spirit. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attentions. Required qualifications include a diploma in human medicine (for foreign titles, recognition by the Federal Commission of Medical Professions Mebeko is required before starting the activity); registration in the Medical Professions Register MedReg; knowledge of the Italian language, according to the provisions of the LPMed in force from January 1, 2018; knowledge of a second national Swiss language (German or French, preferably at level B2). Knowledge of the functioning and requirements of the Swiss training pathway (Surgery | SIWF). Observations: Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will therefore be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of needs of the individual services. No negative responses will be given, but the candidate will be contacted directly by the medical secretariat in case of a positive match for a vacant position. The candidate can express a preference for the place of application and interest in an experience in surgery within another pathway or the desire for a complete training in surgery. In case of employment and possible inclusion in a training pathway (Training Network in Surgery - Cantonal Hospital Enterprise (eoc.ch)), rotations between the various sites, in department, specialized surgical rotations (vascular, plastic, urology), Emergency Room, Intensive Care will be provided. EOC - Together to care better. Interested?
descriptionByLocale.de: Das EOC, das Mehrstandort-Krankenhaus des Kantons Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten Kantonsgebiet vertreten und bietet insgesamt 1000 Betten. Die von uns gesuchte Person sollte motiviert, initiativ und teamfΟΛhig sein. Sie glaubt wie wir an die Bedeutung, den Patienten und seine Familie in den Mittelpunkt all unserer BemΟΦhungen zu stellen. Die erforderlichen Qualifikationen sind ein Diplom in Humanmedizin (fΟΦr auslΟΛndische Titel ist die Anerkennung durch die Bundeskommission der medizinischen Berufe Mebeko vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit erforderlich); Eintragung im Register der medizinischen Berufe MedReg; Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache gemΟΛss den Bestimmungen der LPMed in Kraft seit dem 1. Januar 2018; Kenntnisse einer zweiten nationalen Schweizsprache (Deutsch oder FranzΟΕsisch, vorzugsweise auf Stufe B2). Kenntnisse ΟΦber die Funktionsweise und Anforderungen des Schweizer Ausbildungswegs (Chirurgie | SIWF). Bemerkungen: Bewerbungen von Kandidaten, die die obigen Anforderungen nicht erfΟΦllen, werden nicht berΟΦcksichtigt und somit aus unserer Datenbank gelΟΕscht. Die Bewertung der Bewerbungen erfolgt nur bei Bedarf der einzelnen Dienste. Es werden keine negativen Antworten gegeben, sondern der Kandidat wird direkt vom medizinischen Sekretariat bei einem positiven Match fΟΦr eine freie Stelle kontaktiert. Der Kandidat kann eine PrΟΛferenz fΟΦr den Bewerbungsort und Interesse an einer Erfahrung in der Chirurgie innerhalb eines anderen Weges oder den Wunsch nach einer vollstΟΛndigen Ausbildung in der Chirurgie ΟΛuΟüern. descriptionByLocale.en: Description The EOC (Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale) is a multisite hospital in Ticino with a total of 1,000 beds, present throughout the canton. Our organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, providing the population with a comprehensive and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Tasks The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Medical Assistant in Training - Gynecology and Obstetrics. ## Profile The person we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy, as well as motivation, initiative, and a collaborative spirit. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. We offer a modern and dynamic work environment and the opportunity to work with highly motivated and prepared employees. ## Requirements - Degree/diploma in medicine and surgery (or equivalent title); - For foreign doctors, recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting work is required. - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with registration with MedReg before starting work. - Good knowledge of another national language besides Italian (French, German) and possibly English. ## Preferences - Candidates with experience gained in Switzerland will be preferred. ## Entry Date - According to needs. ## Important Information - Applications from those who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. - Evaluation of applications will only be done in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. ## Contact EOC - our hospital. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, Ticino's multisite hospital, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring a global and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients annually and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. IOSI is one of the main centers for clinical cancer research in Switzerland, with extensive experience in designing and conducting clinical studies. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the Clinical Research Unit of the Institute of Oncology of Southern Switzerland as a Clinical Research Nurse (80-100%). The person we are looking for has a recognized CRS diploma and knows both spoken and written English in addition to Italian. Experience in oncology and computer skills are desirable. They manage phase I to III clinical trials and research projects in collaboration with the laboratory. The future collaborator is able to respond flexibly to stimuli and manage stress in difficult situations; they can work both independently and in a multidisciplinary team. They make appropriate care decisions, achieving excellent results with their knowledge and skills; thanks to their communication skills, they can establish and maintain effective relationships with patients and their families, earning their trust. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention and are committed to their own continuous improvement. They believe in clinical research in the field of oncology as a tool to offer better care to patients. For further information, please contact Mrs. Laura Moser, Head Nurse of Clinical Research, at 091 811 82 60. Paper or email applications will not be accepted. Candidate evaluation will only be done in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - Our Hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, please submit your application.

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a 1,000-bed hospital with multiple sites across the Ticino canton. Our organization combines local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is open to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as an Orthopedic Surgery Chief Physician. Profile The Orthopedic-Surgical Traumatology Service of the Regional Hospital of Lugano is the cantonal center for polytraumatized patients (MAS) and covers the entire spectrum of traumatology and orthopedics, including complex cases throughout the canton. The service is recognized by the SIWF for the training of assistants in traumatology and orthopedics of the locomotor apparatus as B1, collaborates with several university centers and hosts a Master's degree in Biomedicine since 2020. Requirements The position requires a medical degree and specialization in orthopedics and traumatology of the locomotor apparatus* or equivalent title and registration with MedReg before the start of work ((https://www.medregom.admin.ch)). For doctors with foreign titles, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg (https://www.medregom.admin.ch) before the start of work is mandatory. Proven knowledge of the Italian language (level required at least B2) with registration with MedReg (https://www.medregom.admin.ch) before the start of work, desired knowledge of other national languages and English. Observations --> Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Head of the endocrinology clinic - Ausschreibung The EOC, the multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization makes it possible to effectively combine local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of its more than 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare by caring for more than 41,000 inpatients per year and providing more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Head Physician of Endocrinology Profile The EOC endocrinology and diabetology service guarantees, as its primary mission, specialized care for the entire Canton of Ticino and is therefore present in all the institute's locations. The service is also active at an academic level, within the Faculty of Biomedical Sciences of the UniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana, and develops and takes care of research projects also in collaboration with external institutes. At the EOC headquarters in Lugano, the service is located at the Italian Hospital where specialist visits are carried out daily with particular reference to thyroid/parathyroid diseases and diabetes. The service also collaborates in the management of patients hospitalized at the Civic Hospital with ad hoc consultations. The doctor works independently and at an interdisciplinary level, promoting the skills required by the function of the head physician. Necessary requirements: degree/diploma in medicine and qualification of specialization in endocrinology or equivalent and related registration with MedReg before starting work. For doctors with foreign qualifications, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and corresponding registration with MedReg are required before the start of the activity; proven knowledge of the Italian language (at least B2 level required) with relative registration with MedReg before the start of the activity, knowledge of other national languages and English is desired; mastery of IT means. Remarks --> Applications from those who do not meet the above requirements will not be taken into consideration under any circumstances and will consequently be deleted from our database. The evaluation of applications will be made only in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information is released. EOC - our hospital. Interested?
descriptionByLocale.de: Leiter der endokrinologischen Klinik βÄ™ Ausschreibung Das EOC, das Mehrfachkrankenhaus im Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten im gesamten Kantonsgebiet mit insgesamt 1.000 Betten prΟΛsent. Profil der EOC-Endocrinologie- und Diabetologie-Service garantiert als Hauptaufgabe spezialisierte Versorgung fΟΦr den gesamten Kanton Tessin und ist daher an allen Standorten des Instituts prΟΛsent. Der Dienst ist auch auf akademischer Ebene innerhalb der FakultΟΛt fΟΦr Biomedizinische Wissenschaften der UniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana aktiv und entwickelt sowie betreut Forschungsprojekte, die ebenfalls in Zusammenarbeit mit externen Instituten durchgefΟΦhrt werden. descriptionByLocale.en: Head of Urology Clinic - Job Posting The EOC (Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale) is a multi-site hospital in Ticino, Switzerland, with a total of 1,000 beds and a presence throughout the canton. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, providing the population with a comprehensive and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Head of Urology Clinic. Profile: The Urology Department of the Regional Hospital of Lugano represents a service in full expansion with an ambitious growth plan at the cantonal and national levels. Requirements: - Essential requirements: * Medical degree/diploma and specialization in urology with registration in MedReg before starting work. * For foreign titles: mandatory recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration in MedReg before starting work. * Proven knowledge of Italian (level B2 or higher) with registration in MedReg before starting work. * Desirable knowledge of English. * Work experience in urology departments, with a particular focus on robotic and minimally invasive surgery. * Documented clinical research activity with international training experience. * Autonomy in taking charge of urological patients. * Strong availability and propensity for teamwork. * Constructive and proactive attitude. * Mastery of computer skills. Remarks: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be done in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Head of ENT Clinic - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Head of ENT Clinic. Profile: The doctor works autonomously and at an interdisciplinary level, promoting the skills required by the function of Head of Clinic. Requirements: - Degree/diploma in medicine and specialization in ENT or equivalent and relative registration with MedReg before the start of work. - For foreign doctors, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and relative registration with MedReg before the start of work is required. - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with relative registration with MedReg before the start of work. - Desirable knowledge of other national languages and English. - Proven experience in managing medical and surgical emergencies in ENT. - Good relational, communication and interest in the development of the ENT Service. - Mastery of computer tools. - Interest in clinical research. Remarks: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. descriptionByLocale.en: Head of Intensive Care Medicine - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes across the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Head of Intensive Care Medicine. Profile The Intensive Care Unit of the Lugano Regional Hospital is the only department in the canton recognized by the FMH as a category A training center, awarded for three consecutive years (2014, 2015 and 2019) the prestigious SIWF-Award of the FMH for its particular commitment in the training field. Requirements: - Degree/diploma in medicine and surgery and specialization in intensive care or equivalent title (for Italy specialization in Anesthesia and Resuscitation) with relative registration to MedReg before the start of work activity. - For foreign title holders: compulsory recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and relative registration to MedReg before the start of work activity. - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with relative registration to MedReg before the start of work activity. - Desirable knowledge of other national languages and English. - Working experience in intensive care units. - Autonomy in taking charge of the critical patient in intensive care. - Strong availability and propensity for teamwork. - Constructive and proactive attitude. - Availability to carry out part of one's activity at the Intensive Medicine Department of the Mendrisio Regional Hospital if necessary. - Mastery of computer means. Remarks: The candidatures of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of candidatures will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released.
descriptionByLocale.de: Leiter Intensivmedizin - Stellenausschreibung Die EOC, das Mehrstandortkrankenhaus von Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Betten prΟΛsent. Dank des Engagements und der Kompetenz von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr menschliche Beziehungen bietet die EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem sie sich um ΟΦber 41.000 stationΟΛre Patienten pro Jahr kΟΦmmert und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen durchfΟΦhrt. Die folgende Position richtet sich an Kandidaten, die eine spontane Bewerbung als Leiter Intensivmedizin einreichen mΟΕchten. Profil Die Intensivstation des Regionalkrankenhauses Lugano ist die einzige Abteilung im Kanton, die von der FMH als Ausbildungszentrum der Kategorie A anerkannt ist. Sie wurde drei Jahre in Folge (2014, 2015 und 2019) mit dem renommierten SIWF-Award der FMH fΟΦr ihr besonderes Engagement im Ausbildungsbereich ausgezeichnet. Anforderungen: - Diplom in Medizin und Chirurgie und Spezialisierung in Intensivmedizin oder gleichwertiger Titel (fΟΦr Italien: Spezialisierung in AnΟΛsthesie und Wiederbelebung) mit entsprechender Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit. - FΟΦr Inhaber eines auslΟΛndischen Titels: obligatorische Anerkennung durch die Bundeskommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und entsprechende Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit. - Nachweisliche Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (erforderliches Niveau: mindestens B2) mit entsprechender Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit. - WΟΦnschenswerte Kenntnisse anderer nationaler Sprachen und Englisch. - Berufserfahrung in Intensivstationen. - Autonomie bei der Betreuung von kritisch kranken Patienten. - Starke VerfΟΦgbarkeit und Neigung zur Teamarbeit. - Konstruktive und proaktive Einstellung. - VerfΟΦgbarkeit, einen Teil der eigenen TΟΛtigkeit in der Intensivmedizin des Regionalkrankenhauses Mendrisio bei Bedarf auszufΟΦhren. - Beherrschung von Computer-Mitteln. Bemerkungen: Die Bewerbungen von Personen, die die oben genannten Anforderungen nicht erfΟΦllen, werden nicht berΟΦcksichtigt und aus unserer Datenbank gelΟΕscht. Die Bewertung der Bewerbungen erfolgt nur bei Bedarf. Da es sich um eine Stelle fΟΦr spontane Bewerbungen handelt, werden keine telefonischen AuskΟΦnfte erteilt.

The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as an Assistant ENT Doctor. jobs.description: Medico capoclinica anestesia - Ausschreibung LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie allβÄôimpegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti allβÄôanno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali. La seguente posizione Ο® rivolta ai candidati che desiderano inoltrare una candidatura spontanea quale Medico capoclinica anestesia Profilo Il servizio di anestesia dellβÄôOspedale Regionale di Lugano Ο® l'unico in Ticino riconosciuto dalla FMH come centro di formazione di livello A2 (3 anni) per l'acquisizione del titolo di specialista. I collaboratori del servizio gestiscono annualmente oltre 6'000 pazienti per un totale di 12'000 ore di anestesia. Offriamo tutti i tipi di anestesia necessari allo spettro di interventi svolti presso lβÄôOspedale Regionale di Lugano, quali: chirurgia generale, chirurgia viscerale, neurochirurgia, ortopedia e traumatologia, chirurgia vascolare, bariatrica, chirurgia epatobiliare, ginecologia e ostetricia, urologia, otorinolaringoiatria, chirurgia plastica, chirurgia della mano, gastroenterologia e neuroradiologia interventistica. Requisiti indispensabili: laurea/diploma in medicina e chirurgia e specializzazione in Anestesia o titolo equivalente (per lβÄôItalia specializzazione in Anestesia e Rianimazione) con relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dellβÄôinizio dellβÄôattivitΟ† lavorativa . Per medici con titoli esteri : Ο® richiesto obbligatoriamente il riconoscimento da parte della Commissione federale per le professioni mediche MEBEK O comprovata conoscenza della lingua italiana ( livello richiesto almeno B2 ) con relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ† , auspicata conoscenza delle altre lingue nazionali e dellβÄôinglese esperienza lavorativa nei reparti di Anestesia autonomia nella presa a carico del paziente critico in sala operatoria forte disponibilitΟ† e propensione al lavoro di squadra atteggiamento costruttivo e propositivo padronanza dei mezzi informatici. --> Osservazioni: Le candidature di coloro che non possiedono i requisiti sopraindicati non saranno prese in alcun caso in considerazione e di conseguenza verranno eliminate dalla nostra banca dati. descriptionByLocale.en: Head of Anesthesia Department - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Head of Anesthesia Department. Profile The anesthesia service of the Regional Hospital of Lugano is the only one in Ticino recognized by the FMH as a level A2 training center (3 years) for acquiring the title of specialist. The service's collaborators manage over 6,000 patients annually for a total of 12,000 hours of anesthesia. We offer all types of anesthesia necessary for the spectrum of interventions carried out at the Regional Hospital of Lugano, such as: general surgery, visceral surgery, neurosurgery, orthopedics and traumatology, vascular surgery, bariatric surgery, hepatobiliary surgery, gynecology and obstetrics, urology, otorhinolaryngology, plastic surgery, hand surgery, gastroenterology, and interventional neuroradiology. Requirements: - Essential requirements: * Degree/diploma in medicine and surgery and specialization in Anesthesia or equivalent title (for Italy, specialization in Anesthesia and Resuscitation) with relative registration with MedReg before starting work. * For foreign doctors: compulsory recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEK or proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with relative registration with MedReg before starting work. * Desired knowledge of other national languages and English. * Work experience in Anesthesia departments. * Autonomy in taking charge of critical patients in the operating room. * Strong availability and propensity for teamwork. * Constructive and proactive attitude. * Mastery of computer tools. Observations: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Intensive Care Assistant Physician - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Intensive Care Assistant Physician. Profile The Intensive Care Service of Sottoceneri is composed of the intensive care units of Lugano (16 beds) and Mendrisio (6 beds). The intensive care service of the Lugano Regional Hospital is the only department in the canton recognized by the FMH as a category A training center, awarded for two consecutive years (2014, 2015, and 2019) the prestigious SIWF-Award of the FMH for its particular commitment in the training field. Requirements: - Essential requirements: - Degree/diploma in medicine and surgery. - For foreign title holders: recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting work. - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2), with registration with MedReg before starting work. - Desirable knowledge of another national language and English. - Work experience in intensive care units, internal medicine, or anesthesiology. - Strong availability and propensity for teamwork. - Constructive and proactive attitude. - Mastery of computer tools. - Available to work for 6 months in Lugano and 6 months in Mendrisio. Remarks: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Anesthesia Assistant Physician - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes across the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Anesthesia Assistant Physician. Profile The anesthesia service of the Regional Hospital of Lugano is the only service in the canton recognized by the FMH as a category A2 training center. The person we are looking for has professional experience as well as motivation, initiative, collaboration spirit, works autonomously and at an interdisciplinary level, promoting the skills required by the function of Assistant Physician. Believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. Requirements: - Essential requirements: - Degree/diploma in medicine and surgery. - For foreign title holders: compulsory recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEK or proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with registration in MedReg before starting work. - Desirable knowledge of other national languages and English. - Desirable experience of at least 1 year of Intensive Care or 1 year in Internal Medicine in a Swiss hospital of type A or B (http://www.registre-ifm.ch/default.aspx). - Strong availability and propensity for teamwork. - Constructive and proactive attitude. - Mastery of computer tools. Remarks: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino with 1,000 beds across the cantonal territory. The organization combines local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare to 380,000 patients per year. The following position is addressed to doctors who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the Hospitals of the Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale as a Pulmonology Assistant Physician. The doctor works autonomously and interdisciplinarily, promoting the required skills for the Assistant Physician function. Requirements The doctor must have a medical degree, and for doctors with foreign titles, it is mandatory to have recognition from the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg (https://www.medregom.admin.ch) before starting activity. Proven knowledge of the Italian language with registration with MedReg before starting activity (B2 level required), and written and spoken knowledge of at least one of the other national languages (French and/or German) and English are also required. Previous work experience in a discipline related to pneumology (e.g. internal medicine, thoracic surgery, anesthesiology, intensive care, cardiology) is also desired. Initiative, strong relational and communicative skills, organizational skills, and predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration are also required. Flexibility and a positive attitude, pleasure in working in a team, and collaborating across departments are also desired. Proficiency in IT tools. Observations --> Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. Candidate evaluation will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a spontaneous application position, no phone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Medical Assistant Geriatrics - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to doctors who wish to submit a spontaneous application for the Sottocenerino Geriatrics Service, sites Regional Hospital of Lugano and Regional Hospital of Mendrisio, as a Medical Assistant Geriatrics. Profile: The doctor works autonomously and at an interdisciplinary level, promoting the skills required by the function of Medical Assistant. Requirements: - Degree/diploma in medicine; - For foreign doctors, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg (https://www.medregom.admin.ch) before starting work is mandatory. - Proven knowledge of the Italian language with registration with MedReg before starting work (required level B2). - Knowledge of other national languages and English is desirable. - Initiative spirit, excellent relational and communication skills. - Organizational skills and predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration. - Flexibility and positive attitude, pleasure in working in a team and collaborating at a transversal level. - Mastery of computer tools. Observations: - The applications of those who do not possess the above requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - The evaluation of applications will only be done in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Cook and/or Diet Cook - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Cook and/or Diet Cook. Profile: The future collaborator has excellent technical-professional skills. He/she performs all operational activities of the sector in compliance with defined programs, norms, and work procedures. He/she effectively organizes his/her work by defining priorities. He/she is a available person, oriented to change, and is able to respond to solicitations. He/she handles important workloads with promptness and seriousness, maintaining good relations in a multicultural context. Requirements: - Federal certificate of competence as a cook and/or diet cook. - Multiyear professional experience, matured in an analogous position in public or private organizations of medium/large size. - Excellent knowledge of current hygiene regulations (HACCP). - Availability for flexible working hours (7/7 and evenings until 10:00 PM). - Autonomy and flexibility. - Initiative spirit, reliability, and creativity. - Excellent knowledge of spoken and written Italian. - Good knowledge of the main computer means (Office package). Entry date and observations: --> There are currently no vacant positions, and therefore, no entry date is foreseen. The evaluation of applications will only be carried out in case of service needs with profiles that correspond to the required requirements. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released. Only applications submitted through the company's website platform will be considered. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Medical Assistant - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the Cardiocentro Ticino Institute as a Medical Assistant. Profile The person we are looking for must have motivation, initiative and collaboration spirit. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. Requirements: - Degree/diploma in medicine; - In case of foreign title, obligatory recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and relative registration with MedReg before starting work; - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with relative registration with MedReg before starting work; - Good knowledge of at least one other national language (German or French) and English; - High mastery of computer means; - Flexibility and positive attitude, pleasure in working in a team and collaborating at an interdisciplinary level; - Predisposition to growth both professionally and personally; - Flexibility and organizational availability concerning work-life balance (shift work, holidays, etcβÄΠ). In the application, the field of specialization in which the medical assistant has an interest in training and working and the period in which they are available must be indicated. Observations: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements and/or do not specify the specialty of interest will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information is released. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Assistant Psychologist for Cantonal Qualification (80%) - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes across the entire cantonal territory, with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, providing the population with a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as an Assistant Psychologist for cantonal qualification (80%). Profile: The internship is aimed at psychologists with a master's degree or license who need to carry out clinical practice as an assistant psychologist to obtain the certificate of free exercise of the psychologist's activity in the health sector in the Canton of Ticino. Requirements: - Master's degree, license or diploma in psychology according to Art.2 LPPsi, or only in EU countries: foreign title + possible state authorization + title recognition by the Federal Office of Public Health PsiCo; - Predisposition to human contact, motivation to work with patients, communicative skills and flexibility; - Predisposition to work in a multidisciplinary team; - Ability to contact, relate and work, both autonomously and in a team; - Excellent knowledge of spoken and written Italian and possibly a second national language; - Essential knowledge of the main computer tools (Office package); - Knowledge of the territory and the socio-health network of the Canton of Ticino. Entry date: depending on service availability. Observations: Candidates are asked to attach an updated curriculum vitae, a letter of presentation with specified specialist training and any certificates from previous employers. Further documentation (e.g. judicial record extract and self-certification of health status) may be requested at a later stage. The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be carried out in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino with 1,000 beds across the cantonal territory. The organization combines local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare to 380,000 patients per year. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Kitchen Assistant at the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) in Novaggio. The future collaborator performs, under specific directives from the superior and in accordance with pre-defined work programs, procedures, and hygiene rules (e.g. HACCP regulations), all necessary operational activities within the kitchen. They have a propensity for teamwork, but are also able to work independently. They are able to support our chefs in specific tasks assigned to them. A flexible, available, precise, punctual, and versatile person. Required experience in kitchens, offices, or the hospitality sector in similar functions. Knowledge of cleaning and hygiene techniques. Availability to work shifts, including holidays. Orientation towards change and development, and continuous improvement. Observations: Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. Candidate evaluation will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a spontaneous application position, no phone information will be provided. EOC βÄ™ together to care better. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Transport Officer - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care to 380,000 patients per year. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Transport Officer. Profile The future collaborator acts in a multidisciplinary context. He/she performs all operational activities of the sector, in compliance with defined work procedures (times, modalities), aimed at guaranteeing the internal transport of patients between the clinic's departments. Possessing relational and organizational skills, he/she is able to autonomously manage important workloads, coordinating with great collaboration spirit the activities with the various clinic services to meet the patients' needs. A discreet, flexible person, shows availability, precision and punctuality. Requirements βÄΔ Good organizational skills βÄΔ Excellent relational-communicative skills βÄΔ Availability for shift work βÄΔ Orientation to change and self-development βÄΔ Excellent knowledge of the Italian language βÄΔ Knowledge of common computer tools Observations --> The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released. EOC - our hospital Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare assistance to 380,000 patients per year. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Maintenance Technician (Electrician). Profile The person we are looking for will work in a modern and dynamic work environment. For this interesting position, we are looking for a balanced personality with outstanding manual skills, technical and organizational skills, initiative spirit, flexibility, motivation to work in a team, able to manage their emotions in difficult and emergency situations, able to take responsibility and interested in individually investing to acquire new specialized skills. Required qualifications Federal certificate of competence in a technical profession, preferably as an electrician, SOA training certificate as a specialist in maintenance or at least 5 years of practical experience in the exercise and maintenance of hospital buildings and/or complex industrial infrastructure. A title of preference is also constituted by other professional knowledge in non-strictly related fields (electricity, automation, RCVS, carpentry, building, etc.). It is also desirable to have knowledge of a second national language, in addition to Italian. Solid computer skills (MS Office environment) are required. Availability to work on shifts, outside working hours and to perform night watch duties. Observations --> Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will be made only in case of service needs. Given that this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be provided. Observations: Due to the persistence of the delicate pandemic situation and to protect our patients and collaborators, the EOC General Management has decided that from September 13, 2021, all new hires (healthcare and non-healthcare personnel) will be required to provide an attestation of having completed the anti-Covid vaccination cycle. This attestation will be an indispensable requirement for hiring. EOC - our hospital Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Medical Assistant Ophthalmology - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Medical Assistant Ophthalmology. Profile: The Ophthalmology service of the Institute of Clinical Neurosciences of Italian Switzerland (INSI) is recognized as a category C training center. The suitable candidate will be employed within a young and motivated team, carrying out clinical, surgical, research, and training activities, as well as organizational assignments. Requirements: - Degree/diploma in medicine and related registration with MedReg before the start of work. - For foreign doctors, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and related registration with MedReg before the start of work is required. - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with related registration with MedReg before the start of work. - Desirable knowledge of other national languages and English. - Desirable one year of non-specific clinical training experience (Fremdjahr/Formation postgraduΟ©e non spΟ©cifique). - Desirable minimal experience in clinical research. - Mastery of computer tools. Remarks: - The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - The evaluation of applications will only be done in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application ¬Μ

The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Social Health Operator. Required qualifications: Federal Certificate of Competence (FCC) as a Social Health Operator. Predisposition for a quality service oriented to the patient, for interdisciplinary collaboration within the team and for transparent communication. Excellent knowledge of spoken and written Italian and possibly a second national language. Essential knowledge of the main computer tools (Office package). Notes --> Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered in any case and will therefore be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information is provided.

descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring a comprehensive and accessible hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. With the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application at the Mendrisio Regional Hospital as a Head of Clinic - Anesthesiology. The doctor works autonomously and interdisciplinary, promoting the skills required for the role of Head of Clinic. They will be part of the team active in anesthesia for surgical interventions and extra operating room activities. Requirements: FMH title in Anesthesiology or an equivalent title. For doctors with foreign titles, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg is mandatory before starting work. Proven knowledge of Italian (level B2 or higher) is required. Initiative; strong relational and communication skills. Organizational skills and a predisposition for interdisciplinary collaboration. Flexibility and a positive attitude, pleasure in working in a team and collaborating cross-functionally. Note: Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. Candidate evaluation will only be done in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided.

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients annually and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to Mendrisio Regional Hospital as a Medical Intern - Internal Medicine. The intern will work in the Internal Medicine department, supporting and assisting the assigned attending physician. Rotations are planned within the Services of Geriatrics, Emergency Room, Nephrology, and Dialysis. Requirements include: Enrollment in a medical faculty of a Swiss or foreign university. Candidates from the 4th to the 6th year of studies are accepted. No degree or medical license obtained yet. Good human contact skills, motivation to work with patients, communication skills, and flexibility. Excellent spoken and written Italian and possibly a second national language. Knowledge of the main computer tools (Office package). Start date: Depends on the availability of positions (maximum 2 and/or 3 medical candidates per month). N.B.: In Internal Medicine, internships of a minimum of 2 months and a maximum of 3 are organized. Please specify the desired period in the motivation letter. Only candidates who meet the above requirements will be considered. The evaluation of candidatures will be made only in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous candidatures, no telephone information will be provided.

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relations, EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Food Service Assistant. The ideal candidate for this position has good knowledge of the Italian language, both spoken and written, knows the hygiene norms and procedures in place within the kitchen (HACCP rules) and those related to the materials and equipment to be used. Experience in a similar position at medium/large-sized hospitals is considered an asset. The candidate is attentive to meeting the expectations and requests of both internal and external clients and can establish effective and constructive relationships. They are dedicated to their personal and continuous improvement and are open to change and development. They are precise, organized, and punctual in their work and have a propensity for teamwork as well as the ability to work autonomously. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attentions and are dedicated to their personal and active improvement. Only candidates who meet the above requirements will be considered. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided.

descriptionByLocale.en: Neurosurgery Assistant Doctor - Job Posting The EOC, a multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present throughout the cantonal territory with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a comprehensive and proximity-based hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures high-quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Neurosurgery Assistant Doctor. Profile The neurosurgery clinic (A-Klinik) of the Neurocenter of Italian Switzerland offers high-level neurosurgical treatments for cranial and spinal pathologies with modern technical support, such as intraoperative monitoring and imaging (O-Arm, CT Airo, Navigation, Ultrasonography). There is intense collaboration with other services of the Neurocenter of Italian Switzerland: neuroradiology, neurology, neuroanesthesia, and the Stroke Center (MAS mandate). The neuro-oncology clinic, with which there is also close collaboration, deals with all neuro-oncological cases with cutting-edge treatments, including radio surgery. The neurosurgery clinic is responsible for all complex spinal cases in the canton of Ticino, including spinal traumatology in the context of the MAS mandate for polytrauma (www.eoc.ch/neurochirurgia/). Requirements A degree/diploma in medicine is required; in the case of a foreign title, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO is required. Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level: at least B2) and good knowledge of other national languages and English is necessary. Registration of professional titles and language skills in the Register of Medical Professions (https://www.medregom.admin.ch) is required, no later than 3 months after the start of activity. High proficiency in computer systems is also required. Notes Further information can be requested from the neurosurgery secretariat (+41(0)91 811 64 60). Applications must be complete with a curriculum vitae, letter of motivation, and copies of study and work certificates. Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be done in case of service needs. EOC - our hospital. Interested?
descriptionByLocale.de: Assistenzarzt fΟΦr Neurochirurgie - Stellenausschreibung Das EOC, ein multizentrisches Krankenhaus im Tessin, ist mit insgesamt 1.000 Betten im gesamten Kantonsgebiet prΟΛsent. Profil Die Neurochirurgie-Klinik (A-Klinik) des Neurozentrums der italienischen Schweiz bietet hochwertige neurochirurgische Behandlungen fΟΦr SchΟΛdel- und RΟΦckenmarksverletzungen mit moderner technischer UnterstΟΦtzung, wie intraoperativer Ο€berwachung und Bildgebung (O-Arm, CT Airo, Navigation, Ultraschall). Es besteht eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Diensten des Neurozentrums der italienischen Schweiz: Neuroradiologie, Neurologie, NeuroanΟΛsthesie und dem Stroke Center (MAS-Mandat). Die Neuro-Onkologie-Klinik, mit der es auch eine enge Zusammenarbeit gibt, beschΟΛftigt sich mit allen neuro-onkologischen FΟΛllen mit modernen Behandlungen, einschlieΟülich Radiochirurgie. Die Neurochirurgie-Klinik ist fΟΦr alle komplexen RΟΦckenmarksfΟΛlle im Kanton Tessin verantwortlich, einschlieΟülich der spinalen Traumatologie im Rahmen des MAS-Mandats fΟΦr Polytrauma (www.eoc.ch/neurochirurgia/). Anforderungen Ein Diplom/Abschluss in Medizin ist erforderlich; im Falle eines auslΟΛndischen Titels ist die Anerkennung durch die EidgenΟΕssische Kommission fΟΦr Medizinberufe MEBEKO erforderlich. Die Registrierung der beruflichen Titel und Sprachkenntnisse im Register der Medizinberufe (https://www.medregom.admin.ch) ist erforderlich, spΟΛtestens 3 Monate nach Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit. Eine hohe Kompetenz in Computersystemen ist auch erforderlich. Hinweise Weitere Informationen kΟΕnnen beim Sekretariat fΟΦr Neurochirurgie (+41(0)91 811 64 60) angefordert werden. Bewerbungen mΟΦssen vollstΟΛndig sein und ein Lebenslauf, ein Motivationsschreiben und Kopien der Studien- und Arbeitszeugnisse enthalten. Bewerbungen von Personen, die die oben genannten Anforderungen nicht erfΟΦllen, werden in keinem Fall berΟΦcksichtigt und aus unserer Datenbank eliminiert. Die Bewertung der Bewerbungen erfolgt nur im Falle von DienstbedΟΦrfnissen. EOC - unser Krankenhaus. Interessiert?

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the efficient combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Nursing Service of the Institute Oncologico della Svizzera Italiana employs around 130 collaborators divided between the departments and outpatient clinics of the 4 sites (Bellinzona, Locarno, Lugano and Mendrisio) in a context of relationship-based care. ## Requirements - The person suited to the function is a nurse in possession of a diploma recognized by the CRS - Has a strong interest in the pediatric field - Possesses excellent relational, communication and availability to interdisciplinary work - Is collaborative and has a good predisposition to work in a team - Has good organizational skills and is able to manage their work autonomously, paying particular attention to the observance of order and procedures - Is characteristically dynamic and proactive - Good knowledge of computer tools completes the profile ## What we offer - Believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention - Dedicates themselves personally and actively to their continuous improvement ## Contact - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database - The evaluation of applications will be made only in case of service needs - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be released - EOC - together to care better - Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Description The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows an effective combination of a local approach and an overall vision, guaranteeing the population a comprehensive and nearby hospital offering, regardless of where services are needed. Thanks to the commitment and competence of more than 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures high-quality health care, caring for over 41,000 in-patients each year and providing more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. This position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application for Swiss Civil Service (various positions) (100%). ## Profile - Swiss civil service is performed as an alternative by those who, for reasons of conscience, cannot fulfill military obligations. - The duration of service performed by civil servants is one and a half times that of military service. - Civil servants fulfill their service obligation in more than 4,000 recognized employment institutions, providing work of public interest. - Currently it is possible to carry out the following types of employment (positions) at our employment institute: - a) Assistant social worker - b) Kitchen assistant - c) Nursing assistant - d) Worker assistant - e) Administrative work assistant - f) Medical-secretarial assistance - g) Medical candidate - h) Generic assistance collaborator - i) Generic IOSI collaborator ## Requirements - The necessary requirements are specific to each type of employment and can be verified at: https://www.ezivi.admin.ch/ivy/faces/instances/16A05C5A3B433712/MainPage.xhtml - Entry date: depending on service needs and availability - Applications from those who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be removed from our database. - Paper applications or those sent by email will not be accepted. ## Contact EOC - together to care better. Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ the multi-site hospital of Ticino is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the efficient combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Nursing Service of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valleys employs around 500 collaborators, divided among the various departments in the two locations (Bellinzona and Acquarossa) in a context of relationship-based care. The ideal person for the function is a registered nurse in possession of a diploma recognized by the CRS - Has a strong interest in the pediatric field - Possesses excellent relational and communication skills - Has a willingness to work interdisciplinarily - Is collaborative - Has a good predisposition to work in a team - Has good organizational skills - Is able to manage their work autonomously - Pays particular attention to the observance of order and procedures - Is dynamically and propositively characterized - Has good knowledge of computer tools We believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention - Dedicates themselves personally and actively to their continuous improvement Applicants who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database - The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be released - EOC βÄ™ together to care better - Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Description IT Specialist - Job Posting The EOC, a multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present throughout the cantonal territory with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity-based hospital offer, regardless of where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 employees and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures high-quality healthcare to 380,000 patients per year. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as an IT Specialist ## Profile The ICT Area (Informatics and Communication Technology) aims to manage and evolve the EOC's Information System. The basic task consists of managing and implementing adequate and suitable IT and communication solutions to meet the needs of users, both administrative, clinical, and research, within the limits set by financial and personnel planning. The activity is divided into several areas of competence: business intelligence, IT Governance, IT Operations, applications, and integrations, process development. ## Tasks - Maintenance of infrastructure, central systems, and distributed systems - Software development - User support - DBA ## Requirements - Federal certificate of competence in IT, diploma in IT management (SSIG), or higher - Excellent knowledge of standard IT applications such as Microsoft Office - Excellent organizational skills, precision, flexibility, and reliability - Good knowledge of national languages and English - Ability to work independently and in a team - ITIL Foundation certification or equivalent ## Notes - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database - Evaluation of applications will only be done in case of service needs - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided ## Contact EOC - together to care better. Interested?
