descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer for the population, regardless of where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to the human relationship, the EOC ensures quality healthcare by caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Medical Practice Assistant (Nursing Service). Profile The nursing service of Mendrisio Regional Hospital employs around 320 staff members, spread across different departments, in a context of relationship-based care. Requirements Federally recognized certificate as a medical practice assistant. Predisposition for a quality service oriented towards the patient, for interdisciplinary collaboration within the team, and for transparent communication. Excellent knowledge of spoken and written Italian and optionally a second national language. Essential knowledge of the main computer tools (Office package). Notes Candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered in any case and will therefore be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information is provided.

The organization combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to the human relationship, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a General Nurse (Diploma in Progress). Profile The nursing service of the Mendrisio Regional Hospital employs around 320 collaborators distributed in the various departments, in a context of care based on the relationship. This position is reserved for students of SUPSI, SSSCI or a SUP in other Swiss cantons who are completing their training and are looking for a job at the end of their studies as a general nurse. Requirements - Enrolled in the 3rd year of SUPSI, SSSCI or a SUP in other Swiss cantons. descriptionByLocale.en: The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines a local approach with an overview, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. With the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients a year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is for candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Swiss Civil Service βÄ™ Care Assistant. The Swiss Civil Service is performed as an alternative by those who, for reasons of conscience, cannot fulfill their military obligations. Further information can be found on the Swiss Civil Service website: https://www.zivi.admin.ch/zivi/en/home.html . The civil servant working in the hospital as a care assistant is mainly responsible for assisting patients and cleaning/tidying tasks. Required qualifications include Swiss nationality, motivation to work with patients, human contact skills, flexibility, and communication skills. Previous experience and/or training in the care sector is desirable or an interest in gaining experience in this area. The start date depends on the availability of positions in the various hospital departments. Notes --> Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. Candidate evaluation will only be done in case of service needs. Since this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information is provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? descriptionByLocale.en: Nursing Intern - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes across the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Nursing Intern. Profile: The internship is aimed at people interested in entering the nursing world and knowing the reality of a hospital. Requirements: - Predisposition to human contact, motivation to work with patients, communicative skills, and flexibility. - Excellent knowledge of spoken and written Italian and possibly a second national language. - Essential knowledge of the main computer tools (Office package). - Minimum age 16 years old. Entry date: Depending on the availability of places in the medicine and surgery departments. Remarks: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Swiss Civil Service βÄ™ Maintenance and Technical Service Assistant, Warehouse Assistant - Job Posting The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes across the entire canton for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as Swiss Civil Service βÄ™ Maintenance and Technical Service Assistant, Warehouse Assistant. Profile The Swiss civil service is performed on a substitute basis by those who, for reasons of conscience, cannot fulfill their military obligations. Further information can be found on the Swiss Civil Service website: https://www.zivi.admin.ch/zivi/en/home.html. The civil servant working in the hospital as a maintenance and technical service assistant supports the technical service in building maintenance, plant and equipment maintenance, and takes care of local tidying up. Requirements: - Swiss nationality - Attitude to human contact, cooperative spirit, and flexibility - For technical service, training in technical / craft field Entry date: Depending on the availability of technical service positions at the Hospital. Observations: The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be done in case of service needs. As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Swiss Civil Service (various roles) - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes across the entire canton, offering a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a comprehensive and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at civil servants who wish to submit a request within the framework of the Swiss Civil Service (various roles). Profile The Swiss civil service is performed on a substitute basis by those who, for reasons of conscience, cannot fulfill their military obligations. The duration of the service provided by civil servants is one and a half times that of military service. Civil servants fulfill their service obligation in over 4,000 recognized employment institutions, providing public interest work. Currently, it is possible to perform the following functions at our employment institution: - a) kitchen help - b) maintenance and technical service help - c) nursing auxiliary For the following role, availability is limited to the months from June to September: - d) warehouse help For further information, you can consult the website of the Swiss Civil Service (https://www.zivi.admin.ch/zivi/en/home.html). Requirements The following requirements are necessary for all roles: - Swiss nationality - registration with the Swiss Civil Service For the role of 'nursing auxiliary', it is necessary to have completed the following courses: - Communication and Assistance (KoBe) - Patient Care 1 (PFH 1) - Patient Care 2 (PFH 2) Remarks The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ
descriptionByLocale.de: Schweizerischer Zivildienst (verschiedene Rollen) - Stellenausschreibung Die EOC, das Mehrstandortkrankenhaus von Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten Kantonsgebiet prΟΛsent und bietet insgesamt 1.000 Betten an. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht eine effektive Kombination von lokaler Herangehensweise und Gesamtvision und gewΟΛhrleistet der BevΟΕlkerung ein umfassendes und wohnortnahes Krankenhausangebot, unabhΟΛngig davon, wo die Dienstleistungen benΟΕtigt werden. Dank des Engagements und der Kompetenz von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr menschliche Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet die EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem sie sich um ΟΦber 41.000 stationΟΛre Patienten pro Jahr kΟΦmmert und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen durchfΟΦhrt. Die folgende Stelle richtet sich an Zivildienstleistende, die eine Anfrage im Rahmen des Schweizerischen Zivildienstes (verschiedene Rollen) stellen mΟΕchten. Profil Der Schweizerische Zivildienst wird von Personen, die aus GewissensgrΟΦnden ihre militΟΛrischen Verpflichtungen nicht erfΟΦllen kΟΕnnen, als Ersatzleistung erbracht. Die Dauer des von Zivildienstleistenden erbrachten Dienstes ist eineinhalbmal so lang wie der MilitΟΛrdienst. Zivildienstleistende erfΟΦllen ihre Dienstverpflichtung in ΟΦber 4.000 anerkannten BeschΟΛftigungsinstitutionen und erbringen Arbeiten von ΟΕffentlichem Interesse. Derzeit kΟΕnnen die folgenden Funktionen bei unserer BeschΟΛftigungsinstitution ausgeΟΦbt werden: - a) KΟΦchenhilfe - b) Hilfe bei Instandhaltung und technischer Dienstleistung - c) Pflegehelfer FΟΦr die folgende Rolle ist die VerfΟΦgbarkeit auf die Monate Juni bis September beschrΟΛnkt: - d) Lagerhilfe FΟΦr weitere Informationen kΟΕnnen Sie die Website des Schweizerischen Zivildienstes konsultieren (https://www.zivi.admin.ch/zivi/de/home.html). Anforderungen FΟΦr alle Rollen sind die folgenden Anforderungen erforderlich: - Schweizer StaatsbΟΦrgerschaft - Registrierung beim Schweizerischen Zivildienst FΟΦr die Rolle des 'Pflegehelfers' mΟΦssen die folgenden Kurse absolviert worden sein: - Kommunikation und Betreuung (KoBe) - Patientenpflege 1 (PFH 1) - Patientenpflege 2 (PFH 2) Bemerkungen Bewerbungen von Personen, die die oben genannten Anforderungen nicht erfΟΦllen, werden in keinem Fall berΟΦcksichtigt und aus unserer Datenbank gelΟΕscht. EOC - unser Krankenhaus. Interessiert? Wenn Sie sich im Profil und in den gesuchten Werten wiedererkennen, senden Sie Ihre Bewerbung ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Operating Room Technician or Instrument Nurse - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team of the Operating Block of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli, we are looking for an Operating Room Technician or Instrument Nurse (80%-100%). Profile: The person we are looking for has a diploma in operating room technology (three-year TSO SSS training) or is a nurse with specialization in operating room technology with at least three years of work experience in the specific field of the operating room; has good knowledge in the use of the main computer means and knows, in addition to the Italian language, a second national language. The candidate is a person able to remain calm under pressure and in difficult situations, as well as being able to adapt to both planned work and emergencies. He/She is autonomous, has good communication and organizational skills, and has a predisposition to teamwork and interdisciplinary work. Furthermore, he/she is a flexible person with excellent adaptability to present and future changes. He/She believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and his/her family at the center of all our attention. Requirements: - Preference will be given to candidates already active at EOC Necessary Requirements: - Date of entry: to be agreed upon For further information, Mr. Claudio Tassone, head of the nursing sector of ORBV, is available at 091 811 8109. Applications must be received by April 24, 2026. No paper applications or applications via e-mail will be accepted. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: Physiotherapist - Job Posting The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes across the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team of the physiotherapy and occupational therapy service at the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) in Novaggio, we are looking for a Physiotherapist (80%) (temporary position of 1 year). Profile: The future physiotherapist is an action-oriented person and is able to establish effective and constructive relationships with internal and external customers. They have good listening skills and know how to carefully evaluate every situation before acting. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention and are committed to their personal development. Requirements: - Have obtained a physiotherapist diploma (if foreign, recognized by CRS), a training preferably matured in a hospital setting and have solid knowledge in rehabilitative physiotherapy. A training matured in respiratory physiotherapy is a highly recommended qualification. - Be adaptable, flexible, have a positive attitude; excellent knowledge of the main computer applications and national languages are essential requirements. Entry date: June 1, 2026 or to be agreed upon. Application and information: Applications, complete with curriculum vitae, copies of study and work certificates, must be submitted online by April 19, 2026, at http://www.eoc.ch/ -> Job opportunities -> Job offers. Consequently, applications sent by mail or email will not be considered, nor will applications that do not meet the required requirements. Further information can be requested from Mr. Daniel Rathlef, head of physiotherapy and occupational therapy of CREOC at the Novaggio site, at 091 811 26 88. EOC - our hospital. Interested? If you recognize yourself in the profile and the values sought, send your application ¬Μ

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 hospital beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Profile - organizes and manages multiple activities simultaneously in an autonomous and flexible manner, knowing how to establish priorities in an efficient and timely manner; - maintains a positive attitude even in complex situations, high stress, and unexpected events; - is able to work both autonomously and in teams; - possesses relational and communication skills. ## Required Requirements - nursing diploma (or equivalent recognized title); - intensive care specialist nurse certificate (ASI) or intensive care nurse diploma (SPD SSS) or Master's degree in Intensive Care Nursing, with recognized equivalence by the Swiss Society of Intensive Medicine; - proven professional experience of at least 2 years in an intensive care service of similar complexity; - in addition to Italian, it is desirable to know another national language; - essential knowledge of the main computer tools (Office package). ## What We Offer - quality healthcare; - dynamic and stimulating work environment; - opportunities for professional and personal growth. ## Contact - Complete applications, including curriculum vitae, motivation letter, copies of study and work certificates, must be sent by April 2, 2026 only in electronic format via the link below. - Applications that arrive after this date will not be considered, nor those sent in paper form, by email, or that do not meet the requirements indicated. - Further information can be requested from the intensive care department heads of the Civic Hospital, Simona Pertusini (simona.pertusini@eoc.ch) and/or Danira Righetti (danira.righetti@eoc.ch), and for the Cardiocentro Ticino Institute, Paola Rusca Grassellini (paola.ruscagrassellini@eoc.ch) head of the intensive care department.

April 2026 nur in elektronischer Form ΟΦber den untenstehenden Link gesendet werden. - AntrΟΛge, die nach dieser Frist eintreffen, werden nicht berΟΦcksichtigt, ebenso wie solche, die auf Papier, per E-Mail oder ohne ErfΟΦllung der angegebenen Anforderungen gesendet werden. - Weitere Informationen kΟΕnnen von den Leitern der Intensivpflege des Civic Hospitals, Simona Pertusini (simona.pertusini@eoc.ch) und/oder Danira Righetti (danira.righetti@eoc.ch), und fΟΦr das Cardiocentro Ticino-Institut, Paola Rusca Grassellini (paola.ruscagrassellini@eoc.ch) Leiterin der Intensivpflege, angefordert werden.

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is the hospital network of the Ticino region, present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team of Hospitality Services at the Lugano Regional Hospital, we are looking for a Capo Gruppo Servizio Pasti (100%) candidate. Profile: The ideal candidate has a solid experience in the structured catering sector, with a professional path assimilable to that of an experienced MaΟ°tre dβÄôHΟ¥tel. They have developed high skills in the operational management of the service, team coordination, and maintenance of high-quality standards, even in high-volume contexts. They transfer these skills to the healthcare sector, distinguishing themselves for a strong sensitivity towards the patient, understood as a person with specific needs and often in a state of fragility. They are able to combine hotel and clinical-organizational requirements, ensuring an efficient, safe, and quality-perceived meal service. The profile is completed by a strong operational leadership, organizational skills, and a problem-solving approach. Required qualifications: Hospitality/Catering training (AFC or equivalent title); Minimum 3-5 years of professional experience in similar or assimilable roles (e.g. MaΟ°tre dβÄôHΟ¥tel, restaurant manager); Proven experience in the operational management of teams; Knowledge of hygiene and sanitation regulations (HACCP); Ability to organize and manage service flows; Strong customer/patient orientation and relational sensitivity; Excellent communication and feedback/reclamation management skills; Ability to work in dynamic and high-operational-load contexts; Interdisciplinary collaboration skills (with healthcare staff and other services); Availability to work on shifts. Start date: June 1, 2026 or to be agreed. Application and information: Complete applications, including curriculum vitae, motivation letter, copies of study and work certificates, must be sent by April 6, 2026, only in electronic format through the website www.eoc.ch. Applications sent by post or email will not be considered, as will applications that do not meet the required requirements. Further information can be requested from Mrs. Tania Antoniou, Hospitality Services Manager (+41(0)91 811 62 72). EOC βÄ™ the hospital network of the Ticino region.

Er ist in der Lage, Hotel- und klinisch-organisatorische Anforderungen zu kombinieren, um ein effizientes, sicheres und qualitΟΛtsorientiertes Mahlzeitendienst zu gewΟΛhrleisten. descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is the multi-site hospital of Ticino, present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team of medical secretariats (internal medicine service) of the Mendrisio Regional Hospital, we are looking for an Administrative Assistant (70%-90%) Profile: The person we are looking for will join the secretariat of the Internal Medicine Department and will play a key role in supporting administrative and organizational activities to the clinical activity of doctors, both in terms of hospitalization and outpatient care. In close collaboration with the medical team, they will contribute to the smooth functioning of the department's activities, promoting an efficient management of administrative processes related to patient care, communication with treating doctors and other healthcare structures, as well as coordination of various activities. The selected person will also be involved in the organizational support of the outpatient clinics of the Primary and Vice-Primary of Medicine, contributing to the management of the patient's administrative pathway also in outpatient care. We are looking for a person with strong organizational skills, team work attitude, flexibility and initiative spirit. Good computer skills, ability to manage multiple activities simultaneously and willingness to learn new tasks are also required. Particular importance is given to the sensitivity in understanding the needs of internal and external users, sharing the commitment of our Hospital in putting the patient at the center of attention. Required requirements: Federal Certificate of Capacity (AFC) of Commercial Employee. Good knowledge of the use of computer tools (Office package). Mother tongue Italian or excellent knowledge of the Italian language. In addition, knowledge of at least one national language is desirable. Previous experience (minimum 1 year) in a similar position. Organizational skills, predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration in a continuous improvement perspective of the service. Initiative spirit, strong relational and communicative skills. Flexibility and positive attitude, pleasure to work in a team and to collaborate at a transversal and multidisciplinary level. Start date: to be agreed. Submission of applications and information: Applications, complete with curriculum vitae, should be sent to [insert contact information].

Besondere Bedeutung wird der SensibilitΟΛt fΟΦr die BedΟΦrfnisse der internen und externen Nutzer gegeben, indem man sich dem Engagement unseres Spitals anschlieΟüt, den Patienten in den Mittelpunkt der Aufmerksamkeit zu stellen. Initiativegeist, starke Beziehungs- und KommunikationsfΟΛhigkeiten. FlexibilitΟΛt und positives Verhalten, Freude an der Arbeit in einem Team und an der Zusammenarbeit auf transversaler und multidisziplinΟΛrer Ebene. Beginn: zu vereinbaren. descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multisite hospital in Ticino with its institutes present throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team in the Human Resources Area of the General Management, we are looking for an Organizational Specialist and HR Business Analyst (100%). Scope of the function: Support the Human Resources Area transversally, ensuring correct management of the company structure and supporting the continuous improvement of internal processes through the collection, analysis, and interpretation of HR data. Support the implementation of HR process digitalization projects, supporting the Human Resources Area in the adoption of change management tools. Main tasks and responsibilities: Analysis, management, and maintenance of the company structure in SAP (HCM / SuccessFactors) with related updates of organizational units, positions, roles, and reporting lines; Guarantee the quality, coherence, and integrity of HR data; Collection, analysis, and interpretation of personnel data to support the implementation of strategic decisions to improve performance, well-being, and organization; Collaboration with the Digital Evolution and Technology Area and other stakeholders on HR processes and integrations; Management and/or support of different phases of HR automation and digitalization projects to ensure that proposed solutions are aligned with identified needs; Coordination and management of the process of creating new functions and their related job descriptions at a transversal level; Management and promotion of continuous updating, organization, and archiving of documentation (Instructions, forms, directives) in the dedicated document management system for the Human Resources Area; Management of ad hoc proposals and initiatives related to the Human Resources Area. The candidate: Identifies with the values and mission of EOC; Establishes effective and constructive relationships with internal and external clients and colleagues, obtaining the trust of their interlocutors and committing to meet their needs; Works towards objectives and is result-oriented; Interacts with heterogeneous professional families aiming to reconcile interdisciplinarity and interprofessionalism. Required requirements: University education in economic or humanistic disciplines or information technology; At least 3 years of experience in HR or organizational development; Proficiency in SAP (HCM / SuccessFactors) and/or other HR systems; Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills; Excellent communication and interpersonal skills; Ability to work in a team and establish effective relationships with stakeholders; Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and adapt to changing priorities; Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information; Ability to work in a multicultural environment and adapt to different work styles; Fluency in English and/or other languages (German, French, Italian, etc.).

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present throughout the cantonal territory with its institutes for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valleys, located in Bellinzona, we are looking for a Receptionist/Operator (50%). Profile: The receptionist is the face and voice of the hospital, managing the front office and switchboard, ensuring orientation, clarity, and security for patients, visitors, and staff. We offer a structured and service-oriented professional environment, integration into a dynamic and collaborative team in a modern healthcare context, where reception is an integral part of care. The person we are looking for has a federal certificate of capacity as a hotel communication employee (AFC) or a federal certificate of capacity as a sales employee (AFC) with proven experience in the field of reception/acceptance. They have a perfect command of the Italian language, good knowledge of spoken and written German, French, and English (preferred title) as well as solid knowledge of the main IT applications (Office package and management systems). The future collaborator has strong relational and communication skills to ensure the best possible reception for patients and their families. They have marked skills in stress management and priorities as well as excellent organizational skills with a team-oriented and service-oriented attitude. They are a precise, reliable person with a strong sense of responsibility, flexible, and available to work shifts according to service needs (day, evening, and holiday shifts) in a variable schedule between 07:00 and 20:00. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. Start date: to be agreed. Further information can be requested from Mrs. Fiorella Leonardi at 091 811 91 11. Applications must be submitted to us by no later than March 31, 2026. No paper or email applications will be accepted.
descriptionByLocale.de: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, das Mehrfachkrankenhaus im Kanton Tessin, ist auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet mit seinen Instituten fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Betten vertreten. Um unser Team des Regionalen Krankenhauses Bellinzona und Valli in Bellinzona zu vervollstΟΛndigen, suchen wir einen Rezeptionist/Operator (50%). Profil: Der Rezeptionist ist das Gesicht und die Stimme des Krankenhauses, er verantwortet das Front Office und die Zentrale, um Orientierung, Klarheit und Sicherheit fΟΦr Patienten, Besucher und Mitarbeiter zu gewΟΛhrleisten. Wir bieten ein strukturiertes und serviceorientiertes Berufsumfeld, die Integration in ein dynamisches und kollaboratives Team in einem modernen Gesundheitskontext, in dem die Aufnahme eine integrale Bestandteil der Pflege ist. Die Person, die wir suchen, besitzt ein Bundeszeugnis der FΟΛhigkeit als Hotelkommunikationsmitarbeiter (AFC) oder ein Bundeszeugnis der FΟΛhigkeit als Verkaufsmitarbeiter (AFC) mit nachgewiesener Erfahrung im Bereich der Aufnahme/Acceptance. Sie verfΟΦgen ΟΦber eine perfekte Beherrschung der italienischen Sprache, gute Kenntnisse der gesprochenen und geschriebenen deutschen, franzΟΕsischen und englischen Sprache (Titel vorgezogen) sowie solide Kenntnisse der Haupt-IT-Anwendungen (Office-Paket und Verwaltungssysteme). descriptionByLocale.en: Physiotherapist - Job Posting The EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multisite hospital in Ticino with a total of 1,000 beds. Our organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, providing the population with a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care by taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our physiotherapy and occupational therapy team at the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic, Faido site, we are looking for a Physiotherapist (80-100%). Profile: The future physiotherapist is an action-oriented person who can establish effective and constructive relationships with internal and external clients. They have good listening skills and can carefully evaluate every situation before acting. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention and are committed to their personal development. Requirements: - Necessary requirements: - Obtained a physiotherapist diploma (if foreign, recognized by CRS), preferably with training in a hospital setting in the orthopedic-traumatological, geriatric, respiratory, and neurological sectors. - Organizational and administrative skills with a strong predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration, adaptability, and flexibility. - Excellent knowledge of the main computer applications and national languages. Entry date: May 1, 2026, to be agreed upon. Application and information: Applications, complete with curriculum vitae, copies of study and work certificates, must be submitted online by March 31, 2026, at http://www.eoc.ch/ -> Job opportunities -> Job offers. Consequently, applications sent by mail or email will not be considered, nor will applications that do not meet the required requirements. Further information can be requested from Mrs. Michela Battelli, head of the physiotherapy and occupational therapy department of CREOC at the Faido site, at 091 811 21 36.

jobs.title: Clinical Research Fellowship (100%)
jobs.description: Clinical Research Fellowship - Ausschreibung The EOC the multisite hospital of Ticino is present with its institutions on the entire cantonal territory with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization makes it possible to effectively combine local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a comprehensive and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of its more than 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures quality health care by caring for more than 41,000 patients a year and providing more than 600,000 ambulatory consultations. To complete the team at the Oncological Institute of Southern Switzerland (IOSI) Bellinzona, Clinical Research Unit and Phase 1 Program, we are looking for a/an Clinical Research Fellowship (100%) The Oncology Institute of Southern Switzerland is one of the largest clinical research centers in Switzerland. Our three main areas of clinical research comprise new drug development, lymphoproliferative diseases and prostate cancer. Other important areas of development in clinical research include gynecological, breast, lung, skin and gastrointestinal cancer. The IOSI has a dedicated phase 1 unit where early phase clinical trials, including first-in-human, are conducted. We have an excellent history of collaborating with both non-for-profit academic organizations and the pharmaceutical industry. Of particular relevance are our collaborations with the Institute of Oncology Research (IOR), the Institute of Biochemical Research (IRB) and the Swiss Cancer Institute (SCI, ex SAKK). We have a central role in the Faculty of Biomedical Sciences of the UniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana (USI). We are offering a Clinical Research Fellowship in Drug Development in solid tumors. This fellowship would incorporate activities in the Phase 1 Unit of the IOSI and clinical activity in solid tumors. During the fellowship program, there will be the possibility to participate in educational activities performed in our institute and selected external events. Through this fellowship, you will develop your clinical skills, increase your knowledge on how to conduct clinical research and manage patients enrolled in clinical trials, particularly focusing on early phase clinical trials. A minimum commitment of one year is required, to allow you to complete the fellowship objectives. Job Summary/Objectives: Develop clinical expertise in the management of patients with solid tumors enrolled in early phase clinical trials Learn the different aspects of the clinical research, particularly regarding trial design, evaluation of treatment toxicity and efficacy, management of patients enrolled in clinical trials, with a focus on early phase clinical trials of novel therapeutics Participation in study-specific safety calls in collaboration with the Principal Investigator and the Clinical Research Unit (CRU) team Attend internal meetings and educational activ
requirements: We have a central role in the Faculty of Biomedical Sciences of the UniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana (USI).

descriptionByLocale.it: Borsa di Ricerca Clinica - Ausschreibung L'EOC, l'ospedale multisede del Ticino, Ο® presente con istituzioni su tutto il territorio cantonale e dispone di un totale di 1.000 posti letto. L'organizzazione consente di combinare efficacemente l'approccio locale e la visione complessiva, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera completa e di proximitΟ†, indipendentemente da dove siano necessari i servizi. Grazie all'impegno e all'esperienza dei suoi oltre 6.500 dipendenti e al loro focus sulle relazioni umane, l'EOC garantisce cure sanitarie di qualitΟ† assistendo piΟΙ di 41.000 pazienti all'anno e fornendo piΟΙ di 600.000 consulenze ambulatoriali. Per completare il team presso l'Istituto Oncologico della Svizzera Meridionale (IOSI) di Bellinzona, Clinical Research Unit e Programma di Fase 1, stiamo cercando un/una Clinical Research Fellowship (100%). L'Istituto di Oncologia della Svizzera Meridionale Ο® uno dei piΟΙ grandi centri di ricerca clinica della Svizzera. Le nostre tre principali aree di ricerca clinica comprendono lo sviluppo di nuovi farmaci, le malattie linfoproliferative e il cancro alla prostata. Altri importanti ambiti di sviluppo nella ricerca clinica includono il cancro ginecologico, al seno, ai polmoni, alla pelle e gastrointestinale. L'IOSI dispone di un'unitΟ† dedicata alla fase 1 dove vengono condotti studi clinici di fase iniziale, inclusi quelli in prima fase umana. Abbiamo un'eccellente storia di collaborazione sia con organizzazioni accademiche senza scopo di lucro sia con l'industria farmaceutica. Di particolare rilevanza sono le nostre collaborazioni con l'Istituto di Ricerca Oncologica (IOR), l'Istituto di Ricerca Biochimica (IRB) e l'Istituto Svizzero del Cancro (SCI, ex SAKK). Abbiamo un ruolo centrale nella FacoltΟ† di Scienze Biomediche dell'UniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana (USI). Offriamo una Clinical Research Fellowship nello Sviluppo di Farmaci in tumori solidi. Questa borsa di studio includerebbe attivitΟ† nell'UnitΟ† di Fase 1 dell'IOSI e attivitΟ† clinica nei tumori solidi. Durante il programma di borse di studio, sarΟ† possibile partecipare ad attivitΟ† educative svolte nel nostro istituto e a eventi esterni selezionati. Attraverso questa borsa di studio, svilupperai le tue competenze cliniche, amplierai le tue conoscenze su come condurre ricerche cliniche e gestirai i pazienti iscritti a studi clinici, con particolare attenzione agli studi clinici in fase iniziale. Οà richiesto un impegno minimo di un anno per poter completare gli obiettivi della borsa di studio. Riassunto/Obiettivi del lavoro: Sviluppare competenze cliniche nella gestione di pazienti con tumori solidi arruolati in studi clinici in fase iniziale Imparare i diversi aspetti della ricerca clinica, in particolare riguardo alla progettazione dello studio, alla valutazione della tossicitΟ† e dell'efficacia del trattamento, alla gestione dei pazienti arruolati in studi clinici, con particolare attenzione agli studi clinici in fase iniziale di nuove terapie Partecipazione a chiamate di sicurezza specifiche per studio in collaborazione con il Principal Investigator e il Team dell'UnitΟ† di Ricerca Clinica (CRU) Partecipare a riunioni interne e attivitΟ† educative
descriptionByLocale.de: Klinisches Forschungsstipendium βÄ™ Ausschreibung Die EOC, das Mehrfachkrankenhaus des Tessin, ist mit seinen Einrichtungen auf dem gesamten Kantonsgebiet mit insgesamt 1.000 Betten vertreten. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht es, den lokalen Ansatz und die Gesamtvision effektiv zu verbinden und der BevΟΕlkerung ein umfassendes und nahnahes Krankenhausangebot zu garantieren, unabhΟΛngig davon, wo Leistungen benΟΕtigt werden. Dank des Engagements und der Expertise seiner mehr als 6.500 Mitarbeiter und ihres Fokus auf menschliche Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet das EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem es jΟΛhrlich mehr als 41.000 Patienten betreut und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen anbietet. Um das Team des Onkologischen Instituts der SΟΦdschweiz (IOSI) Bellinzona, der Clinical Research Unit und des Phase-1-Programms zu vervollstΟΛndigen, suchen wir ein Clinical Research Fellowship (100 %). Das Onkologische Institut SΟΦdschweiz ist eines der grΟΕΟüten klinischen Forschungszentren in der Schweiz. Unsere drei Hauptbereiche der klinischen Forschung umfassen die Entwicklung neuer Medikamente, lymphoproliferative Erkrankungen und Prostatakrebs. Weitere wichtige Entwicklungsbereiche in der klinischen Forschung sind gynΟΛkologische, Brust-, Lungen-, Haut- und Magen-Darm-Krebs. Das IOSI verfΟΦgt ΟΦber eine eigene Phase-1-Einheit, in der frΟΦhe klinische Studien, einschlieΟülich Erststudien am Menschen, durchgefΟΦhrt werden. Wir haben eine ausgezeichnete Geschichte in der Zusammenarbeit sowohl mit gemeinnΟΦtzigen akademischen Organisationen als auch mit der Pharmaindustrie. Besonders relevant sind unsere Zusammenarbeit mit dem Institut fΟΦr Onkologieforschung (IOR), dem Institut fΟΦr Biochemische Forschung (IRB) und dem Schweizerischen Krebsinstitut (SCI, ehemals SAKK). Wir haben eine zentrale Rolle in der FakultΟΛt fΟΦr Biomedizinische Wissenschaften der UniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana (USI). Wir bieten ein klinisches Forschungsstipendium in der Arzneimittelentwicklung bei soliden Tumoren an. Dieses Fellowship wΟΦrde AktivitΟΛten in der Phase-1-Einheit des IOSI sowie klinische AktivitΟΛten bei soliden Tumoren umfassen. WΟΛhrend des Fellowship-Programms besteht die MΟΕglichkeit, an BildungsaktivitΟΛten in unserem Institut und ausgewΟΛhlten externen Veranstaltungen teilzunehmen. Durch dieses Fellowship entwickeln Sie Ihre klinischen FΟΛhigkeiten, erweitern Ihr Wissen darΟΦber, wie man klinische Forschung betreibt, und fΟΦhren Patienten, die an klinischen Studien teilnehmen, insbesondere mit Schwerpunkt auf FrΟΦhphasenstudien. Eine Mindestverpflichtung von einem Jahr ist erforderlich, damit Sie die Fellowship-Ziele erreichen kΟΕnnen. Jobzusammenfassung/Ziele: Entwicklung klinischer Expertise im Management von Patienten mit soliden Tumoren, die in frΟΦhen Studienphasen teilnehmen, Lernen Sie die verschiedenen Aspekte der klinischen Forschung kennen, insbesondere bezΟΦglich des Studiendesigns, der Bewertung der TherapietoxizitΟΛt und Wirksamkeit, des Managements von Patienten in klinischen Studien mit Schwerpunkt auf FrΟΦhphasenstudien mit neuartigen Therapeutika, Teilnahme an studienspezifischen Sicherheitsaufrufen in Zusammenarbeit mit dem HauptprΟΦfer und dem Team der Clinical Research Unit (CRU) nimmt an internen Sitzungen und BildungsaktivitΟΛten teil

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is the hospital network of Ticino, present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. To complete our team of the Occupational Medicine Service, we are looking for a Chief Medical Officer Occupational Medicine (100%). Profile: The person we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy in the field of general internal medicine and ideally occupational medicine. They also have a strong motivation, initiative, and spirit of collaboration and believe, like us, in the importance of protecting the health of EOC's employees. They are oriented towards identifying and managing risks related to clinical, industrial, and general work activities. We offer a modern and dynamic work environment and the opportunity to work with highly motivated and prepared colleagues. Required qualifications: - Federal specialist title in General Internal Medicine in accordance with Articles 20 and 21 of the Federal Law on University Medical Professions (LPMed). For foreign titles, recognition by MEBEKO is required before starting activity - Alternatively (or preferably in addition): Federal specialist title in Occupational Medicine in accordance with Articles 20 and 21 of the Federal Law on University Medical Professions (LPMed). For foreign titles, recognition by MEBEKO is required before starting activity - Good knowledge of the Swiss healthcare system and social insurance system - Skills in performing workplace risk analysis, occupational health visits, and preventive exams in accordance with the relevant laws or willingness to acquire them - Ability to ensure compliance with legal requirements and safety and health standards at work - Good interpersonal and teamwork skills, as well as a propensity for collaboration with other health and safety services present in the company - Mastery of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with registration to MedReg before starting activity. Good knowledge of another national language (French, German) and English are also desirable. Start date: to be agreed. Applications, in electronic format, complete with curriculum vitae, motivation letter, and copies of study certificates are invited.

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present on the entire cantonal territory with its institutes for a total of 1,000 hospital beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Institute of Integrated Diagnostic of Italian Switzerland (IDISI) brings together the clinics of radiology, nuclear medicine, pathology and laboratory medicine, and with its approximately 600 employees and almost 4 million exams and analyses performed every year, offers a complete and high-quality diagnostic service, responding to the needs of patients residing throughout the cantonal territory. By overcoming traditional specialist barriers, IDISI adopts a multidisciplinary approach to facilitate more efficient and personalized diagnostic-therapeutic pathways, capable of responding specifically to the needs of each patient. In addition, the Institute is oriented towards university teaching and the promotion of biomedical research. The Nuclear Medicine Clinic performs approximately 8,000 diagnostic and therapeutic exams every year, covering almost all available services in the field of nuclear medicine. Among the various awards received, the Clinic is accredited by the European entity UEMS/EBNM for clinical and training activity. The EOC Nuclear Medicine Clinic, for its post-graduate training center, is looking for a Medical Assistant in Nuclear Medicine (100%). The candidate will work and perform post-graduate training in a transversal way between the two locations of the EOC Nuclear Medicine Clinic (Bellinzona and Lugano), according to the needs of the Service. Required qualifications: Medical degree and registration in MedReg for doctors with foreign titles is mandatory the recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration in MedReg before the start of activity proven knowledge of the Italian language (from level B2 to mother tongue) excellent relational, communicative and teamwork skills, initiative spirit, flexibility and positive and goal-oriented attitude constitute preferred titles previous experience, however brief, in a nuclear medicine service/clinic as a student/doctor/medical candidate, a thesis/master work in nuclear medicine and the availability to start a post-graduate training course in nuclear medicine at the center
descriptionByLocale.de: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, das Mehrfachkrankenhaus des Kantons Tessin, ist auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet mit seinen Instituten fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Krankenhausbetten prΟΛsent. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht die effektive Kombination von lokalem Ansatz und Gesamtblick, um eine globale und nahegelegene Krankenhausangebot fΟΦr die BevΟΕlkerung sicherzustellen, unabhΟΛngig von der Lage, an der die Dienstleistungen angefordert werden. Dank der Verpflichtung und Kompetenz von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit auf menschliche Beziehungen stellt EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige medizinische Versorgung sicher, indem sie sich um ΟΦber 41.000 Patienten pro Jahr kΟΦmmert und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Beratungen anbietet. Das Institut fΟΦr integrierte Diagnostik der italienischen Schweiz (IDISI) bringt die Kliniken fΟΦr Radiologie, Nuklearmedizin, Pathologie und Labormedizin zusammen und bietet mit seinen etwa 600 Mitarbeitern und fast 4 Millionen Untersuchungen und Analysen pro Jahr ein umfassendes und hochwertiges Diagnoseangebot, das den BedΟΦrfnissen der Patienten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet gerecht wird. Durch die Ο€berwindung traditioneller Fachbarrieren adoptiert IDISI einen multidisziplinΟΛren Ansatz, um effizientere und personalisierte diagnostische-therapeutische Wege zu ermΟΕglichen, die spezifisch auf die BedΟΦrfnisse jedes Patienten abgestimmt sind. DarΟΦber hinaus ist das Institut auf die universitΟΛre Lehre und die FΟΕrderung der biomedizinischen Forschung ausgerichtet. Die Klinik fΟΦr Nuklearmedizin fΟΦhrt etwa 8.000 diagnostische und therapeutische Untersuchungen pro Jahr durch, wobei fast alle verfΟΦgbaren Dienstleistungen im Bereich der Nuklearmedizin abgedeckt sind. Unter den verschiedenen Auszeichnungen, die erhalten wurden, ist die Klinik bei der europΟΛischen Einrichtung UEMS/EBNM fΟΦr klinische und AusbildungsaktivitΟΛten akkreditiert. Die Klinik fΟΦr Nuklearmedizin EOC, fΟΦr ihr postgraduales Ausbildungscenter, sucht einen Medizinischen Assistenten in Nuklearmedizin (100%). Der Kandidat wird in einem transversalen Wege zwischen den beiden Standorten der Klinik fΟΦr Nuklearmedizin EOC (Bellinzona und Lugano) arbeiten und die postgraduale Ausbildung durchfΟΦhren, entsprechend den BedΟΦrfnissen des Dienstes. Anforderungen: Medizinischer Abschluss und Registrierung in MedReg fΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln ist obligatorisch die Anerkennung durch die EidgenΟΕssische Kommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und Registrierung in MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit bewiesene Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (von Level B2 bis Muttersprache) ausgezeichnete Beziehungen, Kommunikations- und TeamfΟΛhigkeiten, Initiativegeist, FlexibilitΟΛt und positives und zielorientiertes Verhalten stellen vorgezogene Titel dar vorherige Erfahrung, jedoch kurz, in einem Nuklearmedizindienst/Klinik als Student/Arzt/Medizinkandidat, ein Diplom/Masterarbeit in Nuklearmedizin und die VerfΟΦgbarkeit, um ein postgraduales Ausbildungsprogramm in Nuklearmedizin am Zentrum zu beginnen

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present throughout the cantonal territory with its institutes for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare assistance, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Institute of Integrated Diagnostic of Italian Switzerland (IDISI) brings together the clinics of radiology, nuclear medicine, pathology, and laboratory medicine, and with its approximately 600 collaborators and almost 4 million exams and analyses performed every year, it offers a complete and high-quality diagnostic service, responding to the needs of patients residing throughout the cantonal territory. In addition, the Institute is oriented towards university teaching and the promotion of biomedical research. By overcoming traditional specialist barriers, IDISI adopts a multidisciplinary approach to promote more efficient and personalized diagnostic and therapeutic pathways, capable of responding specifically to the needs of each patient. The Nuclear Medicine Clinic performs approximately 8,000 diagnostic and therapeutic exams every year, covering almost all available services in the field of nuclear medicine. Among the various awards received, the Clinic is accredited by the European entity UEMS/EBNM for clinical and training activities. To develop its organization, the EOC Nuclear Medicine Clinic is looking for a Senior Physician in Nuclear Medicine (100%). The candidate will work transversally between the two sites of the EOC Nuclear Medicine Clinic (Bellinzona and Lugano), according to the needs of the Service. Required qualifications: medical degree and specialization in Nuclear Medicine or equivalent title and registration with MedReg before the start of work activity for doctors with foreign titles, mandatory recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg, including knowledge of one or more official Swiss languages (Italian, German, and French) proven knowledge of the Italian language (from level B2 to mother tongue) complete training and experience in Nuclear Medicine preferably in a university or public hospital constitutes a preferred title interest and proven experience in SPECT/CT and PET/CT imaging procedures (with a focus on nuclear cardiology and oncology) willingness to follow nuclear medicine assistants and scholarship doctors in line with the activities of the Nuclear Medicine Clinic.
descriptionByLocale.de: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, das Mehrfachkrankenhaus im Kanton Tessin, ist auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet mit seinen Instituten fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Betten prΟΛsent. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht die effektive Kombination von lokalem Ansatz und umfassender Vision, um eine globale und nahegelegene Krankenhausangebot fΟΦr die BevΟΕlkerung sicherzustellen, unabhΟΛngig von der Lage, an der Dienstleistungen angefordert werden. Dank der Verpflichtung und Expertise von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit gegenΟΦber menschlichen Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet EOC eine hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem sie sich um ΟΦber 41.000 Patienten pro Jahr kΟΦmmert und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen anbietet. Das Institut fΟΦr integrierte Diagnostik der italienischsprachigen Schweiz (IDISI) bringt die Kliniken fΟΦr Radiologie, Nuklearmedizin, Pathologie und Labormedizin zusammen und bietet mit seinen etwa 600 Mitarbeitern und fast 4 Millionen Untersuchungen und Analysen pro Jahr ein umfassendes und hochwertiges Diagnoseangebot, das den BedΟΦrfnissen der Patienten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet gerecht wird. DarΟΦber hinaus ist das Institut auf die universitΟΛre Lehre und die FΟΕrderung der biomedizinischen Forschung ausgerichtet. Indem es traditionelle Spezialisierungsbarrieren ΟΦberwindet, setzt IDISI einen multidisziplinΟΛren Ansatz ein, um effizientere und personalisierte diagnostische und therapeutische Wege zu fΟΕrdern, die spezifisch auf die BedΟΦrfnisse jedes Patienten abgestimmt sind. Die Nuklearmedizinische Klinik fΟΦhrt etwa 8.000 diagnostische und therapeutische Untersuchungen pro Jahr durch, wobei fast alle verfΟΦgbaren Dienstleistungen im Bereich der Nuklearmedizin abgedeckt sind. Zu den verschiedenen Auszeichnungen, die sie erhalten hat, ist die Klinik bei der europΟΛischen Einrichtung UEMS/EBNM fΟΦr klinische und AusbildungsaktivitΟΛten akkreditiert. Um seine Organisation zu entwickeln, sucht die Nuklearmedizinische Klinik EOC einen Oberarzt in Nuklearmedizin (100%). Der Kandidat wird zwischen den beiden Standorten der Nuklearmedizinischen Klinik EOC (Bellinzona und Lugano) transversal arbeiten, entsprechend den BedΟΦrfnissen des Dienstes. Anforderungen: Medizinischer Abschluss und Spezialisierung in Nuklearmedizin oder gleichwertiger Titel und Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der ArbeitsaktivitΟΛt fΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln, obligatorische Anerkennung durch die Bundeskommission fΟΦr die ΟΛrztlichen Berufe MEBEKO und Registrierung bei MedReg, einschlieΟülich Kenntnisse einer oder mehrerer Amtssprachen der Schweiz (Italienisch, Deutsch und FranzΟΕsisch) bewiesene Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (von B2-Muttersprache) VollstΟΛndige Ausbildung und Erfahrung in der Nuklearmedizin, bevorzugt in einem UniversitΟΛts- oder ΟΕffentlichen Krankenhaus, stellt einen Vorzugstitel dar Interesse und bewiesene Erfahrung in SPECT/CT- und PET/CT-Verfahren (mit Schwerpunkt auf nuklearmedizinischer Kardiologie und Onkologie) Bereitschaft, Nuklearmedizin-Assistenten und Stipendiaten zu begleiten, entsprechend den AktivitΟΛten der Nuklearmedizinischen Klinik

jobs.title: Dottorando di Ricerca in Neuroscienze (100%)
jobs.description: Dottorando di Ricerca in Neuroscienze - Ausschreibung L'Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (EOC) e l'UniversitΟ† della Svizzera italiana (USI) cercano candidati per la posizione di Dottorando di Ricerca in Neuroscienze (100%) con focus su medicina del sonno Il progetto di dottorato Ο® dedicato allo studio delle parasonnie NREM in etΟ† pediatrica e adulta. LβÄôattivitΟ† di ricerca si colloca nellβÄôambito delle neuroscienze cliniche e traslazionali e integra metodologie avanzate quali EEG ad alta densitΟ†, valutazioni cliniche strutturate, actigrafia, monitoraggio video supportato da sistemi di intelligenza artificiale, risonanza magnetica, analisi genetiche e analisi avanzate del segnale EEG, inclusi protocolli di stimolazione closed-loop . LβÄôobiettivo principale Ο® approfondire i meccanismi neurofisiologici alla base dei comportamenti anomali durante il sonno, in particolare le parasonnie NREM, con un focus sulla regolazione dellβÄôarousal e sulle dinamiche oscillatorie del sonno non-REM. La posizione di dottorato sarΟ† interamente finanziata dal Fondo Nazionale Svizzero (SNSF), nellβÄôambito di una progetto di carriera Ambizione assegnata alla Dr.ssa Anna Castelnovo ( https://data.snf.ch/grants/person/849861 ). Requisiti di ammissibilitΟ†: Laurea magistrale o titolo equivalente in Medicina, Psicologia, Ingegneria Biomedica o discipline affini Ottima conoscenza della lingua italiana (scritta e parlata), necessaria per le attivitΟ† cliniche e di ricerca Comprovata capacitΟ† di scrittura scientifica in lingua inglese Solide conoscenze di base in statistica applicata alla ricerca biomedica Conoscenze di base in medicina del sonno o neuroscienze cliniche DisponibilitΟ† a svolgere attivitΟ† di ricerca traslazionale in contesti clinici pediatrici e adulti. Profilo: Forte motivazione per la ricerca clinica e traslazionale in ambito neuroscientifico CapacitΟ† di interazione professionale, empatica e appropriata con pazienti pediatrici e adulti e con i loro familiari Conoscenze di base nella lettura clinica e quantitativa di segnali EEG (in particolare EEG/PSG) DisponibilitΟ† a collaborare nellβÄôacquisizione di dati neurofisiologici, inclusi studi notturni Elevata accuratezza metodologica, affidabilitΟ† e attenzione alla qualitΟ† dei dati CapacitΟ† di lavorare in modo indipendente, con spirito critico e curiositΟ† scientifica Ottima attitudine al lavoro di squadra in un contesto multidisciplinare. La/Il candidata/o selezionata/o entrerΟ† a far parte di un team interdisciplinare che affronta l'intersezione tra la ricerca sul sonno, la neurofisiologia e le neuroscienze, con un focus particolare sui disturbi parasonnici del sonno NREM. L'inizio dell'attivitΟ† Ο® prevista per il 1¬Α luglio 2026. Le condizioni di assunzione sono quelle previste dal Regolamento Organico Cantonale per il personale occupato presso l'EOC nonchΟ©, per la parte accademica, dallo Statuto e Regolamento dello staff accademico USI . descriptionByLocale.en: PhD Researcher in Neuroscience - Call for Applications The Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (EOC) and the UniversitΟ† della Svizzera italiana (USI) are seeking candidates for the position of PhD Researcher in Neuroscience (100%) with a focus on sleep medicine The PhD project is dedicated to the study of NREM parasomnias in pediatric and adult age. The research activity is located in the field of clinical and translational neuroscience and integrates advanced methodologies such as high-density EEG, structured clinical evaluations, actigraphy, video monitoring supported by artificial intelligence systems, magnetic resonance imaging, genetic analysis, and advanced EEG signal analysis, including closed-loop stimulation protocols. The main objective is to deepen the neurophysiological mechanisms underlying abnormal behaviors during sleep, particularly NREM parasomnias, with a focus on arousal regulation and non-REM sleep oscillatory dynamics. The PhD position will be fully funded by the Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF), within the framework of a Career Ambizione project assigned to Dr. Anna Castelnovo (https://data.snf.ch/grants/person/849861). Requirements for admission: Master's degree or equivalent in Medicine, Psychology, Biomedical Engineering, or related fields Excellent knowledge of the Italian language (written and spoken), necessary for clinical and research activities Proven ability to write scientific papers in English Solid knowledge of basic statistics applied to biomedical research Basic knowledge of sleep medicine or clinical neuroscience Availability to perform translational research in pediatric and adult clinical contexts. Profile: Strong motivation for clinical and translational research in the neuroscientific field Ability to interact professionally, empathetically, and appropriately with pediatric and adult patients and their families Basic knowledge of clinical and quantitative reading of EEG signals (particularly EEG/PSG) Availability to collaborate in the acquisition of neurophysiological data, including nighttime studies High methodological accuracy, reliability, and attention to data quality Ability to work independently, with a critical and curious scientific spirit Excellent teamwork attitude in a multidisciplinary context. The selected candidate will join an interdisciplinary team that addresses the intersection between sleep research, neurophysiology, and neuroscience, with a particular focus on NREM parasomniac sleep disorders. The start date is expected to be July 1, 2026. The terms of employment are those provided by the Organic Regulation of the Canton for personnel employed at the EOC, as well as, for the academic part, by the Statute and Regulation of the USI staff. USI and EOC aspire to be an exemplary university and employer, with the objective of creating a work environment that is inclusive, diverse, and respectful of all individuals, regardless of their background, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. The selected candidate will be part of a team that values diversity, equity, and inclusion, and is committed to creating a work environment that is free from discrimination and harassment. The selected candidate will also be expected to contribute to the development of a positive and inclusive work environment, and to promote diversity, equity, and inclusion within the team and the institution. The PhD position will be fully funded by the Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF), within the framework of a Career Ambizione project assigned to Dr. Anna Castelnovo (https://data.snf.ch/grants/person/849861).
descriptionByLocale.de: PhD-Stipendiat in Neurowissenschaften - Ausschreibung Das Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (EOC) und die UniversitΟ† della Svizzera italiana (USI) suchen Kandidaten fΟΦr die Position des PhD-Stipendiaten in Neurowissenschaften (100%) mit Schwerpunkt auf Schlafmedizin Das PhD-Projekt ist der Erforschung von NREM-Parasomnien im Kindes- und Erwachsenenalter gewidmet. Der ausgewΟΛhlte Kandidat wird auch erwartet, zum Wachstum eines positiven und inklusiven Arbeitsumfelds beizutragen und die Vielfalt, Gleichheit und Inklusion innerhalb des Teams und der Institution zu fΟΕrdern. descriptionByLocale.it: L'Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (EOC) e l'UniversitΟ† della Svizzera italiana (USI) invitano a presentare domanda per un dottorato di ricerca in Neuroscienze (100%) finanziato a fondo perduto. Il progetto di dottorato Ο® dedicato allo studio delle parasomnie NREM in popolazioni pediatriche e adulte. L'attivitΟ† di ricerca Ο® inserita nel campo della neuroscienza clinica e traslazionale e integra metodi avanzati, tra cui EEG ad alta densitΟ†, valutazioni cliniche strutturate, attivitΟ†, monitoraggio video supportato da sistemi di intelligenza artificiale, risonanza magnetica, analisi genetiche e elaborazione di segnali EEG avanzata, inclusi protocolli di stimolazione a chiusura di ciclo. L'obiettivo principale del progetto Ο® investigare i meccanismi neurofisiologici sottostanti ai comportamenti anomali durante il sonno, con particolare enfasi sulle parasomnie NREM, focalizzandosi sulla regolazione dell'arousal e sulle dinamiche oscillatorie durante il sonno non-REM. La posizione di dottorato sarΟ† finanziata a fondo perduto dalla Fondazione Nazionale Svizzera per la Scienza (SNSF) all'interno del quadro di un assegno di carriera Ambizione assegnato a dott.ssa Anna Castelnovo (https://data.snf.ch/grants/person/849861). I requisiti di ammissibilitΟ†: Laurea magistrale o equivalente in Medicina, Psicologia, Ingegneria Biomedica o discipline correlate. Ottima conoscenza dell'italiano (parlato e scritto), richiesta per le attivitΟ† cliniche e di ricerca. Aderenza dimostrata alla scrittura scientifica in inglese. Buona conoscenza di base di statistica applicata alla ricerca biomedica. Conoscenza di base di medicina del sonno o neuroscienza clinica. DisponibilitΟ† a condurre attivitΟ† di ricerca traslazionale in ambienti clinici pediatrici e adulti. Profilo: Motivazione forte per la ricerca clinica e traslazionale in neuroscienze. CapacitΟ† di interagire professionalmente, empaticamente e appropriatamente con pazienti pediatrici e adulti e le loro famiglie. Esperienza di base nella interpretazione clinica e quantitativa dei segnali EEG, in particolare EEG/PSG. DisponibilitΟ† a collaborare nell'acquisizione di dati neurofisiologici, compresi studi di notte. Alta accuratezza metodologica, affidabilitΟ† e forte attenzione alla qualitΟ† dei dati. CapacitΟ† di lavorare autonomamente, con pensiero critico e curiositΟ† scientifica. Eccellenti abilitΟ† di lavoro di squadra in un ambiente multidisciplinare. Il candidato selezionato si unirΟ† a un team di ricerca interdisciplinare che lavora all'interfaccia tra la ricerca del sonno, la neurofisiologia e la neuroscienza, con particolare enfasi sulle parasomnie NREM. La data di inizio Ο® il 1¬Α luglio 2026. Le condizioni di lavoro sono regolate dalle norme di impiego cantonali applicabili al personale impiegato presso l'EOC e, per il componente accademico, dalle norme del personale accademico dell'USI e dalle norme della SNSF: l'USI e l'EOC aspirano a essere istituzioni accademiche e datore di lavoro esemplari, impegnate a garantire pari opportunitΟ† nella selezione, nello sviluppo professionale, nella conservazione e nella promozione, senza discriminazione basata sul genere, sulla cultura, sulla disabilitΟ†, sulla orientamento sessuale o sull'identitΟ† di genere. Come istituzioni, si impegnano a promuovere la diversitΟ† e l'inclusione.

descriptionByLocale.fr: L'Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (EOC) et l'UniversitΟ† della Svizzera italiana (USI) invitent Ο† postuler pour un doctorat en Neurosciences (100%) financΟ© Ο† fonds perdus. Le projet de doctorat est consacrΟ© Ο† l'Ο©tude des parasomnies NREM dans les populations pΟ©diatriques et adultes. L'activitΟ© de recherche est insΟ©rΟ©e dans le domaine de la neurosciences clinique et translational et intΟ®gre des mΟ©thodes avancΟ©es, notamment l'EEG Ο† haute densitΟ©, les Ο©valuations cliniques structurΟ©es, l'actigraphie, la surveillance vidΟ©o soutenue par des systΟ®mes d'intelligence artificielle, l'imagerie par rΟ©sonance magnΟ©tique, les analyses gΟ©nΟ©tiques et l'Ο©laboration de signaux EEG avancΟ©s, y compris les protocoles de stimulation Ο† fermeture de boucle. L'objectif principal du projet est d'Ο©tudier les mΟ©canismes neurophysiologiques sous-jacents aux comportements anormaux pendant le sommeil, avec un accent particulier sur les parasomnies NREM, en mettant l'accent sur la rΟ©gulation de l'arousal et les dynamiques oscillatoires pendant le sommeil non-REM. La position de doctorat sera financΟ©e Ο† fonds perdus par la Fondation nationale suisse pour la science (SNSF) dans le cadre d'un programme de soutien Ο† la carriΟ®re Ambizione attribuΟ© Ο† Dr. Anna Castelnovo (https://data.snf.ch/grants/person/849861). Les exigences d'admissibilitΟ© : DiplΟ¥me de master ou Ο©quivalent en mΟ©decine, psychologie, ingΟ©nierie biomedicale ou disciplines connexes. Connaissances excellentes de l'italien (parlΟ© et Ο©crit), requises pour les activitΟ©s cliniques et de recherche. Aptitude dΟ©montrΟ©e Ο† la rΟ©daction scientifique en anglais. Connaissances de base en statistique appliquΟ©e Ο† la recherche biomedicale. Connaissances de base en mΟ©decine du sommeil ou neurosciences cliniques. DisponibilitΟ© pour mener des activitΟ©s de recherche translational dans des environnements cliniques pΟ©diatriques et adultes. Profil : Motivation forte pour la recherche clinique et translational en neurosciences. CapacitΟ© Ο† interagir professionnellement, empathiquement et de maniΟ®re appropriΟ©e avec des patients pΟ©diatriques et adultes et leurs familles. ExpΟ©rience de base dans l'interprΟ©tation clinique et quantitative des signaux EEG, en particulier EEG/PSG. DisponibilitΟ© Ο† collaborer Ο† l'acquisition de donnΟ©es neurophysiologiques, y compris des Ο©tudes de nuit. PrΟ©cision mΟ©thodologique Ο©levΟ©e, fiabilitΟ© et attention forte Ο† la qualitΟ© des donnΟ©es. CapacitΟ© Ο† travailler de maniΟ®re autonome, avec pensΟ©e critique et curiositΟ© scientifique. Excellentes compΟ©tences en travail d'Ο©quipe dans un environnement multidisciplinaire. Le candidat sΟ©lectionnΟ© rejoindra un Ο©quipe de recherche interdisciplinaire travaillant Ο† l'interface entre la recherche du sommeil, la neurophysiologie et les neurosciences, avec un accent particulier sur les parasomnies NREM. La date de dΟ©but est le 1er juillet 2026. Les conditions de travail sont rΟ©gies par les rΟ©glementations d'emploi cantonales applicables au personnel employΟ© par l'EOC et, pour la composante universitaire, par les rΟ©glementations du personnel universitaire de l'USI et les rΟ©glementations de la SNSF : l'USI et l'EOC visent Ο† ΟΣtre des institutions universitaires et des employeurs exemplaires, engagΟ©es Ο† garantir l'Ο©galitΟ© des chances dans la sΟ©lection, le dΟ©veloppement professionnel, la conservation et la promotion, sans discrimination basΟ©e sur le sexe, la culture, la dΟ©ficience, l'orientation sexuelle ou l'identitΟ© de genre. Comme institutions, elles visent Ο† promouvoir la diversitΟ© et l'inclusion.
