descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino with 1,000 beds across the cantonal territory. The organization combines local approach and global vision, ensuring a comprehensive and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Institute of Integrated Diagnostics in Italian-speaking Switzerland (IDISI) brings together radiology, nuclear medicine, pathology, and laboratory medicine clinics, with its approximately 600 employees and nearly 4 million exams and analyses performed annually, offering a complete and high-quality diagnostic service, responding to the needs of patients residing throughout the cantonal territory. By overcoming traditional specialist barriers, IDISI adopts a multidisciplinary approach to promote more efficient and personalized diagnostic-therapeutic pathways, capable of responding specifically to the needs of each patient. In addition, the Institute is oriented towards university teaching and the promotion of biomedical research. The Nuclear Medicine Clinic performs approximately 8,000 exams per year of almost all diagnostic and therapeutic performances of nuclear medicine. Among the various awards received, the Clinic is accredited by the European entity UEMS/EBNM for clinical and training activities. This position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Resident Physician in Nuclear Medicine Profile I/The candidates will work transversally between the two locations of the Nuclear Medicine Clinic (Bellinzona and Lugano), according to the service needs. Required requirements: Medical doctors in specialist training/specializing in nuclear medicine Medical degree/diploma and registration in MedReg for doctors with foreign titles is mandatory the recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration in MedReg before the start of activity Proven knowledge of the Italian language (from level B2 to mother tongue) Excellent relational, communicative, and teamwork skills Having a proven work activity in a nuclear medicine department of the EU area as a specialist trainee/doctor for at least 2 years. Excluded from this position are applications from nuclear medicine doctors already in possession of the specialist title or medical students/applicants. --> Entry date: to be agreed. Observations: We offer a modern and dynamic work environment and the possibility of professional growth and development in a team of highly qualified professionals. We are looking for a motivated and enthusiastic candidate who is passionate about nuclear medicine and wants to contribute to the success of our team. If you are a medical doctor in specialist training/specializing in nuclear medicine and are looking for a challenging and rewarding career opportunity, we encourage you to apply for this position. Requirements: * Medical doctors in specialist training/specializing in nuclear medicine * Medical degree/diploma and registration in MedReg for doctors with foreign titles is mandatory the recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration in MedReg before the start of activity * Proven knowledge of the Italian language (from level B2 to mother tongue) * Excellent relational, communicative, and teamwork skills * Having a proven work activity in a nuclear medicine department of the EU area as a specialist trainee/doctor for at least 2 years. * Excluded from this position are applications from nuclear medicine doctors already in possession of the specialist title or medical students/applicants.
descriptionByLocale.de: Das EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale ist ein Mehrstandort-Krankenhaus im Tessin mit 1.000 Betten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet. Die Organisation kombiniert lokalen Ansatz und globale Vision, um eine umfassende und nahegelegene Krankenhausangebot sicherzustellen, unabhΟΛngig von der Lage, an der Dienstleistungen erforderlich sind. Dank der Verpflichtung und Expertise von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr menschliche Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet das EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem es ΟΦber 41.000 Patienten pro Jahr betreut und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen anbietet. Das Institut fΟΦr integrierte Diagnostik in der italienischsprachigen Schweiz (IDISI) bringt die Kliniken fΟΦr Radiologie, Nuklearmedizin, Pathologie und Labormedizin zusammen, mit seinen etwa 600 Mitarbeitern und fast 4 Millionen Untersuchungen und Analysen pro Jahr, bietet ein umfassendes und hochwertiges Diagnoseangebot, das den BedΟΦrfnissen der Patienten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet gerecht wird. Indem es die traditionellen Fachbarrieren ΟΦberwindet, setzt sich IDISI fΟΦr einen multidisziplinΟΛren Ansatz ein, um effizientere und personalisierte diagnostische-therapeutische Wege zu fΟΕrdern, die spezifisch auf die BedΟΦrfnisse jedes Patienten eingeht. DarΟΦber hinaus ist das Institut auf die universitΟΛre Lehre und die FΟΕrderung der biomedizinischen Forschung ausgerichtet. Die Klinik fΟΦr Nuklearmedizin fΟΦhrt etwa 8.000 Untersuchungen pro Jahr durch, die fast alle diagnostischen und therapeutischen Leistungen der Nuklearmedizin umfassen. Unter den verschiedenen Auszeichnungen, die erhalten wurden, ist die Klinik bei der europΟΛischen Einrichtung UEMS/EBNM fΟΦr klinische und AusbildungsaktivitΟΛten akkreditiert. Diese Position richtet sich an Kandidaten, die eine spontane Bewerbung als Wissenschaftlicher Assistent in der Nuklearmedizin einreichen mΟΕchten. Profil I/Die Kandidaten werden zwischen den beiden Standorten der Klinik fΟΦr Nuklearmedizin (Bellinzona und Lugano) in einem transversalen ArbeitsverhΟΛltnis tΟΛtig sein, entsprechend den BedΟΦrfnissen des Dienstes. Anforderungen: * Mediziner in der Fachausbildung/Spezialisierung in der Nuklearmedizin * Medizinischer Abschluss/Diplom und Registrierung in MedReg fΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln ist obligatorisch die Anerkennung durch die Bundeskommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und Registrierung in MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit * BewΟΛhrte Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (von Niveau B2 bis Muttersprache) * Exzellente Beziehungen, Kommunikations- und TeamfΟΛhigkeiten * Eine bewΟΛhrte TΟΛtigkeit in einem Nuklearmedizin-Abteilung der EU-Gebiete als Facharzt-Assistent/Arzt fΟΦr mindestens 2 Jahre. * Ausgeschlossen von dieser Position sind AntrΟΛge von Ο³rzten der Nuklearmedizin, die bereits den Titel des Facharztes besitzen oder Medizinstudenten/Kandidaten. --> Eintrittsdatum: zu vereinbaren. Beobachtungen: Wir bieten ein modernes und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld und die MΟΕglichkeit der beruflichen Entwicklung und Weiterbildung in einem Team hochqualifizierter Fachleute. Wir suchen nach einem motivierten und begeisterten Kandidaten, der sich fΟΦr die Nuklearmedizin begeistert und zum Erfolg unseres Teams beitragen mΟΕchte. Wenn Sie ein Mediziner in der Fachausbildung/Spezialisierung in der Nuklearmedizin sind und eine herausfordernde und lohnende Karrierechance suchen, ermutigen wir Sie, sich fΟΦr diese Position zu bewerben. Anforderungen: * Mediziner in der Fachausbildung/Spezialisierung in der Nuklearmedizin * Medizinischer Abschluss/Diplom und Registrierung in MedReg fΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln ist obligatorisch die Anerkennung durch die Bundeskommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und Registrierung in MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit * BewΟΛhrte Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (von Niveau B2 bis Muttersprache) * Exzellente Beziehungen, Kommunikations- und TeamfΟΛhigkeiten * Eine bewΟΛhrte TΟΛtigkeit in einem Nuklearmedizin-Abteilung der EU-Gebiete als Facharzt-Assistent/Arzt fΟΦr mindestens 2 Jahre. * Ausgeschlossen von dieser Position sind AntrΟΛge von Ο³rzten der Nuklearmedizin, die bereits den Titel des Facharztes besitzen oder Medizinstudenten/Kandidaten.

LβÄôIstituto di Diagnostica Integrata della Svizzera Italiana (IDISI) riunisce le Cliniche di radiologia, medicina nucleare, patologia e medicina di laboratorio e, con i suoi circa 600 collaboratori e quasi 4 milioni di esami e analisi eseguite ogni anno, offre un servizio diagnostico completo e di alta qualitΟ†, rispondendo alle esigenze dei pazienti residenti in tutto il territorio cantonale. Superando le tradizionali barriere specialistiche, lβÄôIDISI adotta un approccio multidisciplinare per favorire percorsi diagnostico-terapeutici piΟΙ efficienti e personalizzati, capaci di rispondere in modo mirato alle specifiche necessitΟ† di ciascun paziente. La Clinica di Patologia e citologia Ο® riconosciuta come Clinica A dallβÄôIstituto svizzero per la formazione medica (ISFM) e offre un ambiente ideale per medici assistenti interessati ad un titolo di specialitΟ† FMH in patologia e per medici orientati su altre specialitΟ†, ma comunque interessati ad unβÄôesperienza professionale in anatomia patologica.

- Un ambiente ideale per medici assistenti interessati ad un titolo di specialitΟ† FMH in patologia
- UnβÄôesperienza professionale in anatomia patologica

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Institute of Integrated Diagnostics of Italian Switzerland (IDISI) brings together the Clinics of Radiology, Nuclear Medicine, Pathology, and Laboratory Medicine, and with its approximately 600 employees and almost 4 million exams and analyses performed annually, offers a comprehensive and high-quality diagnostic service, responding to the needs of patients residing throughout the cantonal territory. By overcoming traditional specialist barriers, IDISI adopts a multidisciplinary approach to promote more efficient and personalized diagnostic-therapeutic pathways, capable of responding specifically to the needs of each patient. In addition, the Institute is oriented towards university teaching and the promotion of biomedical research. The Pathology and Cytology Clinic ensures the pathology service for the entire EOC, as well as private clinics and medical studies throughout the canton. Every year, more than 80,000 cases are treated, concerning approximately 50,000 patients residing in the Canton. ## Profile The Pathology and Cytology Clinic is recognized as Clinic A by the Swiss Institute for Medical Education (ISFM) and offers an ideal environment for assistant doctors interested in a FMH specialty title in pathology and for doctors oriented towards other specialties, but still interested in a professional experience in anatomical pathology. ## Required Requirements: - Medical degree/diploma - Registration with MedReg before the start of work - For doctors with foreign titles: recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg - Knowledge of one or more official Swiss languages (German, French, Italian) - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (level B2) - Proven knowledge of a second national language, French or German, and/or English, level B2 ## Preferred Criteria: - Strong relational skills - Communicative - Teamwork - Clinical experience or in pathology ## What we offer - An ideal environment for assistant doctors interested in a FMH specialty title in pathology - Professional experience in anatomical pathology ## Contact - Start date: to be agreed - Send application: [insert contact information]
descriptionByLocale.de: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, das Mehrfachkrankenhaus des Kantons Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Betten prΟΛsent. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht die effektive Kombination von lokalem Ansatz und Gesamtblick, um eine globale und nahegelegene Krankenhausangebot fΟΦr die BevΟΕlkerung sicherzustellen, unabhΟΛngig von der Lage, an der die Dienstleistungen angefordert werden. Dank der BemΟΦhungen und Fachkenntnisse von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr menschliche Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem sie sich um ΟΦber 41.000 Patienten pro Jahr kΟΦmmert und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen anbietet. Das Institut fΟΦr integrierte Diagnostik der italienischsprachigen Schweiz (IDISI) bringt die Kliniken fΟΦr Radiologie, Nuklearmedizin, Pathologie und Labormedizin zusammen und bietet mit seinen etwa 600 Mitarbeitern und fast 4 Millionen Untersuchungen und Analysen pro Jahr ein umfassendes und hochwertiges diagnostisches Angebot, das den BedΟΦrfnissen der Patienten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet gerecht wird. Durch die Ο€berwindung traditioneller Fachbarrieren adoptiert IDISI einen multidisziplinΟΛren Ansatz, um effizientere und personalisierte diagnostisch-therapeutische Wege zu fΟΕrdern, die spezifisch auf die BedΟΦrfnisse jedes Patienten eingeht. DarΟΦber hinaus ist das Institut auf die universitΟΛre Lehre und die FΟΕrderung der biomedizinischen Forschung ausgerichtet. Die Pathologie- und Zytologie-Klinik gewΟΛhrleistet den Pathologie-Dienst fΟΦr das gesamte EOC sowie fΟΦr private Kliniken und medizinische Studien auf dem gesamten Kanton. Jedes Jahr werden mehr als 80.000 FΟΛlle behandelt, die etwa 50.000 Patienten auf dem Kanton betreffen. ## Profil Die Pathologie- und Zytologie-Klinik ist als Klinik A vom Schweizerischen Institut fΟΦr medizinische Ausbildung (ISFM) anerkannt und bietet ein ideales Umfeld fΟΦr AssistenzΟΛrzte, die an einem FMH-SpezialitΟΛtsabschluss in Pathologie interessiert sind, sowie fΟΦr Ο³rzte, die auf andere Fachgebiete ausgerichtet sind, aber trotzdem an einer beruflichen Erfahrung in der anatomischen Pathologie interessiert sind. ## Anforderungen: - Abschluss in Medizin - Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der Arbeit - FΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln: Anerkennung durch die EidgenΟΕssische Kommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und Registrierung bei MedReg - Kenntnisse einer oder mehrerer offizieller Schweizer Sprachen (Deutsch, FranzΟΕsisch, Italienisch) - Nachweis der Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (Niveau B2) - Nachweis der Kenntnisse einer zweiten nationalen Sprache, FranzΟΕsisch oder Deutsch, und/oder Englisch, Niveau B2 ## PrΟΛferierte Kriterien: - Starke BeziehungsqualitΟΛten - Kommunikativ - TeamfΟΛhigkeit - Klinische Erfahrung oder in Pathologie ## Was wir bieten - Ein ideales Umfeld fΟΦr AssistenzΟΛrzte, die an einem FMH-SpezialitΟΛtsabschluss in Pathologie interessiert sind - Berufliche Erfahrung in der anatomischen Pathologie ## Kontakt - Startdatum: zu vereinbaren - Bewerbung einreichen: [insert contact information]

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino with 1,000 beds. The organization combines local approach and global vision, ensuring a comprehensive and nearby hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Institute of Integrated Diagnosis of Italian Switzerland (IDISI) brings together the clinics of radiology, nuclear medicine, pathology, and laboratory medicine, and with its approximately 600 collaborators and almost 4 million exams and analyses performed annually, offers a complete and high-quality diagnostic service, responding to the needs of patients residing throughout the cantonal territory. By overcoming traditional specialist barriers, IDISI adopts a multidisciplinary approach to promote more efficient and personalized diagnostic-therapeutic pathways, capable of responding specifically to the needs of each patient. In addition, the Institute is oriented towards university teaching and the promotion of biomedical research. The Radiology Clinic performs over 260,000 exams per year, thanks to the effective integration of the skills of its 45 doctors and 150 radiology technicians and a cutting-edge technological infrastructure. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Radiologist for Radiology Body (80-100%) Profile: The candidate must demonstrate extensive professional experience in the field of general diagnostics, CT and US, including emergency body radiology (excluding neuroradiology). The candidate will be primarily active in a workplace to be defined within the EOC multi-site organization, with the possibility of mobility in the remaining hospital sites. Requirements: Medical degree and specialization in radiology or equivalent title and registration with MedReg before starting work for doctors with foreign titles, mandatory recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg, including knowledge of one or more official Swiss languages (German, French, Italian), proven knowledge of the Italian language, good knowledge of general radiology, complete and consolidated training, preferably in a university or public hospital, strong predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration in a continuous improvement and service development perspective, strong relational skills

jobs.title: Tecnico/a in analisi biomediche
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Tecnico/a in analisi biomediche - Ausschreibung LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie allβÄôimpegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti all'anno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali. LβÄôIstituto di Diagnostica Integrata della Svizzera Italiana (IDISI) riunisce le Cliniche di radiologia, medicina nucleare, patologia e medicina di laboratorio e, con i suoi circa 600 collaboratori e quasi 4 milioni di esami e analisi eseguite ogni anno, offre un servizio diagnostico completo e di alta qualitΟ†, rispondendo alle esigenze dei pazienti residenti in tutto il territorio cantonale. Inoltre lβÄôIstituto Ο® orientato allβÄôinsegnamento universitario e alla promozione della ricerca biomedica. La Clinica di Medicina di Laboratorio offre servizi completi di analisi su campioni biologici i cui risultati potranno fungere da supporto alla diagnosi e il monitoraggio di malattie. La maggior parte degli oltre 3 milioni di esami eseguiti ogni anno avviene su campioni biologici umani, ambientali e di veterinaria. La Clinica di Patologia e citologia assicura il servizio di anatomia patologica a favore di tutto lβÄôEOC come pure delle cliniche private e di studi medici per tutto il cantone. Ogni anno vengono trattati piΟΙ di 80'000 casi concernenti circa 50'000 pazienti residenti nel Cantone. La seguente posizione Ο® rivolta ai candidati che desiderano inoltrare una candidatura spontanea quale Tecnico/a in analisi biomediche I collaboratori della Clinica di Medicina di Laboratorio e della Clinica di Patologia e citologi a sanno gestire il tempo in maniera efficiente ed efficace. Sono in grado di affrontare, in maniera ottimale, elevati carichi di lavoro mantenendo la calma nei momenti di pressione. Hanno le conoscenze e le capacitΟ† funzionali e tecniche per fare il proprio lavoro ottenendo risultati di alta qualitΟ†. Sono persone aperte e flessibili con grande disponibilitΟ† ai cambiamenti.

## Requisiti
- diploma di tecnico in analisi biomediche dipl. SSS o equivalente riconosciuto dalla Croce Rossa Svizzera
- abilitΟ† manuale e attitudine al lavoro tecnico
- affidabilitΟ† e responsabilitΟ† nellβÄôesecuzione dellβÄôattivitΟ†
- capacitΟ† di gestione autonoma del proprio lavoro e spirito dβÄôiniziativa
- capacitΟ† relazionali, di comunicazione e disponibilitΟ† al lavoro multidisciplinare
- orientamento al cambiamento, allo sviluppo e flessibilitΟ†
- conoscenze dei principali applicativi informatici (word e excel)
- conoscenza di una seconda lingua nazionale auspicata
- disponibilitΟ† alla mobilitΟ† all'in

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Biomedical Analysis Technician - Job Posting EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale The Ticino multi-site hospital EOC is present with its institutes throughout the canton territory, totaling 1,000 beds. The organization effectively combines a local approach with a broad perspective, ensuring the population has access to comprehensive and nearby hospital services, regardless of where the services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 staff members and their focus on human relationships, EOC provides quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients annually and offering more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. The Swiss Italian Integrated Diagnostics Institute (IDISI) brings together radiology, nuclear medicine, pathology, and laboratory medicine clinics. With around 600 staff members and nearly 4 million exams and analyses performed each year, it offers a complete, high-quality diagnostic service tailored to the needs of patients across the entire canton. Furthermore, the institute is dedicated to university teaching and biomedical research promotion. The Laboratory Medicine Clinic provides comprehensive analysis services on biological samples, with results supporting diagnosis and disease monitoring. Most of the over 3 million exams conducted annually involve human, environmental, and veterinary biological samples. The Pathology and Cytology Clinic ensures anatomical pathology services for the entire EOC, as well as private clinics and medical practices across the canton. Over 80,000 cases involving approximately 50,000 residents are processed each year. This position is aimed at candidates interested in submitting a spontaneous application for the role of Biomedical Analysis Technician. Staff of the Laboratory Medicine Clinic and Pathology and Cytology Clinic are capable of managing time efficiently and effectively. They can handle high workloads optimally while remaining calm under pressure. They possess the knowledge and technical skills to perform their work with high-quality results. They are open-minded, flexible, and highly adaptable to change. ## Requirements - Degree as a biomedical analysis technician (dipl. SSS) or equivalent recognized by the Swiss Red Cross - Manual skills and aptitude for technical work - Reliability and responsibility in performing activities - Ability to independently manage their work and show initiative - Interpersonal, communication skills, and willingness to work in a multidisciplinary environment - Orientation towards change, development, and flexibility - Knowledge of main computer applications (Word and Excel) - Knowledge of a second national language is desirable - Willingness to be mobile within the region
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Techniker/in in biomedizinischer Analyse - Stellenausschreibung EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale Das mehrzentrische Krankenhaus EOC im Kanton Tessin ist mit seinen Instituten im gesamten Kantonsgebiet vertreten und verfΟΦgt ΟΦber insgesamt 1.000 Betten. Dank des Engagements und der Fachkompetenz von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitenden und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr zwischenmenschliche Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, betreut jΟΛhrlich ΟΦber 41.000 stationΟΛre Patienten und bietet mehr als 600.000 ambulante Beratungen. Das Schweizerisch-Italienische Institut fΟΦr Integrierte Diagnostik (IDISI) vereint Kliniken fΟΦr Radiologie, Nuklearmedizin, Pathologie und Labormedizin. Mit etwa 600 Mitarbeitenden und fast 4 Millionen durchgefΟΦhrten Untersuchungen und Analysen pro Jahr bietet es einen umfassenden, hochwertigen Diagnosedienst, der die BedΟΦrfnisse der Patienten im gesamten Kanton abdeckt. DarΟΦber hinaus ist das Institut auf universitΟΛre Lehre und die FΟΕrderung biomedizinischer Forschung ausgerichtet. Die Klinik fΟΦr Labormedizin bietet umfassende Analyseleistungen an biologischen Proben, deren Ergebnisse die Diagnose und KrankheitsΟΦberwachung unterstΟΦtzen. Der GroΟüteil der jΟΛhrlich ΟΦber 3 Millionen Untersuchungen erfolgt an menschlichen, Umwelt- und VeterinΟΛrproben. Die Klinik fΟΦr Pathologie und Zytologie stellt die anatomische Pathologie fΟΦr das gesamte EOC sowie private Kliniken und Arztpraxen im Kanton sicher. Ο€ber 80.000 FΟΛlle mit etwa 50.000 Einwohnern werden jΟΛhrlich bearbeitet. Diese Position richtet sich an Kandidaten, die eine Initiativbewerbung als Techniker/in in biomedizinischer Analyse einreichen mΟΕchten. Mitarbeitende der Klinik fΟΦr Labormedizin sowie der Klinik fΟΦr Pathologie und Zytologie sind in der Lage, ihre Zeit effizient und effektiv zu managen. Sie kΟΕnnen hohe Arbeitsbelastungen optimal bewΟΛltigen und bleiben auch unter Druck ruhig. Sie verfΟΦgen ΟΦber das Wissen und die technischen FΟΛhigkeiten, um ihre Arbeit qualitativ hochwertig auszufΟΦhren. Sie sind offen, flexibel und sehr anpassungsfΟΛhig an VerΟΛnderungen. ## Anforderungen - Diplom als Techniker/in in biomedizinischer Analyse (dipl. SSS) oder gleichwertig anerkannt durch das Schweizerische Rote Kreuz - Manuelle FΟΛhigkeiten und technische AffinitΟΛt - ZuverlΟΛssigkeit und Verantwortungsbewusstsein bei der AusfΟΦhrung der TΟΛtigkeiten - FΟΛhigkeit, die eigene Arbeit selbststΟΛndig zu organisieren und Initiative zu zeigen - Zwischenmenschliche, kommunikative FΟΛhigkeiten und Bereitschaft zur multidisziplinΟΛren Zusammenarbeit - Orientierung an VerΟΛnderung, Entwicklung und FlexibilitΟΛt - Kenntnisse der wichtigsten Computeranwendungen (Word und Excel) - Kenntnisse einer zweiten Landessprache sind wΟΦnschenswert - Bereitschaft zur MobilitΟΛt innerhalb der Region

jobs.title: Posto di formazione come medico assistente al 100%
jobs.description: Posto di formazione come medico assistente al 100% - Ausschreibung LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1'000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie allβÄôimpegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti allβÄôanno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali. I servizi di Anestesia EOC, prendono a carico oltre 20'000 pazienti all'anno in sala operatoria, oltre a prestare assistenza a diverse procedure interventistiche e diagnostiche fuori sala operatoria. La seguente posizione Ο® rivolta ai candidati che desiderano inoltrate una candidatura spontanea Posto di formazione come medico assistente al 100% presso il Centro di Formazione in Anestesia EOC - sedi Ospedale Regionale di Lugano e Ospedale Regionale di Bellinzona e Valli Profilo: I servizi di Anestesia dellβÄôOspedale Regionale di Lugano (ORL) e dellβÄôOspedale Regionale di Bellinzona e Valli (ORBV) sono sede del centro comune di formazione in Anestesiologia dellβÄôEOC. Ruotando tra i due servizi in maniera organizzata, i Medici Assistenti in Anestesia hanno la possibilitΟ† di formarsi e fare esperienza in tutti i domini dellβÄôAnestesiologia (fatta eccezione per la sola Cardioanestesia) e inTerapia del Dolore. Il Centro di Formazione consente anche la formazione in Medicina dβÄôUrgenza Extra-ospedaliera, con il conseguimento del relativo diploma certificato SGNOR, conseguibile nel corso del periodo di impego. Il curriculum formativo, individualizzato a seconda delle esigenze del Medico Assistente, viene definito allβÄôinizio del percorso, con la sottoscrizione del contratto di formazione individuale. Questo prevede un periodo iniziale consecutivo svolto in una delle due sedi, volto ad creare e consolidare un bagaglio tecnico e teorico di conoscenze di base, seguito da periodi di turnazione strutturata sulle due sedi, finalizzati ad acquisire conoscenze ed esperienza sotto specialistiche. descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino with its institutes present throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The EOC Anesthesia Services take on over 20,000 patients per year in the operating room, in addition to providing assistance for various interventional and diagnostic procedures outside the operating room. The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application for the 100% Medical Assistant Training Position at the EOC Anesthesia Training Center - sites Regional Hospital of Lugano and Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli Profile: The Anesthesia Services of the Regional Hospital of Lugano (ORL) and the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli (ORBV) are the seat of the common training center in Anesthesiology of the EOC. Rotating between the two services in an organized manner, Anesthesia Medical Assistants have the opportunity to form and gain experience in all domains of Anesthesiology (except for Cardioanesthesia) and Pain Therapy. The Training Center also allows for the formation in Emergency Medicine Outside the Hospital, with the achievement of the relevant SGNOR certified diploma, achievable during the period of employment. The training curriculum, individualized according to the needs of the Medical Assistant, is defined at the beginning of the path, with the signing of the individual training contract. This provides for an initial consecutive period performed in one of the two sites, aimed at creating and consolidating a technical and theoretical baggage of basic knowledge, followed by structured periods of rotation on the two sites, aimed at acquiring knowledge and experience under specialistic. The profile we are looking for is that of a highly motivated colleague, collaborative, professional, serious, reliable, respectful, precise, flexible, willing to perform part of their training path within the Training Center at a different site from the starting one, willing to provide service also in auto-medical, within the planned coverage of the Cardiomobile Service. Believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. Our offer Structured training program, multidisciplinary and multi-professional approach, individualized paths, opportunities for career development, and a competitive salary and benefits package. We are looking for a highly motivated and collaborative individual who is passionate about delivering high-quality patient care and is committed to ongoing professional development. If you are a motivated and enthusiastic individual who is passionate about delivering high-quality patient care and is committed to ongoing professional development, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity. We offer a competitive salary and benefits package, as well as opportunities for career development and professional growth. We are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all qualified candidates. Requirements: - Highly motivated and collaborative individual - Passionate about delivering high-quality patient care - Committed to ongoing professional development - Ability to work in a fast-paced environment - Strong communication and interpersonal skills - Ability to work independently and as part of a team - Flexibility to work in different locations and shifts - Willingness to perform part of their training path within the Training Center at a different site from the starting one - Willingness to provide service also in auto-medical, within the planned coverage of the Cardiomobile Service
descriptionByLocale.de: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale ist ein Mehrfachkrankenhaus im Kanton Tessin mit seinen Instituten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Gebiet fΟΦr insgesamt 1.000 Betten. Die Organisation ermΟΕglicht die effektive Kombination von lokalem Ansatz und umfassender Vision, um eine globale und nahegelegene Krankenhausangebot fΟΦr die BevΟΕlkerung sicherzustellen, unabhΟΛngig von der Lage, an der die Dienstleistungen angefordert werden. Dank der BemΟΦhungen und Expertise von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit auf die menschliche Beziehung gewΟΛhrleistet EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem sie sich um ΟΦber 41.000 Patienten pro Jahr kΟΦmmert und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen anbietet. Die AnΟΛsthesiedienste von EOC ΟΦbernehmen ΟΦber 20.000 Patienten pro Jahr im Operationssaal, auΟüerdem bieten sie UnterstΟΦtzung fΟΦr verschiedene interventionelle und diagnostische Verfahren auΟüerhalb des Operationssaals an. Die folgende Position richtet sich an Kandidaten, die eine spontane Bewerbung fΟΦr den 100%igen Medizinischen Assistenten-Ausbildungsplatz am EOC-AnΟΛsthesie-Ausbildungszentrum - Standorte Kantonsspital Lugano und Kantonsspital Bellinzona und Valli - einreichen mΟΕchten. Profil: Die AnΟΛsthesiedienste des Kantonsspitals Lugano (ORL) und des Kantonsspitals Bellinzona und Valli (ORBV) sind Sitz des gemeinsamen Ausbildungszentrums fΟΦr AnΟΛsthesiologie des EOC. Durch Rotation zwischen den beiden Diensten in einer organisierten Weise haben AnΟΛsthesie-Medizinassistenten die MΟΕglichkeit, sich zu bilden und Erfahrungen in allen DomΟΛnen der AnΟΛsthesiologie (auΟüer CardioanΟΛsthesie) und Schmerztherapie zu sammeln. Das Ausbildungszentrum ermΟΕglicht auch die Ausbildung in Notfallmedizin auΟüerhalb des Krankenhauses, mit dem Erwerb des entsprechenden SGNOR-Zertifikats, das wΟΛhrend der BeschΟΛftigungszeit erworben werden kann. Das Ausbildungscurriculum, das individuell an die BedΟΦrfnisse des Medizinassistenten angepasst wird, wird am Anfang des Weges definiert, mit der Unterzeichnung des individuellen Ausbildungsvertrags. Dies umfasst einen ersten aufeinanderfolgenden Zeitraum, der in einer der beiden Standorte durchgefΟΦhrt wird, mit dem Ziel, ein technisches und theoretisches Wissen ΟΦber grundlegende Kenntnisse zu schaffen, gefolgt von strukturierten Zeitabschnitten der Rotation auf den beiden Standorten, mit dem Ziel, Kenntnisse und Erfahrungen unter spezialistischen zu erwerben. Das Profil, das wir suchen, ist das eines hochmotivierten Kollegen, der sich kooperativ, professionell, ernsthaft, vertrauenswΟΦrdig, respektvoll, genau, flexibel, bereit ist, Teil seines Ausbildungsweges im Ausbildungszentrum an einem anderen Standort als dem Ausgangspunkt durchzufΟΦhren, bereit ist, auch in der Auto-Medizin zu arbeiten, im Rahmen der geplanten Abdeckung des Cardiomobile-Dienstes. Glaubt, wie wir, an die Bedeutung, den Patienten und seine Familie in den Mittelpunkt aller unserer Aufmerksamkeit zu stellen. Unsere Angebote Strukturiertes Ausbildungsprogramm, multidisziplinΟΛrer und multi-professioneller Ansatz, individuelle Wege, MΟΕglichkeiten fΟΦr Karrierenwicklung, und ein attraktives Gehalt und Benefits-Paket. Wir suchen einen hochmotivierten und kooperativen Einzelnen, der sich leidenschaftlich fΟΦr die hochwertige Patientenversorgung einsetzt und sich fΟΦr die laufende berufliche Entwicklung einsetzt. Wenn Sie ein motivierter und begeisterter Einzelner sind, der sich leidenschaftlich fΟΦr die hochwertige Patientenversorgung einsetzt und sich fΟΦr die laufende berufliche Entwicklung einsetzt, ermutigen wir Sie, sich fΟΦr diese aufregende Gelegenheit zu bewerben. Wir bieten ein attraktives Gehalt und Benefits-Paket, sowie MΟΕglichkeiten fΟΦr Karrierenwicklung und berufliche Entwicklung an. Wir sind ein Gleichstellungsbewerber und begrΟΦΟüen Bewerbungen von allen qualifizierten Kandidaten. Anforderungen: - Hochmotivierter und kooperativer Einzelner - Leidenschaft fΟΦr die hochwertige Patientenversorgung - Einstellung fΟΦr die laufende berufliche Entwicklung - FΟΛhigkeit, in einem schnellen Umfeld zu arbeiten - Starke Kommunikations- und InterpersonenfΟΛhigkeiten - FΟΛhigkeit, unabhΟΛngig und als Teil eines Teams zu arbeiten - FlexibilitΟΛt, um in verschiedenen Standorten und Schichten zu arbeiten - Bereitschaft, Teil seines Ausbildungsweges im Ausbildungszentrum an einem anderen Standort als dem Ausgangspunkt durchzufΟΦhren - Bereitschaft, auch in der Auto-Medizin zu arbeiten, im Rahmen der geplanten Abdeckung des Cardiomobile-Dienstes

Inoltre, la Clinica di Oncologia coltiva regolari contatti di collaborazione in ambito accademico con lβÄôIstituto Oncologico di Ricerca (IOR), lβÄôIstituto di Ricerca in Biomedicina (IRB), il Politecnico di Zurigo (ETHZ) e il Gruppo Svizzero di Ricerca Contro il Cancro (SAKK). descriptionByLocale.en: Assistant physician in training in Medical Oncology - Ausschreibung The EOC, the multi-site hospital in Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization makes it possible to effectively combine local approach and overall vision, guaranteeing the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of its more than 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare by caring for more than 41,000 inpatients per year and providing more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is open to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the Medical Oncology Service of the Oncology Institute of Southern Switzerland as Assistant Physician in Training in Medical Oncology Profile IOSI employs trainee doctors in the inpatient ward in Bellinzona and in the 4 outpatient clinics in Bellinzona, Locarno, Lugano and Mendrisio. The Institute is recognized as a type A training center for obtaining a title of specialist in medical oncology FMH and is affiliated with the Faculty of Biomedicine of the University of Lugano (USI). In addition, the Oncology Clinic cultivates regular academic collaboration contacts with the Institute of Oncology Research (IOR), the Institute for Research in Biomedicine (IRB), ETH Zurich (ETHZ) and the Swiss Cancer Research Group (SAKK). In addition to the daily clinical activity, the training offer of our Institute includes, in close collaboration with the Hematology Clinic, a rich weekly continuing education program with Journal Club, training conferences and oncolunches. The discussion of clinical cases is multidisciplinary and takes place within the numerous tumor boards that are held weekly and in which each assistant physician is invited to actively participate. The doctor we are looking for must have motivation, his own initiative and a spirit of collaboration. He believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and his family at the center of all our attention. Necessary requirements Degree/diploma in medicine and surgery; for doctors with foreign qualifications, recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and corresponding registration with MedReg are required before the start of the activity. Proven knowledge of the Italian language (at least B2 level required) with relative registration to MedReg before the start of the activity. descriptionByLocale.de: Assistenzarzt in Ausbildung fΟΦr Medizinische Onkologie βÄ™ Ausschreibung Das EOC, das Mehrfachkrankenhaus im Tessin, ist mit seinen Instituten im gesamten Kantonsgebiet mit insgesamt 1.000 Betten vertreten. Dank des Engagements und der Expertise seiner mehr als 6.500 Mitarbeiter und ihres Fokus auf menschliche Beziehungen gewΟΛhrleistet das EOC eine qualitativ hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung, indem es jΟΛhrlich mehr als 41.000 stationΟΛre Patienten betreut und mehr als 600.000 ambulante Beratungen anbietet. Die folgende Stelle steht Kandidaten offen, die sich spontan beim Medizinischen Onkologiedienst des Onkologieinstituts der SΟΦdschweiz als Assistenzarzt in Ausbildung fΟΦr medizinische Onkologie bewerben mΟΕchten. Profil IOSI beschΟΛftigt Auszubildende Ο³rzte auf der stationΟΛren Station in Bellinzona sowie in den vier ambulanten Kliniken in Bellinzona, Locarno, Lugano und Mendrisio. descriptionByLocale.en: Medical Researcher in Medical Oncology - Job Announcement The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, the EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the Medical Oncology Service of the Swiss Italian Institute of Oncology as a Medical Researcher in Medical Oncology Profile The IOSI employs doctors in training in the inpatient department in Bellinzona and in the 4 outpatient clinics in Bellinzona, Locarno, Lugano, and Mendrisio. The Institute is recognized as a type A training center for the attainment of a specialist title in medical oncology FMH and is affiliated with the Faculty of Biomedicine of the University of Italian Switzerland (USI). In addition, the Oncology Clinic cultivates regular collaboration contacts in the academic field with the Institute of Oncological Research (IOR), the Institute of Biomedical Research (IRB), the Zurich Polytechnic (ETHZ), and the Swiss Cancer Research Group (SAKK). In addition to the daily clinical activity, the training offer of our Institute provides, with a close collaboration with the Hematology Clinic, a rich weekly program of continuous training with Journal Club, formative conferences, and oncolunch. The clinical case discussion is multidisciplinary and takes place within the numerous tumor boards that are held weekly and to which every assistant doctor is invited to participate actively. The doctor we are looking for must have motivation, initiative, and a spirit of collaboration. He believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and his family at the center of all our attention. Required qualifications Degree in medicine and surgery; for doctors with foreign titles, mandatory recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and related registration to MedReg before the start of activity. Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with related registration to MedReg before the start of activity. Good knowledge of another national language in addition to Italian (French, German) and possibly English is also desirable. It is strongly preferred to have at least one year of experience in oncology, hematology, or internal medicine. Availability for possible transfers, to Lugano and possibly to other locations.

## Descrizione

LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. ## Reparto e Organizzazione

Il reparto di Medicina interna dellβÄôOspedale Regionale di Bellinzona e Valli (sedi di Bellinzona, Faido e Acquarossa) Ο® parte integrante dellβÄôEnte Ospedaliero Cantonale (www.eoc.ch). Οà riconosciuto come centro di perfezionamento professionale, categoria A, con una vasta casistica multidisciplinare e coinvolge i collaboratori, oltre che nellβÄôambito delle cure, anche in quelli della ricerca e della formazione. Gli ospedali periferici situati in Leventina (Faido) e valle di Blenio (Acquarossa) completano il profilo della casistica in una dinamica di maggiore autonomia. Il team medico si compone di 40 medici assistenti, 11 Capo clinica e quadri superiori appartenenti a diverse discipline.

## La nostra offerta

- Programma di formazione continua strutturato
- Approccio multidisciplinare e multi professionale
- Percorsi individualizzati
- OpportunitΟ† di sviluppo e di carriera
- Cultura dellβÄôaccoglienza e della relazione
- Collaborazione con la nuova facoltΟ† di biomedicina dellβÄôUniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana

## Profilo del candidato

Il medico che cerchiamo deve possedere:
- Motivazione
- Iniziativa propria
- Spirito di collaborazione
- Crede, come noi, nell'importanza di mettere il paziente e la sua famiglia al centro di tutte le nostre attenzioni

## Requisiti necessari

- Laurea/diploma in medicina (o titolo equivalente)
- Per medici con titoli esteri Ο® richiesto obbligatoriamente il riconoscimento/registrazione da parte della Commissione federale per le professioni mediche MEBEKO e relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†
- Titolo di specialitΟ† in Medicina interna ottenuto o in via di ottenimento (per medici con titoli esteri Ο® richiesto obbligatoriamente il riconoscimento da parte della Commissione federale per le professioni mediche MEBEKO e relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†
- Comprovata conoscenza della lingua italiana (livello richiesto almeno B2) con relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†
- Sono inoltre auspicate, ma non indispensabili, buone conoscenze di un'altra lingua

## Contatto

(Non presente)

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a hospital network with multiple sites across the Ticino canton, offering a total of 1,000 beds. The organization combines local approach and global vision, ensuring a comprehensive and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. We are looking for a Senior Physician in Internal Medicine to complete our team at the Internal Medicine departments of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli. The Internal Medicine department of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and Valli (sites in Bellinzona, Faido, and Acquarossa) is an integral part of the Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (www.eoc.ch). It is recognized as a professional development center, category A, with a wide range of multidisciplinary casework and involves employees not only in the care but also in research and training. The peripheral hospitals located in Leventina (Faido) and Blenio Valley (Acquarossa) complete the profile of the casework in a dynamic of greater autonomy. The medical team consists of 40 assistant physicians, 11 senior physicians, and higher-level staff from various disciplines. Our offer includes: - Structured continuing education program - Multidisciplinary and multi-professional approach - Individualized paths - Opportunities for development and career advancement - Culture of welcome and relationship - Collaboration with the new Faculty of Biomedicine of the University of Italian Switzerland We are looking for a doctor who possesses: - Motivation - Personal initiative - Collaborative spirit - Believes, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention Requirements: - Medical degree (or equivalent title) - For doctors with foreign titles, recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting activity - Specialty title in Internal Medicine obtained or in the process of being obtained (for doctors with foreign titles, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting activity) - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (B2 level required) with registration with MedReg before starting activity - Good knowledge of another language is also desirable but not essential Contact: (Not available)
descriptionByLocale.de: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale ist ein Krankenhausnetzwerk mit mehreren Standorten im Kanton Tessin, das insgesamt 1.000 Betten bietet. Die Organisation kombiniert lokalen Ansatz und globale Vision, um eine umfassende und nahegelegene Krankenhausangebot sicherzustellen, unabhΟΛngig von der Lage, an der Dienstleistungen erforderlich sind. Wir suchen einen Oberarzt Innere Medizin, um unser Team im Inneren Medizin-Departement des Regionalhospitals Bellinzona und Valli zu vervollstΟΛndigen. Das Inneren Medizin-Departement des Regionalhospitals Bellinzona und Valli (Standorte in Bellinzona, Faido und Acquarossa) ist ein integraler Teil des Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale (www.eoc.ch). Die peripheren KrankenhΟΛuser in Leventina (Faido) und Blenio-Tal (Acquarossa) vervollstΟΛndigen das Profil der Fallzahlen in einer dynamischen Autonomie. Das medizinische Team besteht aus 40 AssistenzΟΛrzten, 11 OberΟΛrzten und hΟΕheren Stellen aus verschiedenen Disziplinen. Unser Angebot umfasst: - Strukturiertes Weiterbildungskonzept - MultidisziplinΟΛrer und multi-professioneller Ansatz - Individualisierte Wege - MΟΕglichkeiten fΟΦr Entwicklung und KarrierefΟΕrderung - Kultur der Aufnahme und der Beziehung - Zusammenarbeit mit der neuen FakultΟΛt fΟΦr Biomedizin der UniversitΟΛt der italienischen Schweiz Wir suchen einen Arzt, der: - Motivation - Eigeninitiative - Kollegialer Geist - Glaubt, wie wir, an die Bedeutung, den Patienten und seine Familie in den Mittelpunkt aller unserer Aufmerksamkeit zu stellen Anforderungen: - Medizinischer Abschluss (oder ΟΛquivalentes Titel) - FΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln ist die Anerkennung/Registrierung durch die Bundeskommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und die Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit erforderlich - Spezialisierungstitel Innere Medizin erworben oder in der Bearbeitung (fΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln ist die Anerkennung durch die Bundeskommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und die Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit erforderlich) - Nachgewiesene Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (B2-Level erforderlich) mit Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit - Gute Kenntnisse einer anderen Sprache sind auch wΟΦnschenswert, aber nicht erforderlich Kontakt: (Nicht verfΟΦgbar)

descriptionByLocale.en: Internal Medicine Assistant Physicians in Training - Job Posting EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present throughout the cantonal territory with its institutes for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Description The Department of Internal Medicine of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and the Valleys is looking for Internal Medicine Assistant Physicians in Training The Internal Medicine Department of the Regional Hospital of Bellinzona and the Valleys (sites in Bellinzona, Faido, and Acquarossa) is an integral part of the Cantonale Hospital Authority (www.eoc.ch). It is recognized as a professional development center, category A, with a wide multidisciplinary caseload and involves collaborators not only in the care field but also in research and training. The peripheral hospitals located in the Leventina Valley (Faido) and the Blenio Valley (Acquarossa) complete the caseload profile in a dynamic of greater autonomy. The medical team consists of 34 assistant physicians, 15 head clinicians, and senior staff from various disciplines. ## Profile The person we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy, as well as motivation, initiative, and a spirit of collaboration. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. ## Required Requirements - Bachelor's degree or medical diploma (Swiss title or equivalent foreign title); - For doctors with foreign titles, recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO is mandatory, as well as registration with MedReg before starting activity; - Experience in a training institute B or C, preferably in internal medicine, matured in Switzerland, or adequate clinical experience developed in other countries; - Good knowledge of the Italian language (B2) and, if possible, knowledge of a second national language (German and/or French) and English; - Language skills must be registered in MedReg. ## Entry Date --> to be agreed. ## What We Offer - Structured continuing education program; - Multidisciplinary and multi-professional approach; - Individualized paths; - Opportunities for development and career advancement; - Culture of welcome and relationship; - Collaboration with the new faculty of biomedicine. ## Contact We offer a modern and dynamic work environment and the possibility of working in a team of passionate and motivated professionals. If you are interested in this opportunity, please send your application with your CV and a cover letter.

jobs.title: Medico assistente in formazione Pediatria di base (100%)
jobs.description:
## Medico assistente in formazione Pediatria di base

LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie all'impegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti all'anno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali.

## Descrizione

La seguente posizione Ο® rivolta ai candidati che desiderano inoltrare una candidatura spontanea . Per completare il nostro team presso i reparti di Pediatria di base dellβÄôIstituto Pediatrico della Svizzera Italiana cerchiamo un(a) Medico assistente in formazione Pediatria di base (100%).

## Profilo

LβÄôIstituto Pediatrico della Svizzera Italiana, con la sua sede principale allβÄôOspedale San Giovanni di Bellinzona, Ο® lβÄôospedale centro per le cure pediatriche della Svizzera Italiana e comprende le cure in pediatria generale, specializzata, chirurgia pediatrica, incluso una neonatologia 2B e le cure intermedie pediatriche.

Il/la nuovo/a collaboratore/collaboratrice collaborerΟ† allβÄôinterno del servizio di pediatria di base il quale si prende a carico di tutti i pazienti pediatrici della sede di Locarno dellβÄôIstituto Pediatrico della Svizzera Italiana.

La persona che cerchiamo possiede esperienza professionale, spirito di iniziativa e di collaborazione. DovrΟ† saper lavorare in squadra, avere modi gentili sia con il team che con i pazienti. Οà in grado di lavorare in maniera strutturata ed indipendente ed ha interesse per l'insegnamento e la ricerca.

Crede, come noi, nell'importanza di mettere il paziente e la sua famiglia al centro di tutte le nostre attenzioni. La funzione prevede attivitΟ† in ambito ambulatoriale ed in ambito stazionario nel vasto campo della pediatria, la partecipazione al servizio medico pediatrico e ad attivitΟ† didattiche in collaborazione con la FacoltΟ† di biomedicina dell'universitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana (USI).

## Requisiti

- Laurea/diploma in medicina e chirurgia;
- per medici con titoli esteri Ο® richiesto obbligatoriamente il riconoscimento/registrazione da parte della Commissione federale per le professioni mediche MEBEKO e relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†;
- Comprovata conoscenza della lingua italiana (livello richiesto almeno B2) con relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†;
- Sono inoltre auspicate, ma non indispensabili, buone conoscenze di unβÄôaltra lingua nazionale oltre allβÄôitaliano (francese, tedesco) ed eventualmente dellβÄôinglese;
- Οà fortemente preferito almeno unβÄôesperienza in unβÄôistituto di formazione B o C preferibilmente maturata in Svizzera.

## Cosa offriamo

Osservazioni secondo le necessitΟ†

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino with 1,000 beds across the cantonal territory. Our organization combines a local approach with a global vision, ensuring a comprehensive and proximity hospital offer, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is open to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application. To complete our team at the Pediatric Basic Care Departments of the Pediatric Institute of Southern Switzerland, we are looking for a Pediatric Assistant in Training (100%). The Pediatric Institute of Southern Switzerland, with its main office at the San Giovanni Hospital in Bellinzona, is the central hospital for pediatric care in Southern Switzerland and includes general, specialized, and pediatric surgery care, including a 2B neonatology unit and intermediate pediatric care. The new employee will collaborate within the pediatric basic care service, which takes care of all pediatric patients at the Locarno site of the Pediatric Institute of Southern Switzerland. The person we are looking for has professional experience, initiative, and collaboration spirit. They must be able to work in a team, be gentle with both the team and patients. They are able to work in a structured and independent manner and have an interest in teaching and research. They believe, as we do, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. The function involves activities in the outpatient and inpatient fields in the wide field of pediatrics, participation in pediatric medical services, and didactic activities in collaboration with the Faculty of Biomedicine of the University of Southern Switzerland (USI). ## Requirements - Medical and surgical degree; - For doctors with foreign titles, mandatory recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting activity; - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (required level at least B2) with registration with MedReg before starting activity; - Good knowledge of another national language (French, German) and possibly English is also desirable; - It is strongly preferred to have at least one experience in a training institute B or C, preferably acquired in Switzerland. ## What we offer Observations according to needs
descriptionByLocale.de: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale ist ein Mehrstandort-Hospital im Kanton Tessin mit 1.000 Betten auf dem gesamten kantonalen Territorium. Unsere Organisation kombiniert einen lokalen Ansatz mit einer globalen Vision, um eine umfassende und nahe gelegene Krankenhausangebot sicherzustellen, unabhΟΛngig davon, wo die Dienste erforderlich sind. Dank der Verpflichtung und Expertise von ΟΦber 6.500 Mitarbeitern und ihrer Aufmerksamkeit fΟΦr menschliche Beziehungen stellt EOC eine hochwertige Gesundheitsversorgung sicher, indem sie ΟΦber 41.000 Patienten pro Jahr pflegt und ΟΦber 600.000 ambulante Konsultationen anbietet. Die folgende Stelle ist fΟΦr Kandidaten offen, die eine spontane Bewerbung einreichen mΟΕchten. Um unser Team im Bereich der Grundversorgung fΟΦr Kinder am Kinderinstitut der SΟΦdschweiz zu vervollstΟΛndigen, suchen wir einen Pflegeassistenten in der Ausbildung (100%). Das Kinderinstitut der SΟΦdschweiz, mit seinem Hauptsitz am San-Giovanni-Hospital in Bellinzona, ist das zentrale Krankenhaus fΟΦr die Kinderheilkunde in der SΟΦdschweiz und umfasst allgemeine, spezialisierte und pΟΛdiatrische Chirurgie, einschlieΟülich einer 2B-Neonatologie und intermediΟΛrer pΟΛdiatrischer Versorgung. Der neue Mitarbeiter wird innerhalb des pΟΛdiatrischen Grundversorgungsdienstes arbeiten, der sich um alle pΟΛdiatrischen Patienten auf der Locarno-Stelle des Kinderinstituts der SΟΦdschweiz kΟΦmmert. Die Person, die wir suchen, hat berufliche Erfahrung, Initiative und Zusammenarbeitssinn. Sie muss in der Lage sein, in einem Team zu arbeiten, freundlich mit dem Team und den Patienten zu sein. Sie ist in der Lage, strukturiert und unabhΟΛngig zu arbeiten und hat Interesse an Lehre und Forschung. Sie glauben, wie wir, an die Bedeutung, den Patienten und seine Familie in den Mittelpunkt aller unserer Aufmerksamkeit zu stellen. Die Funktion umfasst AktivitΟΛten im ambulanten und stationΟΛren Bereich im breiten Feld der PΟΛdiatrie, die Teilnahme an pΟΛdiatrischen medizinischen Diensten und didaktische AktivitΟΛten in Zusammenarbeit mit der FakultΟΛt fΟΦr Biomedizin der UniversitΟΛt der SΟΦdschweiz (USI). ## Anforderungen - Medizinischer und chirurgischer Abschluss; - FΟΦr Ο³rzte mit auslΟΛndischen Titeln ist die obligatorische Anerkennung/Registrierung durch die EidgenΟΕssische Kommission fΟΦr medizinische Berufe MEBEKO und Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit erforderlich; - Genaue Kenntnisse der italienischen Sprache (erforderlicher Sprachniveau mindestens B2) mit Registrierung bei MedReg vor Beginn der TΟΛtigkeit; - Gute Kenntnisse einer anderen nationalen Sprache (FranzΟΕsisch, Deutsch) und mΟΕglicherweise Englisch sind auch wΟΦnschenswert; - Es ist stark bevorzugt, dass mindestens eine Erfahrung in einem Ausbildungsinstitut B oder C, bevorzugt in der Schweiz, vorliegt. ## Was wir bieten Beobachtungen nach Bedarf
descriptionByLocale.fr: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale est un hΟ¥pital Ο† plusieurs sites dans le canton du Tessin avec 1 000 lits sur tout le territoire cantonal. Notre organisation combine une approche locale avec une vision globale, garantissant une offre hospitaliΟ®re complΟ®te et de proximitΟ©, quel que soit l'emplacement oΟΙ les services sont nΟ©cessaires. GrΟΔce Ο† l'engagement et Ο† l'expertise de plus de 6 500 employΟ©s et Ο† leur attention aux relations humaines, EOC assure une prise en charge sanitaire de qualitΟ©, soignant plus de 41 000 patients hospitalisΟ©s par an et fournissant plus de 600 000 consultations externes. La position suivante est ouverte aux candidats qui souhaitent soumettre une candidature spontanΟ©e. Pour complΟ©ter notre Ο©quipe dans les services de soins de base pour enfants de l'Institut pΟ©diatrique de la Suisse italienne, nous recherchons un assistant de soins en formation (100%). L'Institut pΟ©diatrique de la Suisse italienne, avec son siΟ®ge principal Ο† l'hΟ¥pital San Giovanni de Bellinzone, est l'hΟ¥pital central pour les soins pΟ©diatriques en Suisse italienne et comprend les soins pΟ©diatriques gΟ©nΟ©raux, spΟ©cialisΟ©s, chirurgie pΟ©diatrique, y compris une nΟ©onatologie 2B et les soins intermΟ©diaires pΟ©diatriques. Le nouveau collaborateur collaborera dans le service de soins de base pour enfants, qui prend en charge tous les patients pΟ©diatriques de la localitΟ© de Locarno de l'Institut pΟ©diatrique de la Suisse italienne. La personne que nous recherchons a une expΟ©rience professionnelle, un esprit d'initiative et de collaboration. Ils doivent ΟΣtre capables de travailler en Ο©quipe, ΟΣtre gentils avec les deux Ο©quipes et les patients. Ils sont capables de travailler de maniΟ®re structurΟ©e et indΟ©pendante et ont un intΟ©rΟΣt pour l'enseignement et la recherche. Ils croient, comme nous, Ο† l'importance de mettre le patient et sa famille au centre de toutes nos attentions. La fonction implique des activitΟ©s dans le domaine des soins externes et internes dans le domaine large de la pΟ©diatrie, la participation aux services mΟ©dicaux pΟ©diatriques et des activitΟ©s didactiques en collaboration avec la FacultΟ© de biomedicine de l'universitΟ© de la Suisse italienne (USI). ## Exigences - DiplΟ¥me en mΟ©decine et chirurgie; - Pour les mΟ©decins avec des titres Ο©trangers, l'inscription obligatoire auprΟ®s de la Commission fΟ©dΟ©rale des professions mΟ©dicales MEBEKO et inscription auprΟ®s de MedReg avant le dΟ©but de l'activitΟ©; - Connaissances prΟ©cises de la langue italienne (niveau requis au moins B2) avec inscription auprΟ®s de MedReg avant le dΟ©but de l'activitΟ©; - Bonnes connaissances d'une autre langue nationale (franΟßais, allemand) et peut-ΟΣtre de l'anglais sont Ο©galement souhaitables; - Il est fortement prΟ©fΟ©rΟ© d'avoir au moins une expΟ©rience dans un institut de formation B ou C, prΟ©fΟ©rablement acquis en Suisse. ## Ce que nous offrons Observations selon les besoins

jobs.description:
## Medico Capoclinica di Dermatologia

LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie all'impegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti all'anno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali.

## Descrizione della posizione

La seguente posizione Ο® rivolta ai candidati che desiderano inoltrare una candidatura spontanea . Per completare il nostro team di Dermatologia EOC, con attivitΟ† principale presso le sedi di Bellinzona (OSG) e/o Mendrisio (OBV), cerchiamo un/una Medico Capoclinica Medico Capoclinica di Dermatologia (da 50% a 100%)

## Profilo del candidato

La persona che cerchiamo possiede esperienza professionale ed autonomia, come pure motivazione, iniziativa propria e spirito di collaborazione. Crede, come noi, nell'importanza di mettere il paziente e la sua famiglia al centro di tutte le nostre attenzioni.

## Requisiti

- Laurea/diploma in medicina e chirurgia;
- per medici con titoli esteri Ο® richiesto obbligatoriamente il riconoscimento/registrazione da parte della Commissione federale per le professioni mediche MEBEKO e relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†.
- Titolo di specialitΟ† in Dermatologia e Venereologia ottenuto o in via di ottenimento (per medici con titoli esteri Ο® richiesto obbligatoriamente il riconoscimento da parte della Commissione federale per le professioni mediche MEBEKO e relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†)
- Comprovata conoscenza della lingua italiana (livello richiesto almeno B2) con relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†.
- Sono inoltre auspicate, ma non indispensabili, buone conoscenze di unβÄôaltra lingua nazionale oltre allβÄôitaliano (francese, tedesco) ed eventualmente dellβÄôinglese.
- Attestato di libero esercizio nel Canton Ticino ottenuto prima dellβÄôinizio dellβÄôattivitΟ†
- Esperienza clinica in Dermatologia
- Esperienza nella formazione di giovani colleghi
- Spiccate capacitΟ† relazionali e di lavoro in team
- Interesse per la ricerca e lβÄôinsegnamento

## Cosa offriamo

Qualora il medico non fosse ancora in possesso del titolo di specializzazione o del libero esercizio nel Canton Ticino vi Ο® la possibilitΟ† di eventualmente valutare la possibilitΟ† di stipulare un contratto quale medico sostituto Capo clinica.

## Contatto

Le candidature di coloro che non possiedono i requisiti sopraindicati non saranno prese in alcun caso in considerazione e di conseguenza verranno eliminate dalla nostra banca dati. La valutazione delle candidature verrΟ† fatta solo in caso di esigenze di servizio. Trattandosi di una posizione per la quale non Ο® prevista alcuna scadenza, le candidature saranno valutate continuamente.

descriptionByLocale.en: EOC βÄ™ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale is a multi-site hospital in Ticino with 1,000 beds across the cantonal territory. Our organization combines local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures quality healthcare, taking care of over 41,000 inpatients per year and providing over 600,000 outpatient consultations. ## Job Position This position is open to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application. To complete our Dermatology team at EOC, with main activities at the Bellinzona (OSG) and/or Mendrisio (OBV) sites, we are looking for a Dermatology Clinic Chief Physician (50% to 100%) ## Candidate Profile The person we are looking for has professional experience and autonomy, as well as motivation, initiative, and a collaborative spirit. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. ## Requirements - Medical degree and surgery diploma; - For doctors with foreign titles, recognition/registration by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting activity is mandatory; - Specialty title in Dermatology and Venereology obtained or in the process of being obtained (for doctors with foreign titles, recognition by the Federal Commission for Medical Professions MEBEKO and registration with MedReg before starting activity is mandatory); - Proven knowledge of the Italian language (B2 level required) with registration with MedReg before starting activity; - Good knowledge of another national language (French, German) and possibly English is also desirable; - Certificate of free exercise in the Canton of Ticino obtained before starting activity; - Clinical experience in Dermatology; - Experience in training young colleagues; - Strong relational and teamwork skills; - Interest in research and teaching; ## What We Offer If the doctor does not yet possess the specialty title or the free exercise certificate in the Canton of Ticino, there is the possibility of evaluating the possibility of signing a contract as a substitute chief physician. ## Contact Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered and will be eliminated from our database. The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs. As this is a position for which there is no deadline, applications will be continuously evaluated.

jobs.title: Medico capoclinica del Pronto Soccorso
jobs.description: Medico capoclinica del Pronto Soccorso - Ausschreibung LβÄôEOC lβÄôospedale multisito del Ticino Ο® presente con i suoi istituti sull'intero territorio cantonale per un totale di 1βÄô000 posti letto. LβÄôorganizzazione permette di combinare efficacemente approccio locale e visione d'insieme, garantendo alla popolazione un'offerta ospedaliera globale e di prossimitΟ†, indipendentemente dal luogo in cui sono richiesti i servizi. Grazie allβÄôimpegno e alla competenza degli oltre 6βÄô500 collaboratori e alla loro attenzione verso la relazione umana, lβÄôEOC assicura unβÄôassistenza sanitaria di qualitΟ† prendendosi cura di oltre 41'000 pazienti degenti allβÄôanno e fornendo oltre 600'000 consulti ambulatoriali. La seguente posizione Ο® rivolta ai candidati che desiderano inoltrare una candidatura spontanea quale Medico capoclinica del Pronto Soccorso Profilo Il Servizio di Medicina d'Urgenza e Pronto soccorso EOC (SMU EOC) Ο® ubicato a Lugano e Bellinzona (centro di formazione di categoria 1 multidisciplinare), come pure a Mendrisio e Locarno (centro di formazione di categoria 2 monodisciplinare). La sede di Lugano funge anche da centro hub per il Canton Ticino per quanto riguarda le patologie tempo dipendenti quali stroke, politrauma e cardiopatia ischemica. Ogni capoclinica del SMU EOC sarΟ† assegnato prioritariamente ad uno dei Pronto Soccorso del SMU EOC (Bellinzona, Locarno, Lugano, Mendrisio) e avrΟ† la possibilitΟ† di ruotare sulle altre sedi. I/le candidati/e idonei/e saranno impiegati/e all'interno di un team interdisciplinare in cui svolgeranno attivitΟ† clinica e avranno la possibilitΟ† di fare ricerca clinica e di formazione, ricoprendo inoltre incarichi organizzativi. Le persone prescelte avranno anche un ruolo di tutor dei medici in formazione, come pure degli studenti di medicina dellβÄôUniversitΟ† della Svizzera Italiana. I/le candidati/e avranno ampie e interessanti opportunitΟ† formative, che vanno dalle formazioni settimanali, alla simulazione, dalla discussione di casi clinici complessi, alle lezioni di tossicologia clinica. Potranno poi frequentare corsi come ACLS, ATLS, POCUS, PALS, NIV e di completare la propria formazione per ottenere il riconoscimento di medico dβÄôurgenza SMUSS se non ancora in possesso. Requisiti indispensabili: laurea/diploma in medicina e specializzazione in medicina interna e/o chirurgia o titolo equivalente e relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dellβÄôinizio dellβÄôattivitΟ† lavorativa. P er medici con titoli esteri: Ο® richiesto obbligatoriamente il riconoscimento da parte della Commissione federale per le professioni mediche MEBEKO e relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dellβÄôinizio dellβÄôattivitΟ† comprovata conoscenza della lingua italiana (livello richiesto almeno B2) con relativa registrazione a MedReg prima dell'inizio dell'attivitΟ†, auspicata conoscenza delle altre lingue nazionali e dellβÄôinglese certificato medico dβÄôurgenza SMUSS costituisce requisito preferenziale esperienza clinica in istituti ospedalieri svizzeri o esteri riconos
